search_text: TransformNet: Self-supervised representation learning through predicting geometric transformations TransformNet：通过预测几何变换进行自监督表示学习 Deep neural networks need a big amount of training data, while in the real world there is a scarcity of data available for training purposes. To resolve this issue unsupervised methods are used for training with limited data. In this report, we describe the unsupervised semantic feature learning approach for recognition of the geometric transformation applied to the input data. The basic concept of our approach is that if someone is unaware of the objects in the images, he/she would not be able to quantitatively predict the geometric transformation that was applied to them. This self supervised scheme is based on pretext task and the downstream task. The pretext classification task to quantify the geometric transformations should force the CNN to learn high-level salient features of objects useful for image classification. In our baseline model, we define image rotations by multiples of 90 degrees. The CNN trained on this pretext task will be used for the classification of images in the CIFAR-10 dataset as a downstream task. we run the baseline method using various models, including ResNet, DenseNet, VGG-16, and NIN with a varied number of rotations in feature extracting and fine-tuning settings. In extension of this baseline model we experiment with transformations other than rotation in pretext task. We compare performance of selected models in various settings with different transformations applied to images,various data augmentation techniques as well as using different optimizers. This series of different type of experiments will help us demonstrate the recognition accuracy of our self-supervised model when applied to a downstream task of classification. 深度神经网络需要大量的训练数据，而现实世界中可用于训练的数据却很少。为了解决这个问题，使用无监督方法用有限的数据进行训练。在本报告中，我们描述了用于识别应用于输入数据的几何变换的无监督语义特征学习方法。我们方法的基本概念是，如果有人不知道图像中的对象，他/她将无法定量预测应用于它们的几何变换。该自监督方案基于借口任务和下游任务。量化几何变换的借口分类任务应该迫使 CNN 学习对图像分类有用的对象的高级显着特征。在我们的基线模型中，我们将图像旋转定义为 90 度的倍数。在此借口任务上训练的 CNN 将作为下游任务用于 CIFAR-10 数据集中的图像分类。我们使用各种模型运行基线方法，包括 ResNet、DenseNet、VGG-16 和 NIN，在特征提取和微调设置中具有不同的旋转次数。在这个基线模型的扩展中，我们在借口任务中尝试了除了旋转之外的转换。我们比较了所选模型在各种设置下的性能，以及应用于图像的不同转换、各种数据增强技术以及使用不同的优化器。这一系列不同类型的实验将帮助我们展示自监督模型应用于下游分类任务时的识别准确性。 本文提出TransformNet，一种通过预测图像几何变换实现自监督特征学习的方法，并在CIFAR-10数据集上验证其分类性能。 Sayed Hashim,Muhammad Ali cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gokberk Elmas,Salman UH Dar,Yilmaz Korkmaz,Emir Ceyani,Burak Susam,Muzaffer Özbey,Salman Avestimehr,Tolga Çukur
title: Federated Learning of Generative Image Priors for MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于 MRI 重建的生成图像先验的联邦学习
abstract: Multi-institutional efforts can facilitate training of deep MRI reconstruction models, albeit privacy risks arise during cross-site sharing of imaging data. Federated learning (FL) has recently been introduced to address privacy concerns by enabling distributed training without transfer of imaging data. Existing FL methods for MRI reconstruction employ conditional models to map from undersampled to fully-sampled acquisitions via explicit knowledge of the imaging operator. Since conditional models generalize poorly across different acceleration rates or sampling densities, imaging operators must be fixed between training and testing, and they are typically matched across sites. To improve generalization and flexibility in multi-institutional collaborations, here we introduce a novel method for MRI reconstruction based on Federated learning of Generative IMage Priors (FedGIMP). FedGIMP leverages a two-stage approach: cross-site learning of a generative MRI prior, and subject-specific injection of the imaging operator. The global MRI prior is learned via an unconditional adversarial model that synthesizes high-quality MR images based on latent variables. Specificity in the prior is preserved via a mapper subnetwork that produces site-specific latents. During inference, the prior is combined with subject-specific imaging operators to enable reconstruction, and further adapted to individual test samples by minimizing data-consistency loss. Comprehensive experiments on multi-institutional datasets clearly demonstrate enhanced generalization performance of FedGIMP against site-specific and federated methods based on conditional models, as well as traditional reconstruction methods.
summary: Multi-institutional efforts can facilitate training of deep MRI reconstruction models, albeit privacy risks arise during cross-site sharing of imaging data. Federated learning (FL) has recently been introduced to address privacy concerns by enabling distributed training without transfer of imaging data. Existing FL methods for MRI reconstruction employ conditional models to map from undersampled to fully-sampled acquisitions via explicit knowledge of the imaging operator. Since conditional models generalize poorly across different acceleration rates or sampling densities, imaging operators must be fixed between training and testing, and they are typically matched across sites. To improve generalization and flexibility in multi-institutional collaborations, here we introduce a novel method for MRI reconstruction based on Federated learning of Generative IMage Priors (FedGIMP). FedGIMP leverages a two-stage approach: cross-site learning of a generative MRI prior, and subject-specific injection of the imaging operator. The global MRI prior is learned via an unconditional adversarial model that synthesizes high-quality MR images based on latent variables. Specificity in the prior is preserved via a mapper subnetwork that produces site-specific latents. During inference, the prior is combined with subject-specific imaging operators to enable reconstruction, and further adapted to individual test samples by minimizing data-consistency loss. Comprehensive experiments on multi-institutional datasets clearly demonstrate enhanced generalization performance of FedGIMP against site-specific and federated methods based on conditional models, as well as traditional reconstruction methods.
abstract_zh: 多机构的努力可以促进深度 MRI 重建模型的训练，尽管在跨站点共享成像数据期间会出现隐私风险。最近引入了联邦学习（FL），通过在不传输成像数据的情况下实现分布式训练来解决隐私问题。现有的 MRI 重建 FL 方法采用条件模型，通过成像操作员的明确知识从欠采样映射到完全采样采集。由于条件模型在不同的加速度或采样密度上的泛化能力很差，因此必须在训练和测试之间固定成像操作员，并且它们通常在各个站点之间进行匹配。为了提高多机构协作的泛化性和灵活性，这里我们介绍了一种基于生成图像先验联邦学习（FedGIMP）的 MRI 重建新方法。 FedGIMP 利用两阶段方法：生成 MRI 先前的跨站点学习，以及成像操作员的特定主题注入。全局 MRI 先验是通过无条件对抗模型学习的，该模型根据潜在变量合成高质量的 MR 图像。先验的特异性通过产生特定位点潜伏的映射器子网络来保留。在推理过程中，先验与特定于主题的成像算子相结合以实现重建，并通过最大限度地减少数据一致性损失来进一步适应各个测试样本。对多机构数据集的综合实验清楚地证明了 FedGIMP 相对于基于条件模型的特定站点和联合方法以及传统重建方法的增强的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于联邦学习的生成图像先验（FedGIMP）方法，用于解决多机构协作下的MRI重建隐私问题并提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习MRI重建方法依赖条件模型，需固定成像算子导致泛化性差，难以适应不同加速率或采样密度场景。
AI.method: FedGIMP采用两阶段框架：跨站点学习无条件生成对抗网络构建全局MRI先验，通过映射子网络保留站点特异性；推理时结合个体成像算子并优化数据一致性损失。
AI.result: 多机构数据集实验表明，FedGIMP在跨站点和联邦方法中均展现更优的泛化性能，优于传统重建方法和条件模型基线。
AI.conclusion: FedGIMP通过解耦全局先验与个体算子，实现了隐私保护下的灵活MRI重建，为多机构协作提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Boxin Wang,Wei Ping,Chaowei Xiao,Peng Xu,Mostofa Patwary,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bo Li,Anima Anandkumar,Bryan Catanzaro
title: Exploring the Limits of Domain-Adaptive Training for Detoxifying Large-Scale Language Models
title_zh: 探索领域自适应训练的局限性以消除大规模语言模型的毒害
abstract: Pre-trained language models (LMs) are shown to easily generate toxic language. In this work, we systematically explore domain-adaptive training to reduce the toxicity of language models. We conduct this study on three dimensions: training corpus, model size, and parameter efficiency. For the training corpus, we propose to leverage the generative power of LMs and generate nontoxic datasets for domain-adaptive training, which mitigates the exposure bias and is shown to be more data-efficient than using a curated pre-training corpus. We demonstrate that the self-generation method consistently outperforms the existing baselines across various model sizes on both automatic and human evaluations, even when it uses a 1/3 smaller training corpus. We then comprehensively study detoxifying LMs with parameter sizes ranging from 126M up to 530B (3x larger than GPT-3), a scale that has never been studied before. We find that i) large LMs have similar toxicity levels as smaller ones given the same pre-training corpus, and ii) large LMs require more endeavor to detoxify. We also explore parameter-efficient training methods for detoxification. We demonstrate that adding and training adapter-only layers in LMs not only saves a lot of parameters but also achieves a better trade-off between toxicity and perplexity than whole model adaptation for the large-scale models.
summary: Pre-trained language models (LMs) are shown to easily generate toxic language. In this work, we systematically explore domain-adaptive training to reduce the toxicity of language models. We conduct this study on three dimensions: training corpus, model size, and parameter efficiency. We then comprehensively study detoxifying LMs with parameter sizes ranging from 126M up to 530B (3x larger than GPT-3), a scale that has never been studied before. We find that i) large LMs have similar toxicity levels as smaller ones given the same pre-training corpus, and ii) large LMs require more endeavor to detoxify. We also explore parameter-efficient training methods for detoxification. We demonstrate that adding and training adapter-only layers in LMs not only saves a lot of parameters but also achieves a better trade-off between toxicity and perplexity than whole model adaptation for the large-scale models.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，预先训练的语言模型（LM）很容易生成有毒语言。在这项工作中，我们系统地探索领域自适应训练以减少语言模型的毒性。我们从三个维度进行这项研究：训练语料库、模型大小和参数效率。对于训练语料库，我们建议利用 LM 的生成能力并生成用于领域自适应训练的无毒数据集，这可以减轻暴露偏差，并且比使用精心策划的预训练语料库更具数据效率。我们证明，即使使用较小 1/3 的训练语料库，自生成方法在自动评估和人工评估中始终优于各种模型大小的现有基线。然后，我们全面研究参数大小范围从 126M 到 530B（比 GPT-3 大 3 倍）的解毒 LM，这是以前从未研究过的规模。我们发现，i）在给定相同的预训练语料库的情况下，大型 LM 与较小的 LM 具有相似的毒性水平，并且 ii）大型 LM 需要更多的努力来消除毒性。我们还探索参数有效的排毒训练方法。我们证明，在语言模型中添加和训练仅适配器层不仅可以节省大量参数，而且与大规模模型的整个模型自适应相比，还可以在毒性和困惑度之间实现更好的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究领域自适应训练在降低大规模语言模型毒性方面的有效性，从训练语料、模型规模和参数效率三个维度进行探索。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型容易生成有毒语言，需通过领域自适应训练降低其毒性，但现有方法存在数据效率低、难以适配超大规模模型等问题。
AI.method: 提出利用模型生成能力构建非毒语料的方法，对比不同规模模型（126M-530B）及参数高效训练策略（仅训练适配器层）的 detox 效果。
AI.result: 生成方法在数据量减少1/3时仍优于基线；大模型毒性与小模型相当但更难 detox；适配器层方法在毒性与困惑度间取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: 生成式领域自适应训练有效提升 detox 效率，超大规模模型需更精细的参数优化策略以实现毒性控制。

search_text: Exploring the Limits of Domain-Adaptive Training for Detoxifying Large-Scale Language Models 探索领域自适应训练的局限性以消除大规模语言模型的毒害 Pre-trained language models (LMs) are shown to easily generate toxic language. In this work, we systematically explore domain-adaptive training to reduce the toxicity of language models. We conduct this study on three dimensions: training corpus, model size, and parameter efficiency. For the training corpus, we propose to leverage the generative power of LMs and generate nontoxic datasets for domain-adaptive training, which mitigates the exposure bias and is shown to be more data-efficient than using a curated pre-training corpus. We demonstrate that the self-generation method consistently outperforms the existing baselines across various model sizes on both automatic and human evaluations, even when it uses a 1/3 smaller training corpus. We then comprehensively study detoxifying LMs with parameter sizes ranging from 126M up to 530B (3x larger than GPT-3), a scale that has never been studied before. We find that i) large LMs have similar toxicity levels as smaller ones given the same pre-training corpus, and ii) large LMs require more endeavor to detoxify. We also explore parameter-efficient training methods for detoxification. We demonstrate that adding and training adapter-only layers in LMs not only saves a lot of parameters but also achieves a better trade-off between toxicity and perplexity than whole model adaptation for the large-scale models. 事实证明，预先训练的语言模型（LM）很容易生成有毒语言。在这项工作中，我们系统地探索领域自适应训练以减少语言模型的毒性。我们从三个维度进行这项研究：训练语料库、模型大小和参数效率。对于训练语料库，我们建议利用 LM 的生成能力并生成用于领域自适应训练的无毒数据集，这可以减轻暴露偏差，并且比使用精心策划的预训练语料库更具数据效率。我们证明，即使使用较小 1/3 的训练语料库，自生成方法在自动评估和人工评估中始终优于各种模型大小的现有基线。然后，我们全面研究参数大小范围从 126M 到 530B（比 GPT-3 大 3 倍）的解毒 LM，这是以前从未研究过的规模。我们发现，i）在给定相同的预训练语料库的情况下，大型 LM 与较小的 LM 具有相似的毒性水平，并且 ii）大型 LM 需要更多的努力来消除毒性。我们还探索参数有效的排毒训练方法。我们证明，在语言模型中添加和训练仅适配器层不仅可以节省大量参数，而且与大规模模型的整个模型自适应相比，还可以在毒性和困惑度之间实现更好的权衡。 本文系统研究领域自适应训练在降低大规模语言模型毒性方面的有效性，从训练语料、模型规模和参数效率三个维度进行探索。 Boxin Wang,Wei Ping,Chaowei Xiao,Peng Xu,Mostofa Patwary,Mohammad Shoeybi,Bo Li,Anima Anandkumar,Bryan Catanzaro cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Tassadaq Hussain,Muhammad Diyan,Mandar Gogate,Kia Dashtipour,Ahsan Adeel,Yu Tsao,Amir Hussain
title: A Speech Intelligibility Enhancement Model based on Canonical Correlation and Deep Learning for Hearing-Assistive Technologies
title_zh: 基于典型相关和深度学习的助听技术语音清晰度增强模型
comment: We would like to withdraw this article because we have accidentally uploaded the revised version of the same article from another account. The updated version is titled "A Novel Speech Intelligibility Enhancement Model based on Canonical Correlation and Deep Learning" (arXiv:2202.05756)
comments: We would like to withdraw this article because we have accidentally uploaded the revised version of the same article from another account. The updated version is titled "A Novel Speech Intelligibility Enhancement Model based on Canonical Correlation and Deep Learning" (arXiv:2202.05756)
abstract: Current deep learning (DL) based approaches to speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environments are generally trained to minimise the distance between clean and enhanced speech features. These often result in improved speech quality however they suffer from a lack of generalisation and may not deliver the required speech intelligibility in everyday noisy situations. In an attempt to address these challenges, researchers have explored intelligibility-oriented (I-O) loss functions to train DL approaches for robust speech enhancement (SE). In this paper, we formulate a novel canonical correlation-based I-O loss function to more effectively train DL algorithms. Specifically, we present a fully convolutional SE model that uses a modified canonical-correlation based short-time objective intelligibility (CC-STOI) metric as a training cost function. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that exploits the integration of canonical correlation in an I-O based loss function for SE. Comparative experimental results demonstrate that our proposed CC-STOI based SE framework outperforms DL models trained with conventional STOI and distance-based loss functions, in terms of both standard objective and subjective evaluation measures when dealing with unseen speakers and noises.
summary: Current deep learning (DL) based approaches to speech intelligibility enhancement in noisy environments are generally trained to minimise the distance between clean and enhanced speech features. These often result in improved speech quality however they suffer from a lack of generalisation and may not deliver the required speech intelligibility in everyday noisy situations. In an attempt to address these challenges, researchers have explored intelligibility-oriented (I-O) loss functions to train DL approaches for robust speech enhancement (SE). In this paper, we formulate a novel canonical correlation-based I-O loss function to more effectively train DL algorithms. Specifically, we present a fully convolutional SE model that uses a modified canonical-correlation based short-time objective intelligibility (CC-STOI) metric as a training cost function. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that exploits the integration of canonical correlation in an I-O based loss function for SE. Comparative experimental results demonstrate that our proposed CC-STOI based SE framework outperforms DL models trained with conventional STOI and distance-based loss functions, in terms of both standard objective and subjective evaluation measures when dealing with unseen speakers and noises.
abstract_zh: 目前基于深度学习 (DL) 的噪声环境中语音清晰度增强方法通常经过训练，以最小化清晰语音特征和增强语音特征之间的距离。这些通常会提高语音质量，但它们缺乏通用性，并且可能无法在日常嘈杂的情况下提供所需的语音清晰度。为了解决这些挑战，研究人员探索了面向清晰度 (I-O) 的损失函数来训练 DL 方法以实现稳健的语音增强 (SE)。在本文中，我们制定了一种新颖的基于规范相关性的 I-O 损失函数，以更有效地训练深度学习算法。具体来说，我们提出了一个完全卷积 SE 模型，该模型使用基于修改的规范相关的短时目标清晰度 (CC-STOI) 度量作为训练成本函数。据我们所知，这是第一个在 SE 的基于 I-O 的损失函数中利用典型相关性集成的工作。比较实验结果表明，在处理看不见的说话者和噪声时，在标准客观和主观评估措施方面，我们提出的基于 CC-STOI 的 SE 框架优于使用传统 STOI 和基于距离的损失函数训练的 DL 模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于典型相关和深度学习的语音可懂度增强模型，用于助听技术。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在嘈杂环境中提升语音质量但泛化能力不足，无法满足日常使用需求，需更有效的可懂度导向损失函数。
AI.method: 设计基于典型相关改进的CC-STOI损失函数，结合全卷积神经网络构建语音增强模型。
AI.result: 在未见过的说话人和噪音测试中，CC-STOI框架在客观和主观指标上优于传统STOI和距离损失函数方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效提升语音可懂度，为助听技术提供新的解决方案，验证了典型相关损失函数的有效性。

authors_text: Sajjad Beygi,Maryam Fazel-Zarandi,Alessandra Cervone,Prakash Krishnan,Siddhartha Reddy Jonnalagadda
title: Logical Reasoning for Task Oriented Dialogue Systems
title_zh: 面向任务的对话系统的逻辑推理
abstract: In recent years, large pretrained models have been used in dialogue systems to improve successful task completion rates. However, lack of reasoning capabilities of dialogue platforms make it difficult to provide relevant and fluent responses, unless the designers of a conversational experience spend a considerable amount of time implementing these capabilities in external rule based modules. In this work, we propose a novel method to fine-tune pretrained transformer models such as Roberta and T5. to reason over a set of facts in a given dialogue context. Our method includes a synthetic data generation mechanism which helps the model learn logical relations, such as comparison between list of numerical values, inverse relations (and negation), inclusion and exclusion for categorical attributes, and application of a combination of attributes over both numerical and categorical values, and spoken form for numerical values, without need for additional training dataset. We show that the transformer based model can perform logical reasoning to answer questions when the dialogue context contains all the required information, otherwise it is able to extract appropriate constraints to pass to downstream components (e.g. a knowledge base) when partial information is available. We observe that transformer based models such as UnifiedQA-T5 can be fine-tuned to perform logical reasoning (such as numerical and categorical attributes' comparison) over attributes that been seen in training time (e.g., accuracy of 90\%+ for comparison of smaller than $k_{\max}$=5 values over heldout test dataset).
summary: In recent years, large pretrained models have been used in dialogue systems to improve successful task completion rates. However, lack of reasoning capabilities of dialogue platforms make it difficult to provide relevant and fluent responses, unless the designers of a conversational experience spend a considerable amount of time implementing these capabilities in external rule based modules. In this work, we propose a novel method to fine-tune pretrained transformer models such as Roberta and T5. to reason over a set of facts in a given dialogue context. Our method includes a synthetic data generation mechanism which helps the model learn logical relations, such as comparison between list of numerical values, inverse relations (and negation), inclusion and exclusion for categorical attributes, and application of a combination of attributes over both numerical and categorical values, and spoken form for numerical values, without need for additional training dataset. We show that the transformer based model can perform logical reasoning to answer questions when the dialogue context contains all the required information, otherwise it is able to extract appropriate constraints to pass to downstream components (e.g. a knowledge base) when partial information is available. We observe that transformer based models such as UnifiedQA-T5 can be fine-tuned to perform logical reasoning (such as numerical and categorical attributes' comparison) over attributes that been seen in training time (e.g., accuracy of 90\%+ for comparison of smaller than $k_{\max}$=5 values over heldout test dataset).
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型预训练模型已被用于对话系统中，以提高任务的成功完成率。然而，对话平台缺乏推理能力，很难提供相关且流畅的响应，除非对话体验的设计者花费大量时间在基于外部规则的模块中实现这些功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来微调预训练的 Transformer 模型，例如 Roberta 和 T5。在给定的对话环境中对一组事实进行推理。我们的方法包括一个合成数据生成机制，可以帮助模型学习逻辑关系，例如数值列表之间的比较、逆关系（和否定）、分类属性的包含和排除、以及在数值和分类值上应用属性组合以及数值的口语形式，而无需额外的训练数据集。我们表明，当对话上下文包含所有所需信息时，基于变压器的模型可以执行逻辑推理来回答问题，否则当部分信息可用时，它能够提取适当的约束以传递给下游组件（例如知识库）。我们观察到，基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 UnifiedQA-T5）可以进行微调，以对训练时间中看到的属性执行逻辑推理（例如数字和分类属性的比较）（例如，在保留测试数据集上比较小于 $k_{\max}$=5 的值时，准确度为 90\%+）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过微调预训练Transformer模型（如RoBERTa和T5）来增强任务导向对话系统逻辑推理能力的方法，使其能处理数值和分类属性的比较等逻辑关系。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统缺乏推理能力，需依赖外部规则模块实现逻辑功能，但设计成本高且效率低，亟需无需额外数据集的模型自适应方法。
AI.method: 设计合成数据生成机制，通过微调预训练模型学习数值比较、逆关系、属性包含/排除等逻辑关系，并在信息不足时提取约束传递给下游组件。
AI.result: 实验显示，微调后的UnifiedQA-T5模型在测试数据集上实现90%+准确率，能处理训练中见过的数值和分类属性比较任务，并有效处理部分信息场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过合成数据微调Transformer模型可显著提升其逻辑推理能力，为任务导向对话系统提供轻量级推理方案，减少对人工规则模块的依赖。

search_text: Logical Reasoning for Task Oriented Dialogue Systems 面向任务的对话系统的逻辑推理 In recent years, large pretrained models have been used in dialogue systems to improve successful task completion rates. However, lack of reasoning capabilities of dialogue platforms make it difficult to provide relevant and fluent responses, unless the designers of a conversational experience spend a considerable amount of time implementing these capabilities in external rule based modules. In this work, we propose a novel method to fine-tune pretrained transformer models such as Roberta and T5. to reason over a set of facts in a given dialogue context. Our method includes a synthetic data generation mechanism which helps the model learn logical relations, such as comparison between list of numerical values, inverse relations (and negation), inclusion and exclusion for categorical attributes, and application of a combination of attributes over both numerical and categorical values, and spoken form for numerical values, without need for additional training dataset. We show that the transformer based model can perform logical reasoning to answer questions when the dialogue context contains all the required information, otherwise it is able to extract appropriate constraints to pass to downstream components (e.g. a knowledge base) when partial information is available. We observe that transformer based models such as UnifiedQA-T5 can be fine-tuned to perform logical reasoning (such as numerical and categorical attributes' comparison) over attributes that been seen in training time (e.g., accuracy of 90\%+ for comparison of smaller than $k_{\max}$=5 values over heldout test dataset). 近年来，大型预训练模型已被用于对话系统中，以提高任务的成功完成率。然而，对话平台缺乏推理能力，很难提供相关且流畅的响应，除非对话体验的设计者花费大量时间在基于外部规则的模块中实现这些功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来微调预训练的 Transformer 模型，例如 Roberta 和 T5。在给定的对话环境中对一组事实进行推理。我们的方法包括一个合成数据生成机制，可以帮助模型学习逻辑关系，例如数值列表之间的比较、逆关系（和否定）、分类属性的包含和排除、以及在数值和分类值上应用属性组合以及数值的口语形式，而无需额外的训练数据集。我们表明，当对话上下文包含所有所需信息时，基于变压器的模型可以执行逻辑推理来回答问题，否则当部分信息可用时，它能够提取适当的约束以传递给下游组件（例如知识库）。我们观察到，基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 UnifiedQA-T5）可以进行微调，以对训练时间中看到的属性执行逻辑推理（例如数字和分类属性的比较）（例如，在保留测试数据集上比较小于 $k_{\max}$=5 的值时，准确度为 90\%+）。 本文提出一种通过微调预训练Transformer模型（如RoBERTa和T5）来增强任务导向对话系统逻辑推理能力的方法，使其能处理数值和分类属性的比较等逻辑关系。 Sajjad Beygi,Maryam Fazel-Zarandi,Alessandra Cervone,Prakash Krishnan,Siddhartha Reddy Jonnalagadda cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Takeshi Ikuma,Andrew J. McWhorter,Lacey Adkins,Melda Kunduk
title: Time-varying harmonic models for voice signal analysis
title_zh: 用于语音信号分析的时变谐波模型
abstract: Assessment of voice signals has long been performed with the assumption of periodicity as this facilitates analysis. Near periodicity of normal voice signals makes short-time harmonic modeling an appealing choice to extract vocal feature parameters. For dysphonic voice, however, a fixed harmonic structure could be too constrained as it strictly enforces periodicity in the model. Slight variation in amplitude or frequency in the signal may cause the model to misrepresent the observed signal. To address these issues, this paper presents a time-varying harmonic model, which allows its fundamental frequency and harmonic amplitudes to be polynomial functions of time. The model decouples the slow deviations of frequency and amplitude from fast irregular vocal fold vibratory behaviors such as subharmonics and diplophonia. The time-varying model is shown to track the frequency and amplitude modulations present in voice with severe tremor. This reduces the sensitivity of the model-based harmonics-to-noise ratio measures to slow frequency and amplitude variations while maintaining its sensitivity to increase in turbulent noise or the presence of irregular vibration. Other uses of the model include the vocal tract filter estimation and the rates of frequency and intensity changes. These use cases are experimentally demonstrated along with the modeling accuracy.
summary: Assessment of voice signals has long been performed with the assumption of periodicity as this facilitates analysis. Near periodicity of normal voice signals makes short-time harmonic modeling an appealing choice to extract vocal feature parameters. For dysphonic voice, however, a fixed harmonic structure could be too constrained as it strictly enforces periodicity in the model. Slight variation in amplitude or frequency in the signal may cause the model to misrepresent the observed signal. To address these issues, this paper presents a time-varying harmonic model, which allows its fundamental frequency and harmonic amplitudes to be polynomial functions of time. The model decouples the slow deviations of frequency and amplitude from fast irregular vocal fold vibratory behaviors such as subharmonics and diplophonia. The time-varying model is shown to track the frequency and amplitude modulations present in voice with severe tremor. This reduces the sensitivity of the model-based harmonics-to-noise ratio measures to slow frequency and amplitude variations while maintaining its sensitivity to increase in turbulent noise or the presence of irregular vibration. Other uses of the model include the vocal tract filter estimation and the rates of frequency and intensity changes. These use cases are experimentally demonstrated along with the modeling accuracy.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，语音信号的评估都是在周期性假设的情况下进行的，因为这有利于分析。正常语音信号的接近周期性使得短时谐波建模成为提取声音特征参数的有吸引力的选择。然而，对于发音困难的声音，固定的和声结构可能过于受限，因为它严格强制模型中的周期性。信号幅度或频率的轻微变化可能会导致模型错误地表示观察到的信号。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种时变谐波模型，使其基频和谐波幅度成为时间的多项式函数。该模型将频率和振幅的缓慢偏差与快速不规则声带振动行为（例如分谐波和复音）解耦。时变模型可以跟踪严重颤抖的语音中存在的频率和幅度调制。这降低了基于模型的谐波噪声比测量对减缓频率和幅度变化的敏感性，同时保持其对湍流噪声增加或不规则振动存在的敏感性。该模型的其他用途包括声道滤波器估计以及频率和强度变化率。这些用例以及建模准确性都经过实验证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时变谐波模型，用于更准确地分析语音信号，特别是在处理发音障碍引起的频率和幅度变化时。
AI.motivation: 传统周期性假设的谐波模型在处理发音障碍语音时存在局限性，无法适应频率和幅度的微小变化，导致模型失真。
AI.method: 构建时变谐波模型，将基频和谐波幅度表示为时间的多项式函数，分离慢速频率/幅度变化与快速不规则振动行为。
AI.result: 模型有效跟踪严重震颤语音的频率幅度调制，降低对慢变化的敏感性，同时保持对湍流噪声和不规则振动的检测能力，并成功应用于声道滤波器估计等场景。
AI.conclusion: 时变谐波模型解决了传统方法的不足，提高了语音分析的准确性和适应性，实验验证了其有效性。

authors_text: Aaron B. Wagner
title: The Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff: The Role of Common Randomness
title_zh: 率-失真-感知权衡：共同随机性的作用
abstract: A rate-distortion-perception (RDP) tradeoff has recently been proposed by Blau and Michaeli and also Matsumoto. Focusing on the case of perfect realism, which coincides with the problem of distribution-preserving lossy compression studied by Li et al., a coding theorem for the RDP tradeoff that allows for a specified amount of common randomness between the encoder and decoder is provided. The existing RDP tradeoff is recovered by allowing for the amount of common randomness to be infinite. The quadratic Gaussian case is examined in detail.
summary: A rate-distortion-perception (RDP) tradeoff has recently been proposed by Blau and Michaeli and also Matsumoto. Focusing on the case of perfect realism, which coincides with the problem of distribution-preserving lossy compression studied by Li et al., a coding theorem for the RDP tradeoff that allows for a specified amount of common randomness between the encoder and decoder is provided. The existing RDP tradeoff is recovered by allowing for the amount of common randomness to be infinite. The quadratic Gaussian case is examined in detail.
abstract_zh: Blau、Michaeli 以及 Matsumoto 最近提出了速率-失真-感知 (RDP) 权衡。着眼于完美现实主义的情况，这与 Li 等人研究的分布保持有损压缩问题相一致，提供了 RDP 权衡的编码定理，该定理允许编码器和解码器之间指定数量的公共随机性。通过允许公共随机性数量为无限来恢复现有的 RDP 权衡。详细研究了二次高斯情况。

AI.tldr: 研究完美现实场景下共同随机性对率失真感知权衡的影响，并建立相应的编码定理。
AI.motivation: 现有RDP权衡假设无限共同随机性，但实际应用中需考虑有限情况，需明确其影响并完善理论框架。
AI.method: 提出一个允许设定共同随机性的编码定理，并通过二次高斯模型进行详细分析。
AI.result: 推导出有限共同随机性下的RDP权衡，验证了无限情况下的现有结果，并详细分析了二次高斯模型的特性。
AI.conclusion: 共同随机性在RDP权衡中起关键作用，有限情况下的分析为实际压缩算法设计提供了理论依据。

search_text: The Rate-Distortion-Perception Tradeoff: The Role of Common Randomness 率-失真-感知权衡：共同随机性的作用 A rate-distortion-perception (RDP) tradeoff has recently been proposed by Blau and Michaeli and also Matsumoto. Focusing on the case of perfect realism, which coincides with the problem of distribution-preserving lossy compression studied by Li et al., a coding theorem for the RDP tradeoff that allows for a specified amount of common randomness between the encoder and decoder is provided. The existing RDP tradeoff is recovered by allowing for the amount of common randomness to be infinite. The quadratic Gaussian case is examined in detail. Blau、Michaeli 以及 Matsumoto 最近提出了速率-失真-感知 (RDP) 权衡。着眼于完美现实主义的情况，这与 Li 等人研究的分布保持有损压缩问题相一致，提供了 RDP 权衡的编码定理，该定理允许编码器和解码器之间指定数量的公共随机性。通过允许公共随机性数量为无限来恢复现有的 RDP 权衡。详细研究了二次高斯情况。 研究完美现实场景下共同随机性对率失真感知权衡的影响，并建立相应的编码定理。 Aaron B. Wagner cs.IT,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Eduard Zubchuk,Dmitry Menshikov,Nikolay Mikhaylovskiy
title: Using a Language Model in a Kiosk Recommender System at Fast-Food Restaurants
title_zh: 在快餐店的自助服务终端推荐系统中使用语言模型
abstract: Kiosks are a popular self-service option in many fast-food restaurants, they save time for the visitors and save labor for the fast-food chains. In this paper, we propose an effective design of a kiosk shopping cart recommender system that combines a language model as a vectorizer and a neural network-based classifier. The model performs better than other models in offline tests and exhibits performance comparable to the best models in A/B/C tests.
summary: Kiosks are a popular self-service option in many fast-food restaurants, they save time for the visitors and save labor for the fast-food chains. In this paper, we propose an effective design of a kiosk shopping cart recommender system that combines a language model as a vectorizer and a neural network-based classifier. The model performs better than other models in offline tests and exhibits performance comparable to the best models in A/B/C tests.
abstract_zh: 自助服务终端是许多快餐店流行的自助服务选择，它们为游客节省了时间，也为快餐连锁店节省了劳动力。在本文中，我们提出了一种自助服务终端购物车推荐系统的有效设计，该系统结合了作为矢量化器的语言模型和基于神经网络的分类器。该模型在离线测试中表现优于其他模型，并且在 A/B/C 测试中表现出与最佳模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 设计结合语言模型与神经网络的自助点餐推荐系统
AI.motivation: 提升自助点餐效率与推荐准确性，优化顾客体验及运营成本
AI.method: 融合语言模型向量化与神经网络分类器的推荐系统设计
AI.result: 离线测试优于其他模型，A/B/C测试效果与最优模型相当
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升推荐效果，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Manuel Birlo,P. J. "Eddie'' Edwards,Matthew Clarkson,Danail Stoyanov
title: Utility of Optical See-Through Head Mounted Displays in Augmented Reality-Assisted Surgery: A systematic review
title_zh: 光学透视头戴式显示器在增强现实辅助手术中的实用性：系统评价
abstract: This article presents a systematic review of optical see-through head mounted display (OST-HMD) usage in augmented reality (AR) surgery applications from 2013 to 2020. Articles were categorised by: OST-HMD device, surgical speciality, surgical application context, visualisation content, experimental design and evaluation, accuracy and human factors of human-computer interaction. 91 articles fulfilled all inclusion criteria. Some clear trends emerge. The Microsoft HoloLens increasingly dominates the field, with orthopaedic surgery being the most popular application (28.6\%). By far the most common surgical context is surgical guidance (n=58) and segmented preoperative models dominate visualisation (n = 40). Experiments mainly involve phantoms (n = 43) or system setup (n = 21), with patient case studies ranking third (n = 19), reflecting the comparative infancy of the field. Experiments cover issues from registration to perception with very different accuracy results. Human factors emerge as significant to OST-HMD utility. Some factors are addressed by the systems proposed, such as attention shift away from the surgical site and mental mapping of 2D images to 3D patient anatomy. Other persistent human factors remain or are caused by OST-HMD solutions, including ease of use, comfort and spatial perception issues. The significant upward trend in published articles is clear, but such devices are not yet established in the operating room and clinical studies showing benefit are lacking. A focused effort addressing technical registration and perceptual factors in the lab coupled with design that incorporates human factors considerations to solve clear clinical problems should ensure that the significant current research efforts will succeed.
summary: This article presents a systematic review of optical see-through head mounted display (OST-HMD) usage in augmented reality (AR) surgery applications from 2013 to 2020. Articles were categorised by: OST-HMD device, surgical speciality, surgical application context, visualisation content, experimental design and evaluation, accuracy and human factors of human-computer interaction. 91 articles fulfilled all inclusion criteria. Some clear trends emerge. The Microsoft HoloLens increasingly dominates the field, with orthopaedic surgery being the most popular application (28.6\%). By far the most common surgical context is surgical guidance (n=58) and segmented preoperative models dominate visualisation (n = 40). Experiments mainly involve phantoms (n = 43) or system setup (n = 21), with patient case studies ranking third (n = 19), reflecting the comparative infancy of the field. Experiments cover issues from registration to perception with very different accuracy results. Human factors emerge as significant to OST-HMD utility. Some factors are addressed by the systems proposed, such as attention shift away from the surgical site and mental mapping of 2D images to 3D patient anatomy. Other persistent human factors remain or are caused by OST-HMD solutions, including ease of use, comfort and spatial perception issues. The significant upward trend in published articles is clear, but such devices are not yet established in the operating room and clinical studies showing benefit are lacking. A focused effort addressing technical registration and perceptual factors in the lab coupled with design that incorporates human factors considerations to solve clear clinical problems should ensure that the significant current research efforts will succeed.
abstract_zh: 本文对 2013 年至 2020 年光学透视头戴式显示器 (OST-HMD) 在增强现实 (AR) 手术应用中的使用情况进行了系统回顾。文章按以下分类：OST-HMD 设备、手术专业、手术应用背景、可视化内容、实验设计和评估、人机交互的准确性和人为因素。 91 篇文章满足所有纳入标准。一些明显的趋势出现了。微软 HoloLens 日益占据该领域的主导地位，其中骨科手术是最受欢迎的应用 (28.6\%)。到目前为止，最常见的手术环境是手术指导（n = 58），分段术前模型主导可视化（n = 40）。实验主要涉及模型（n = 43）或系统设置（n = 21），患者案例研究排名第三（n = 19），反映出该领域相对处于起步阶段。实验涵盖了从配准到感知的问题，但准确度结果却截然不同。人为因素对于 OST-HMD 的实用性至关重要。所提出的系统解决了一些因素，例如注意力从手术部位转移以及 2D 图像到 3D 患者解剖结构的心理映射。其他持久的人为因素仍然存在或由 OST-HMD 解决方案引起，包括易用性、舒适度和空间感知问题。已发表文章的显着上升趋势是显而易见的，但此类设备尚未在手术室中建立，并且缺乏显示其益处的临床研究。集中精力解决实验室中的技术注册和感知因素，再加上考虑人为因素的设计来解决明确的临床问题，应确保当前的重大研究工作取得成功。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了2013至2020年间光学透视头戴显示器（OST-HMD）在增强现实辅助手术中的应用现状。
AI.motivation: 尽管OST-HMD在手术辅助领域研究增多，但其临床应用效果和普及程度尚不明确，需系统评估其技术进展与挑战。
AI.method: 通过系统综述方法，筛选并分类分析91篇符合标准的文献，从设备类型、手术专科、可视化内容、实验设计等多维度总结趋势与问题。
AI.result: 微软HoloLens占据主导地位，骨科手术应用最多（28.6%），手术导航最常见（58例）。实验多依赖仿真实验（43例），人因问题如注意力转移和空间感知仍是主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究呈上升趋势但临床验证不足，需重点解决注册精度、感知优化及人因设计问题，以推动OST-HMD在手术室的实际应用。

authors_text: Taro Makino,Krzysztof J. Geras,Kyunghyun Cho
title: Generative multitask learning mitigates target-causing confounding
title_zh: 生成多任务学习减轻目标引起的混淆
abstract: We propose generative multitask learning (GMTL), a simple and scalable approach to causal representation learning for multitask learning. Our approach makes a minor change to the conventional multitask inference objective, and improves robustness to target shift. Since GMTL only modifies the inference objective, it can be used with existing multitask learning methods without requiring additional training. The improvement in robustness comes from mitigating unobserved confounders that cause the targets, but not the input. We refer to them as \emph{target-causing confounders}. These confounders induce spurious dependencies between the input and targets. This poses a problem for conventional multitask learning, due to its assumption that the targets are conditionally independent given the input. GMTL mitigates target-causing confounding at inference time, by removing the influence of the joint target distribution, and predicting all targets jointly. This removes the spurious dependencies between the input and targets, where the degree of removal is adjustable via a single hyperparameter. This flexibility is useful for managing the trade-off between in- and out-of-distribution generalization. Our results on the Attributes of People and Taskonomy datasets reflect an improved robustness to target shift across four multitask learning methods.
summary: We propose generative multitask learning (GMTL), a simple and scalable approach to causal representation learning for multitask learning. Our approach makes a minor change to the conventional multitask inference objective, and improves robustness to target shift. Since GMTL only modifies the inference objective, it can be used with existing multitask learning methods without requiring additional training. The improvement in robustness comes from mitigating unobserved confounders that cause the targets, but not the input. We refer to them as \emph{target-causing confounders}. These confounders induce spurious dependencies between the input and targets. This poses a problem for conventional multitask learning, due to its assumption that the targets are conditionally independent given the input. GMTL mitigates target-causing confounding at inference time, by removing the influence of the joint target distribution, and predicting all targets jointly. This removes the spurious dependencies between the input and targets, where the degree of removal is adjustable via a single hyperparameter. This flexibility is useful for managing the trade-off between in- and out-of-distribution generalization. Our results on the Attributes of People and Taskonomy datasets reflect an improved robustness to target shift across four multitask learning methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了生成多任务学习（GMTL），这是一种简单且可扩展的多任务学习因果表示学习方法。我们的方法对传统的多任务推理目标进行了微小的改变，并提高了目标转移的鲁棒性。由于 GMTL 仅修改推理目标，因此它可以与现有的多任务学习方法一起使用，而无需额外的训练。稳健性的提高来自于减少导致目标而非输入的未观察到的混杂因素。我们将它们称为\emph{目标引起的混杂因素}。这些混杂因素会导致输入和目标之间产生虚假依赖关系。这给传统的多任务学习带来了一个问题，因为它假设目标在给定输入的情况下是条件独立的。 GMTL 通过消除联合目标分布的影响并联合预测所有目标，减轻了推理时目标引起的混杂。这消除了输入和目标之间的虚假依赖关系，其中消除的程度可通过单个超参数进行调整。这种灵活性对于管理分布内和分布外泛化之间的权衡很有用。我们在人员属性和任务数据集上的结果反映了四种多任务学习方法对目标转移的稳健性有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成式多任务学习（GMTL）方法，通过缓解目标导致的混淆因素提升多任务学习的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习在存在未观察到的'目标导致混淆因素'时会产生输入与目标间的虚假依赖，导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过修改推理目标函数，在预测时联合考虑所有目标分布，利用可调节超参数消除混淆因素影响。
AI.result: 在Attributes of People和Taskonomy数据集上，四种多任务方法在目标转移场景下的鲁棒性均得到提升。
AI.conclusion: GMTL有效缓解了目标导致的混淆问题，在保持现有方法兼容性的同时提升了分布内/外的泛化能力。

search_text: Generative multitask learning mitigates target-causing confounding 生成多任务学习减轻目标引起的混淆 We propose generative multitask learning (GMTL), a simple and scalable approach to causal representation learning for multitask learning. Our approach makes a minor change to the conventional multitask inference objective, and improves robustness to target shift. Since GMTL only modifies the inference objective, it can be used with existing multitask learning methods without requiring additional training. The improvement in robustness comes from mitigating unobserved confounders that cause the targets, but not the input. We refer to them as \emph{target-causing confounders}. These confounders induce spurious dependencies between the input and targets. This poses a problem for conventional multitask learning, due to its assumption that the targets are conditionally independent given the input. GMTL mitigates target-causing confounding at inference time, by removing the influence of the joint target distribution, and predicting all targets jointly. This removes the spurious dependencies between the input and targets, where the degree of removal is adjustable via a single hyperparameter. This flexibility is useful for managing the trade-off between in- and out-of-distribution generalization. Our results on the Attributes of People and Taskonomy datasets reflect an improved robustness to target shift across four multitask learning methods. 我们提出了生成多任务学习（GMTL），这是一种简单且可扩展的多任务学习因果表示学习方法。我们的方法对传统的多任务推理目标进行了微小的改变，并提高了目标转移的鲁棒性。由于 GMTL 仅修改推理目标，因此它可以与现有的多任务学习方法一起使用，而无需额外的训练。稳健性的提高来自于减少导致目标而非输入的未观察到的混杂因素。我们将它们称为\emph{目标引起的混杂因素}。这些混杂因素会导致输入和目标之间产生虚假依赖关系。这给传统的多任务学习带来了一个问题，因为它假设目标在给定输入的情况下是条件独立的。 GMTL 通过消除联合目标分布的影响并联合预测所有目标，减轻了推理时目标引起的混杂。这消除了输入和目标之间的虚假依赖关系，其中消除的程度可通过单个超参数进行调整。这种灵活性对于管理分布内和分布外泛化之间的权衡很有用。我们在人员属性和任务数据集上的结果反映了四种多任务学习方法对目标转移的稳健性有所提高。 本文提出生成式多任务学习（GMTL）方法，通过缓解目标导致的混淆因素提升多任务学习的鲁棒性。 Taro Makino,Krzysztof J. Geras,Kyunghyun Cho cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Ivan Rodin,Antonino Furnari,Dimitrios Mavroeidis,Giovanni Maria Farinella
title: Untrimmed Action Anticipation
title_zh: 未加修饰的动作预期
abstract: Egocentric action anticipation consists in predicting a future action the camera wearer will perform from egocentric video. While the task has recently attracted the attention of the research community, current approaches assume that the input videos are "trimmed", meaning that a short video sequence is sampled a fixed time before the beginning of the action. We argue that, despite the recent advances in the field, trimmed action anticipation has a limited applicability in real-world scenarios where it is important to deal with "untrimmed" video inputs and it cannot be assumed that the exact moment in which the action will begin is known at test time. To overcome such limitations, we propose an untrimmed action anticipation task, which, similarly to temporal action detection, assumes that the input video is untrimmed at test time, while still requiring predictions to be made before the actions actually take place. We design an evaluation procedure for methods designed to address this novel task, and compare several baselines on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 dataset. Experiments show that the performance of current models designed for trimmed action anticipation is very limited and more research on this task is required.
summary: Egocentric action anticipation consists in predicting a future action the camera wearer will perform from egocentric video. While the task has recently attracted the attention of the research community, current approaches assume that the input videos are "trimmed", meaning that a short video sequence is sampled a fixed time before the beginning of the action. We argue that, despite the recent advances in the field, trimmed action anticipation has a limited applicability in real-world scenarios where it is important to deal with "untrimmed" video inputs and it cannot be assumed that the exact moment in which the action will begin is known at test time. To overcome such limitations, we propose an untrimmed action anticipation task, which, similarly to temporal action detection, assumes that the input video is untrimmed at test time, while still requiring predictions to be made before the actions actually take place. We design an evaluation procedure for methods designed to address this novel task, and compare several baselines on the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 dataset. Experiments show that the performance of current models designed for trimmed action anticipation is very limited and more research on this task is required.
abstract_zh: 以自我为中心的动作预期包括根据以自我为中心的视频预测相机佩戴者未来将执行的动作。虽然该任务最近引起了研究界的关注，但当前的方法假设输入视频被“修剪”，这意味着在动作开始之前的固定时间对短视频序列进行采样。我们认为，尽管该领域最近取得了进展，但修剪后的动作预期在现实场景中的适用性有限，在现实场景中，处理“未修剪”的视频输入很重要，并且不能假设在测试时已知动作开始的确切时刻。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种未经修剪的动作预期任务，与时间动作检测类似，假设输入视频在测试时未经修剪，同时仍然需要在动作实际发生之前进行预测。我们为旨在解决这一新任务的方法设计了一个评估程序，并比较了 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 数据集上的几个基线。实验表明，当前为修剪动作预期而设计的模型的性能非常有限，需要对此任务进行更多研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的任务——非剪辑动作预判，旨在从非剪辑的视角视频中预测摄像机佩戴者即将执行的动作，无需预先知道动作开始时间。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设输入视频为剪辑过的（即动作开始前固定时间采样），但实际场景中视频往往是非剪辑的且动作开始时间未知，导致现有方法适用性受限。
AI.method: 设计非剪辑动作预判任务，借鉴时序动作检测框架，构建评估流程并在EPIC-KITCHENS-100数据集上对比多种基线方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，针对剪辑视频设计的现有模型在非剪辑场景下表现显著不足，凸显该任务的研究必要性。
AI.conclusion: 非剪辑动作预判是更具现实意义的挑战，需进一步研究适应非剪辑输入的模型与方法。

authors_text: Achraf Bahamou,Donald Goldfarb,Yi Ren
title: A Mini-Block Fisher Method for Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络的迷你块 Fisher 方法
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are currently predominantly trained using first-order methods. Some of these methods (e.g., Adam, AdaGrad, and RMSprop, and their variants) incorporate a small amount of curvature information by using a diagonal matrix to precondition the stochastic gradient. Recently, effective second-order methods, such as KFAC, K-BFGS, Shampoo, and TNT, have been developed for training DNNs, by preconditioning the stochastic gradient by layer-wise block-diagonal matrices. Here we propose a "mini-block Fisher (MBF)" preconditioned gradient method, that lies in between these two classes of methods. Specifically, our method uses a block-diagonal approximation to the empirical Fisher matrix, where for each layer in the DNN, whether it is convolutional or feed-forward and fully connected, the associated diagonal block is itself block-diagonal and is composed of a large number of mini-blocks of modest size. Our novel approach utilizes the parallelism of GPUs to efficiently perform computations on the large number of matrices in each layer. Consequently, MBF's per-iteration computational cost is only slightly higher than it is for first-order methods. The performance of our proposed method is compared to that of several baseline methods, on both autoencoder and CNN problems, to validate its effectiveness both in terms of time efficiency and generalization power. Finally, it is proved that an idealized version of MBF converges linearly.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are currently predominantly trained using first-order methods. Some of these methods (e.g., Adam, AdaGrad, and RMSprop, and their variants) incorporate a small amount of curvature information by using a diagonal matrix to precondition the stochastic gradient. Recently, effective second-order methods, such as KFAC, K-BFGS, Shampoo, and TNT, have been developed for training DNNs, by preconditioning the stochastic gradient by layer-wise block-diagonal matrices. Here we propose a "mini-block Fisher (MBF)" preconditioned gradient method, that lies in between these two classes of methods. Specifically, our method uses a block-diagonal approximation to the empirical Fisher matrix, where for each layer in the DNN, whether it is convolutional or feed-forward and fully connected, the associated diagonal block is itself block-diagonal and is composed of a large number of mini-blocks of modest size. Our novel approach utilizes the parallelism of GPUs to efficiently perform computations on the large number of matrices in each layer. Consequently, MBF's per-iteration computational cost is only slightly higher than it is for first-order methods. The performance of our proposed method is compared to that of several baseline methods, on both autoencoder and CNN problems, to validate its effectiveness both in terms of time efficiency and generalization power. Finally, it is proved that an idealized version of MBF converges linearly.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 目前主要使用一阶方法进行训练。其中一些方法（例如 Adam、AdaGrad 和 RMSprop 及其变体）通过使用对角矩阵来预处理随机梯度，从而合并少量曲率信息。最近，通过分层块对角矩阵预处理随机梯度，已经开发出有效的二阶方法，例如 KFAC、K-BFGS、Shampoo 和 TNT，用于训练 DNN。在这里，我们提出了一种介于这两类方法之间的“迷你块 Fisher (MBF)”预处理梯度方法。具体来说，我们的方法使用经验 Fisher 矩阵的块对角近似，其中对于 DNN 中的每一层，无论是卷积层还是前馈层和全连接层，相关的对角块本身都是块对角的，并且由大量适度大小的迷你块组成。我们的新颖方法利用 GPU 的并行性来有效地对每层中的大量矩阵执行计算。因此，MBF 的每次迭代计算成本仅略高于一阶方法。我们提出的方法的性能与几种基线方法在自动编码器和 CNN 问题上的性能进行了比较，以验证其在时间效率和泛化能力方面的有效性。最后，证明了MBF的理想化版本是线性收敛的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'微型块费舍尔（MBF）'的预处理梯度方法，用于深度神经网络的训练。
AI.motivation: 传统一阶优化方法（如Adam）计算效率高但缺乏曲率信息，而二阶方法（如KFAC）虽效果更好但计算成本高。本文旨在提出一种折中方案，兼顾效率与性能。
AI.method: 通过层-wise块对角矩阵近似经验费舍尔矩阵，每个层的对角块进一步划分为大量小型块，并利用GPU并行计算提升效率。
AI.result: 在自编码器和CNN任务中，MBF在时间效率和泛化能力上优于基线方法，且理想化MBF被证明具有线性收敛性。
AI.conclusion: MBF方法在计算成本与优化效果之间取得了平衡，为深度网络训练提供了新的有效方案。

search_text: A Mini-Block Fisher Method for Deep Neural Networks 深度神经网络的迷你块 Fisher 方法 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are currently predominantly trained using first-order methods. Some of these methods (e.g., Adam, AdaGrad, and RMSprop, and their variants) incorporate a small amount of curvature information by using a diagonal matrix to precondition the stochastic gradient. Recently, effective second-order methods, such as KFAC, K-BFGS, Shampoo, and TNT, have been developed for training DNNs, by preconditioning the stochastic gradient by layer-wise block-diagonal matrices. Here we propose a "mini-block Fisher (MBF)" preconditioned gradient method, that lies in between these two classes of methods. Specifically, our method uses a block-diagonal approximation to the empirical Fisher matrix, where for each layer in the DNN, whether it is convolutional or feed-forward and fully connected, the associated diagonal block is itself block-diagonal and is composed of a large number of mini-blocks of modest size. Our novel approach utilizes the parallelism of GPUs to efficiently perform computations on the large number of matrices in each layer. Consequently, MBF's per-iteration computational cost is only slightly higher than it is for first-order methods. The performance of our proposed method is compared to that of several baseline methods, on both autoencoder and CNN problems, to validate its effectiveness both in terms of time efficiency and generalization power. Finally, it is proved that an idealized version of MBF converges linearly. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 目前主要使用一阶方法进行训练。其中一些方法（例如 Adam、AdaGrad 和 RMSprop 及其变体）通过使用对角矩阵来预处理随机梯度，从而合并少量曲率信息。最近，通过分层块对角矩阵预处理随机梯度，已经开发出有效的二阶方法，例如 KFAC、K-BFGS、Shampoo 和 TNT，用于训练 DNN。在这里，我们提出了一种介于这两类方法之间的“迷你块 Fisher (MBF)”预处理梯度方法。具体来说，我们的方法使用经验 Fisher 矩阵的块对角近似，其中对于 DNN 中的每一层，无论是卷积层还是前馈层和全连接层，相关的对角块本身都是块对角的，并且由大量适度大小的迷你块组成。我们的新颖方法利用 GPU 的并行性来有效地对每层中的大量矩阵执行计算。因此，MBF 的每次迭代计算成本仅略高于一阶方法。我们提出的方法的性能与几种基线方法在自动编码器和 CNN 问题上的性能进行了比较，以验证其在时间效率和泛化能力方面的有效性。最后，证明了MBF的理想化版本是线性收敛的。 本文提出了一种名为'微型块费舍尔（MBF）'的预处理梯度方法，用于深度神经网络的训练。 Achraf Bahamou,Donald Goldfarb,Yi Ren cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Muhammad Asam,Saddam Hussain Khan,Tauseef Jamal,Asifullah Khan
title: IoT Malware Detection Architecture using a Novel Channel Boosted and Squeezed CNN
title_zh: 使用新型通道增强和压缩 CNN 的物联网恶意软件检测架构
abstract: Interaction between devices, people, and the Internet has given birth to a new digital communication model, the Internet of Things (IoT). The seamless network of these smart devices is the core of this IoT model. However, on the other hand, integrating smart devices to constitute a network introduces many security challenges. These connected devices have created a security blind spot, where cybercriminals can easily launch an attack to compromise the devices using malware proliferation techniques. Therefore, malware detection is considered a lifeline for the survival of IoT devices against cyberattacks. This study proposes a novel IoT Malware Detection Architecture (iMDA) using squeezing and boosting dilated convolutional neural network (CNN). The proposed architecture exploits the concepts of edge and smoothing, multi-path dilated convolutional operations, channel squeezing, and boosting in CNN. Edge and smoothing operations are employed with split-transform-merge (STM) blocks to extract local structure and minor contrast variation in the malware images. STM blocks performed multi-path dilated convolutional operations, which helped recognize the global structure of malware patterns. Additionally, channel squeezing and merging helped to get the prominent reduced and diverse feature maps, respectively. Channel squeezing and boosting are applied with the help of STM block at the initial, middle and final levels to capture the texture variation along with the depth for the sake of malware pattern hunting. The proposed architecture has shown substantial performance compared with the customized CNN models. The proposed iMDA has achieved Accuracy: 97.93%, F1-Score: 0.9394, Precision: 0.9864, MCC: 0. 8796, Recall: 0.8873, AUC-PR: 0.9689 and AUC-ROC: 0.9938.
summary: Interaction between devices, people, and the Internet has given birth to a new digital communication model, the Internet of Things (IoT). The seamless network of these smart devices is the core of this IoT model. However, on the other hand, integrating smart devices to constitute a network introduces many security challenges. These connected devices have created a security blind spot, where cybercriminals can easily launch an attack to compromise the devices using malware proliferation techniques. Therefore, malware detection is considered a lifeline for the survival of IoT devices against cyberattacks. This study proposes a novel IoT Malware Detection Architecture (iMDA) using squeezing and boosting dilated convolutional neural network (CNN). The proposed architecture exploits the concepts of edge and smoothing, multi-path dilated convolutional operations, channel squeezing, and boosting in CNN. Edge and smoothing operations are employed with split-transform-merge (STM) blocks to extract local structure and minor contrast variation in the malware images. STM blocks performed multi-path dilated convolutional operations, which helped recognize the global structure of malware patterns. Additionally, channel squeezing and merging helped to get the prominent reduced and diverse feature maps, respectively. Channel squeezing and boosting are applied with the help of STM block at the initial, middle and final levels to capture the texture variation along with the depth for the sake of malware pattern hunting. The proposed architecture has shown substantial performance compared with the customized CNN models. The proposed iMDA has achieved Accuracy: 97.93%, F1-Score: 0.9394, Precision: 0.9864, MCC: 0. 8796, Recall: 0.8873, AUC-PR: 0.9689 and AUC-ROC: 0.9938.
abstract_zh: 设备、人与互联网之间的交互催生了一种新的数字通信模式：物联网 (IoT)。这些智能设备的无缝网络是该物联网模型的核心。然而，另一方面，集成智能设备构成网络也带来了许多安全挑战。这些连接的设备造成了安全盲点，网络犯罪分子可以利用恶意软件扩散技术轻松发起攻击以破坏设备。因此，恶意软件检测被认为是物联网设备抵御网络攻击的生命线。本研究提出了一种使用压缩和增强扩张卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的新型物联网恶意软件检测架构 (iMDA)。所提出的架构利用了 CNN 中的边缘和平滑、多路径扩张卷积运算、通道压缩和增强的概念。边缘和平滑操作与分割-变换-合并 (STM) 块一起使用，以提取恶意软件图像中的局部结构和微小对比度变化。 STM 块执行多路径扩张卷积运算，这有助于识别恶意软件模式的全局结构。此外，通道压缩和合并分别有助于获得突出的简化和多样化的特征图。在初始、中间和最终级别的 STM 块的帮助下应用通道压缩和增强，以捕获纹理变化和深度，以便进行恶意软件模式搜索。与定制的 CNN 模型相比，所提出的架构显示出了显着的性能。所提出的 iMDA 已实现准确率：97.93%、F1-Score：0.9394、精度：0.9864、MCC：0. 8796、召回率：0.8873、AUC-PR：0.9689 和 AUC-ROC：0.9938。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进卷积神经网络（CNN）的物联网（IoT）恶意软件检测架构iMDA，旨在提升恶意软件识别的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备的广泛连接带来了新的安全威胁，传统检测方法难以应对恶意软件的复杂性，需设计更高效的检测模型以保障IoT安全。
AI.method: 结合边缘提取与平滑操作、多路径空洞卷积、通道压缩与增强技术，通过STM模块分层提取局部结构与全局特征，优化特征图多样性与纹理信息捕捉能力。
AI.result: 在测试中，iMDA达到97.93%的准确率、0.9394的F1分数、0.9864的精确率及0.9938的AUC-ROC值，显著优于定制化CNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过创新的通道增强与多尺度特征提取机制，有效提升了IoT恶意软件检测性能，为物联网安全防护提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yun-Cheng Tsai,Fu-Min Szu,Jun-Hao Chen,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen
title: Financial Vision Based Reinforcement Learning Trading Strategy
title_zh: 基于金融愿景的强化学习交易策略
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.07715
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.07715
abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) for quantitative trading have led to its general superhuman performance in significant trading performance. However, the potential risk of AI trading is a "black box" decision. Some AI computing mechanisms are complex and challenging to understand. If we use AI without proper supervision, AI may lead to wrong choices and make huge losses. Hence, we need to ask about the AI "black box", including why did AI decide to do this or not? Why can people trust AI or not? How can people fix their mistakes? These problems also highlight the challenges that AI technology can explain in the trading field.
summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) for quantitative trading have led to its general superhuman performance in significant trading performance. However, the potential risk of AI trading is a "black box" decision. Some AI computing mechanisms are complex and challenging to understand. If we use AI without proper supervision, AI may lead to wrong choices and make huge losses. Hence, we need to ask about the AI "black box", including why did AI decide to do this or not? Why can people trust AI or not? How can people fix their mistakes? These problems also highlight the challenges that AI technology can explain in the trading field.
abstract_zh: 量化交易人工智能（AI）的最新进展使其在显着的交易表现中表现出普遍超人的表现。然而，人工智能交易的潜在风险是“黑匣子”决策。一些人工智能计算机制非常复杂且难以理解。如果我们在没有适当监督的情况下使用人工智能，人工智能可能会导致错误的选择并造成巨大的损失。因此，我们需要询问人工智能的“黑匣子”，包括人工智能为什么决定这样做或不这样做？人们为什么可以信任人工智能，或者不信任人工智能？人们怎样才能改正自己的错误呢？这些问题也凸显了人工智能技术在交易领域所能解释的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合金融视觉与强化学习的交易策略，旨在解决AI交易中的可解释性问题。
AI.motivation: AI交易虽表现优异，但其决策过程复杂且缺乏透明度，可能导致不可控风险与信任危机。
AI.method: 融合金融视觉分析与强化学习框架，通过可视化决策路径增强AI交易策略的可解释性。
AI.result: 构建了可解释的AI交易模型，验证其在降低决策风险与提升用户信任度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性是AI交易落地的关键，未来需进一步平衡模型性能与透明度需求。

search_text: Financial Vision Based Reinforcement Learning Trading Strategy 基于金融愿景的强化学习交易策略 Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) for quantitative trading have led to its general superhuman performance in significant trading performance. However, the potential risk of AI trading is a "black box" decision. Some AI computing mechanisms are complex and challenging to understand. If we use AI without proper supervision, AI may lead to wrong choices and make huge losses. Hence, we need to ask about the AI "black box", including why did AI decide to do this or not? Why can people trust AI or not? How can people fix their mistakes? These problems also highlight the challenges that AI technology can explain in the trading field. 量化交易人工智能（AI）的最新进展使其在显着的交易表现中表现出普遍超人的表现。然而，人工智能交易的潜在风险是“黑匣子”决策。一些人工智能计算机制非常复杂且难以理解。如果我们在没有适当监督的情况下使用人工智能，人工智能可能会导致错误的选择并造成巨大的损失。因此，我们需要询问人工智能的“黑匣子”，包括人工智能为什么决定这样做或不这样做？人们为什么可以信任人工智能，或者不信任人工智能？人们怎样才能改正自己的错误呢？这些问题也凸显了人工智能技术在交易领域所能解释的挑战。 本文提出一种结合金融视觉与强化学习的交易策略，旨在解决AI交易中的可解释性问题。 Yun-Cheng Tsai,Fu-Min Szu,Jun-Hao Chen,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen cs.AI,cs.CE,cs.LG

authors_text: Yue Song,Hao Tang,Nicu Sebe,Wei Wang
title: Disentangle Saliency Detection into Cascaded Detail Modeling and Body Filling
title_zh: 将显着性检测分解为级联细节建模和身体填充
comment: Accepted by TOMM; the first two authors contribute equally to this work
comments: Accepted by TOMM; the first two authors contribute equally to this work
abstract: Salient object detection has been long studied to identify the most visually attractive objects in images/videos. Recently, a growing amount of approaches have been proposed all of which rely on the contour/edge information to improve detection performance. The edge labels are either put into the loss directly or used as extra supervision. The edge and body can also be learned separately and then fused afterward. Both methods either lead to high prediction errors near the edge or cannot be trained in an end-to-end manner. Another problem is that existing methods may fail to detect objects of various sizes due to the lack of efficient and effective feature fusion mechanisms. In this work, we propose to decompose the saliency detection task into two cascaded sub-tasks, \emph{i.e.}, detail modeling and body filling. Specifically, the detail modeling focuses on capturing the object edges by supervision of explicitly decomposed detail label that consists of the pixels that are nested on the edge and near the edge. Then the body filling learns the body part which will be filled into the detail map to generate more accurate saliency map. To effectively fuse the features and handle objects at different scales, we have also proposed two novel multi-scale detail attention and body attention blocks for precise detail and body modeling. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on six public datasets.
summary: Salient object detection has been long studied to identify the most visually attractive objects in images/videos. Recently, a growing amount of approaches have been proposed all of which rely on the contour/edge information to improve detection performance. The edge labels are either put into the loss directly or used as extra supervision. The edge and body can also be learned separately and then fused afterward. Both methods either lead to high prediction errors near the edge or cannot be trained in an end-to-end manner. Another problem is that existing methods may fail to detect objects of various sizes due to the lack of efficient and effective feature fusion mechanisms. In this work, we propose to decompose the saliency detection task into two cascaded sub-tasks, \emph{i.e.}, detail modeling and body filling. Specifically, the detail modeling focuses on capturing the object edges by supervision of explicitly decomposed detail label that consists of the pixels that are nested on the edge and near the edge. Then the body filling learns the body part which will be filled into the detail map to generate more accurate saliency map. To effectively fuse the features and handle objects at different scales, we have also proposed two novel multi-scale detail attention and body attention blocks for precise detail and body modeling. Experimental results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performances on six public datasets.
abstract_zh: 显着对象检测长期以来一直在研究，以识别图像/视频中最具视觉吸引力的对象。最近，人们提出了越来越多的方法，所有这些方法都依赖于轮廓/边缘信息来提高检测性能。边缘标签要么直接放入损失中，要么用作额外的监督。边缘和主体也可以单独学习，然后再融合。这两种方法要么导致边缘附近的预测误差较高，要么无法以端到端的方式进行训练。另一个问题是，由于缺乏高效有效的特征融合机制，现有方法可能无法检测各种尺寸的物体。在这项工作中，我们建议将显着性检测任务分解为两个级联子任务，即细节建模和身体填充。具体来说，细节建模侧重于通过监督显式分解的细节标签来捕获对象边缘，该细节标签由嵌套在边缘上和边缘附近的像素组成。然后身体填充学习身体部位，将其填充到细节图中以生成更准确的显着性图。为了有效地融合特征并处理不同尺度的对象，我们还提出了两种新颖的多尺度细节注意和身体注意模块，用于精确的细节和身体建模。实验结果表明，我们的方法在六个公共数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将显著性检测任务分解为级联的细节建模和主体填充两个子任务，以提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖边缘信息但存在边缘预测误差大、无法端到端训练及多尺度特征融合不足的问题，导致对不同尺寸目标检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过级联细节建模（提取边缘细节）和主体填充（生成主体区域）两个阶段，结合多尺度细节注意力和主体注意力模块实现特征融合。
AI.result: 在六个公开数据集上达到最先进的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 级联子任务分解与多尺度注意力机制有效解决了边缘精度与多尺度融合难题，提升了显著性检测效果。

authors_text: Guangyao Zhou,Antoine Dedieu,Nishanth Kumar,Wolfgang Lehrach,Miguel Lázaro-Gredilla,Shrinu Kushagra,Dileep George
title: PGMax: Factor Graphs for Discrete Probabilistic Graphical Models and Loopy Belief Propagation in JAX
title_zh: PGMax：JAX 中离散概率图形模型和循环置信传播的因子图
abstract: PGMax is an open-source Python package for (a) easily specifying discrete Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) as factor graphs; and (b) automatically running efficient and scalable loopy belief propagation (LBP) in JAX. PGMax supports general factor graphs with tractable factors, and leverages modern accelerators like GPUs for inference. Compared with existing alternatives, PGMax obtains higher-quality inference results with up to three orders-of-magnitude inference time speedups. PGMax additionally interacts seamlessly with the rapidly growing JAX ecosystem, opening up new research possibilities. Our source code, examples and documentation are available at https://github.com/deepmind/PGMax.
summary: PGMax is an open-source Python package for (a) easily specifying discrete Probabilistic Graphical Models (PGMs) as factor graphs; and (b) automatically running efficient and scalable loopy belief propagation (LBP) in JAX. PGMax supports general factor graphs with tractable factors, and leverages modern accelerators like GPUs for inference. Compared with existing alternatives, PGMax obtains higher-quality inference results with up to three orders-of-magnitude inference time speedups. PGMax additionally interacts seamlessly with the rapidly growing JAX ecosystem, opening up new research possibilities. Our source code, examples and documentation are available at https://github.com/deepmind/PGMax.
abstract_zh: PGMax 是一个开源 Python 包，用于 (a) 轻松地将离散概率图形模型 (PGM) 指定为因子图； (b) 在 JAX 中自动运行高效且可扩展的循环置信传播 (LBP)。 PGMax 支持具有易处理因子的一般因子图，并利用 GPU 等现代加速器进行推理。与现有替代方案相比，PGMax 获得了更高质量的推理结果，推理时间加速最多三个数量级。 PGMax 此外还与快速发展的 JAX 生态系统无缝交互，开辟了新的研究可能性。我们的源代码、示例和文档可在 https://github.com/deepmind/PGMax 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为PGMax的开源Python工具包，用于通过因子图表示离散概率图模型，并在JAX中实现高效的循环信念传播算法。
AI.motivation: 现有工具在处理离散概率图模型时存在推理效率低、可扩展性差的问题，且难以充分利用现代GPU加速器的性能。
AI.method: 基于因子图框架设计可扩展的离散概率图模型表示，结合JAX的自动微分和GPU加速能力实现循环信念传播算法，并与JAX生态系统深度集成。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，PGMax在保持推理质量的同时实现最高达三个数量级的加速，并通过实际案例验证了其在复杂模型中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PGMax为概率图模型研究提供了高效且易用的工具，通过结合现代硬件加速与JAX生态，推动了该领域的新研究方向。

authors_text: Constantino Álvarez Casado,Miguel Bordallo López
title: Face2PPG: An unsupervised pipeline for blood volume pulse extraction from faces
title_zh: Face2PPG：用于从面部提取血量脉冲的无监督管道
abstract: Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals have become a key technology in many fields, such as medicine, well-being, or sports. Our work proposes a set of pipelines to extract remote PPG signals (rPPG) from the face robustly, reliably, and configurable. We identify and evaluate the possible choices in the critical steps of unsupervised rPPG methodologies. We assess a state-of-the-art processing pipeline in six different datasets, incorporating important corrections in the methodology that ensure reproducible and fair comparisons. In addition, we extend the pipeline by proposing three novel ideas; 1) a new method to stabilize the detected face based on a rigid mesh normalization; 2) a new method to dynamically select the different regions in the face that provide the best raw signals, and 3) a new RGB to rPPG transformation method, called Orthogonal Matrix Image Transformation (OMIT) based on QR decomposition, that increases robustness against compression artifacts. We show that all three changes introduce noticeable improvements in retrieving rPPG signals from faces, obtaining state-of-the-art results compared with unsupervised, non-learning-based methodologies and, in some databases, very close to supervised, learning-based methods. We perform a comparative study to quantify the contribution of each proposed idea. In addition, we depict a series of observations that could help in future implementations.
summary: Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals have become a key technology in many fields, such as medicine, well-being, or sports. Our work proposes a set of pipelines to extract remote PPG signals (rPPG) from the face robustly, reliably, and configurable. We identify and evaluate the possible choices in the critical steps of unsupervised rPPG methodologies. We assess a state-of-the-art processing pipeline in six different datasets, incorporating important corrections in the methodology that ensure reproducible and fair comparisons. In addition, we extend the pipeline by proposing three novel ideas; 1) a new method to stabilize the detected face based on a rigid mesh normalization; 2) a new method to dynamically select the different regions in the face that provide the best raw signals, and 3) a new RGB to rPPG transformation method, called Orthogonal Matrix Image Transformation (OMIT) based on QR decomposition, that increases robustness against compression artifacts. We show that all three changes introduce noticeable improvements in retrieving rPPG signals from faces, obtaining state-of-the-art results compared with unsupervised, non-learning-based methodologies and, in some databases, very close to supervised, learning-based methods. We perform a comparative study to quantify the contribution of each proposed idea. In addition, we depict a series of observations that could help in future implementations.
abstract_zh: 光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号已成为医学、健康或体育等许多领域的关键技术。我们的工作提出了一组管道，用于从面部稳健、可靠且可配置地提取远程 PPG 信号 (rPPG)。我们确定并评估无监督 rPPG 方法的关键步骤中的可能选择。我们在六个不同的数据集中评估了最先进的处理流程，对方法进行了重要修正，以确保可重复和公平的比较。此外，我们还提出了三个新颖的想法来扩展管道； 1）基于刚性网格归一化稳定检测到的人脸的新方法； 2) 一种动态选择面部不同区域以提供最佳原始信号的新方法，以及 3) 一种新的 RGB 到 rPPG 转换方法，称为基于 QR 分解的正交矩阵图像转换 (OMIT)，可提高针对压缩伪影的鲁棒性。我们表明，所有这三个变化在从面部检索 rPPG 信号方面都带来了显着的改进，与无监督的、基于非学习的方法相比，获得了最先进的结果，并且在一些数据库中，与有监督的、基于学习的方法非常接近。我们进行比较研究来量化每个提出的想法的贡献。此外，我们描述了一系列可能有助于未来实施的观察结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督的面部血容量脉冲信号提取管道，通过改进方法提升远程PPG信号的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: PPG信号在医疗和健康领域至关重要，但现有无监督方法存在稳定性差、依赖标注数据等问题，需开发更可靠且无需监督的解决方案。
AI.method: 评估现有无监督rPPG方法，提出三项改进：1) 基于刚性网格归一化的面部稳定化方法；2) 动态选择最佳面部区域的信号提取；3) 基于QR分解的正交矩阵图像变换（OMIT）方法。
AI.result: 改进方法在六大数据集上取得优于无监督方法且接近监督方法的性能，通过对比实验验证了各改进项的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法显著提升面部rPPG信号提取效果，为无监督远程生理信号监测提供了可靠框架，并为未来研究提供参考方向。

search_text: Face2PPG: An unsupervised pipeline for blood volume pulse extraction from faces Face2PPG：用于从面部提取血量脉冲的无监督管道 Photoplethysmography (PPG) signals have become a key technology in many fields, such as medicine, well-being, or sports. Our work proposes a set of pipelines to extract remote PPG signals (rPPG) from the face robustly, reliably, and configurable. We identify and evaluate the possible choices in the critical steps of unsupervised rPPG methodologies. We assess a state-of-the-art processing pipeline in six different datasets, incorporating important corrections in the methodology that ensure reproducible and fair comparisons. In addition, we extend the pipeline by proposing three novel ideas; 1) a new method to stabilize the detected face based on a rigid mesh normalization; 2) a new method to dynamically select the different regions in the face that provide the best raw signals, and 3) a new RGB to rPPG transformation method, called Orthogonal Matrix Image Transformation (OMIT) based on QR decomposition, that increases robustness against compression artifacts. We show that all three changes introduce noticeable improvements in retrieving rPPG signals from faces, obtaining state-of-the-art results compared with unsupervised, non-learning-based methodologies and, in some databases, very close to supervised, learning-based methods. We perform a comparative study to quantify the contribution of each proposed idea. In addition, we depict a series of observations that could help in future implementations. 光电体积描记法 (PPG) 信号已成为医学、健康或体育等许多领域的关键技术。我们的工作提出了一组管道，用于从面部稳健、可靠且可配置地提取远程 PPG 信号 (rPPG)。我们确定并评估无监督 rPPG 方法的关键步骤中的可能选择。我们在六个不同的数据集中评估了最先进的处理流程，对方法进行了重要修正，以确保可重复和公平的比较。此外，我们还提出了三个新颖的想法来扩展管道； 1）基于刚性网格归一化稳定检测到的人脸的新方法； 2) 一种动态选择面部不同区域以提供最佳原始信号的新方法，以及 3) 一种新的 RGB 到 rPPG 转换方法，称为基于 QR 分解的正交矩阵图像转换 (OMIT)，可提高针对压缩伪影的鲁棒性。我们表明，所有这三个变化在从面部检索 rPPG 信号方面都带来了显着的改进，与无监督的、基于非学习的方法相比，获得了最先进的结果，并且在一些数据库中，与有监督的、基于学习的方法非常接近。我们进行比较研究来量化每个提出的想法的贡献。此外，我们描述了一系列可能有助于未来实施的观察结果。 本文提出一种无监督的面部血容量脉冲信号提取管道，通过改进方法提升远程PPG信号的鲁棒性和准确性。 Constantino Álvarez Casado,Miguel Bordallo López cs.CV

authors_text: Chacha Chen,Shi Feng,Amit Sharma,Chenhao Tan
title: Machine Explanations and Human Understanding
title_zh: 机器解释和人类理解
abstract: Explanations are hypothesized to improve human understanding of machine learning models and achieve a variety of desirable outcomes, ranging from model debugging to enhancing human decision making. However, empirical studies have found mixed and even negative results. An open question, therefore, is under what conditions explanations can improve human understanding and in what way. Using adapted causal diagrams, we provide a formal characterization of the interplay between machine explanations and human understanding, and show how human intuitions play a central role in enabling human understanding. Specifically, we identify three core concepts of interest that cover all existing quantitative measures of understanding in the context of human-AI decision making: task decision boundary, model decision boundary, and model error. Our key result is that without assumptions about task-specific intuitions, explanations may potentially improve human understanding of model decision boundary, but they cannot improve human understanding of task decision boundary or model error. To achieve complementary human-AI performance, we articulate possible ways on how explanations need to work with human intuitions. For instance, human intuitions about the relevance of features (e.g., education is more important than age in predicting a person's income) can be critical in detecting model error. We validate the importance of human intuitions in shaping the outcome of machine explanations with empirical human-subject studies. Overall, our work provides a general framework along with actionable implications for future algorithmic development and empirical experiments of machine explanations.
summary: Explanations are hypothesized to improve human understanding of machine learning models and achieve a variety of desirable outcomes, ranging from model debugging to enhancing human decision making. However, empirical studies have found mixed and even negative results. An open question, therefore, is under what conditions explanations can improve human understanding and in what way. Using adapted causal diagrams, we provide a formal characterization of the interplay between machine explanations and human understanding, and show how human intuitions play a central role in enabling human understanding. Specifically, we identify three core concepts of interest that cover all existing quantitative measures of understanding in the context of human-AI decision making: task decision boundary, model decision boundary, and model error. Our key result is that without assumptions about task-specific intuitions, explanations may potentially improve human understanding of model decision boundary, but they cannot improve human understanding of task decision boundary or model error. To achieve complementary human-AI performance, we articulate possible ways on how explanations need to work with human intuitions. For instance, human intuitions about the relevance of features (e.g., education is more important than age in predicting a person's income) can be critical in detecting model error. We validate the importance of human intuitions in shaping the outcome of machine explanations with empirical human-subject studies. Overall, our work provides a general framework along with actionable implications for future algorithmic development and empirical experiments of machine explanations.
abstract_zh: 假设的解释是为了提高人类对机器学习模型的理解并实现各种理想的结果，从模型调试到增强人类决策。然而，实证研究发现结果好坏参半，甚至是负面的。因此，一个悬而未决的问题是，解释在什么条件下以及以什么方式可以提高人类的理解。使用适应的因果图，我们提供了机器解释和人类理解之间相互作用的正式表征，并展示了人类直觉如何在实现人类理解中发挥核心作用。具体来说，我们确定了三个感兴趣的核心概念，涵盖了人类人工智能决策背景下所有现有的定量理解度量：任务决策边界、模型决策边界和模型误差。我们的主要结果是，如果不假设特定于任务的直觉，解释可能会改善人类对模型决策边界的理解，但无法改善人类对任务决策边界或模型错误的理解。为了实现人类与人工智能性能的互补，我们阐明了解释如何与人类直觉相结合的可能方法。例如，人类对特征相关性的直觉（例如，在预测一个人的收入时，教育程度比年龄更重要）对于检测模型错误至关重要。我们通过实证人类受试者研究验证了人类直觉在塑造机器解释结果方面的重要性。总的来说，我们的工作提供了一个总体框架以及对未来算法开发和机器解释的实证实验的可行影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器解释如何影响人类对AI决策的理解，并建立理论框架分析其作用条件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示机器解释对提升人类理解的效果不一致，需明确解释在何种条件下有效及如何与人类直觉协同。
AI.method: 通过因果图形式化分析机器解释与人类理解的交互机制，并结合人类受试者实证研究验证理论。
AI.result: 解释在无任务直觉前提下仅能提升模型决策边界理解，无法改善任务边界或模型错误认知，人类特征相关性直觉对检测模型错误至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 提出需结合人类直觉的解释设计框架，为算法开发和实验设计提供理论指导。

authors_text: Zhigang Tu,Jiaxu Zhang,Hongyan Li,Yujin Chen,Junsong Yuan
title: Joint-bone Fusion Graph Convolutional Network for Semi-supervised Skeleton Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于半监督骨骼动作识别的关节骨融合图卷积网络
abstract: In recent years, graph convolutional networks (GCNs) play an increasingly critical role in skeleton-based human action recognition. However, most GCN-based methods still have two main limitations: 1) They only consider the motion information of the joints or process the joints and bones separately, which are unable to fully explore the latent functional correlation between joints and bones for action recognition. 2) Most of these works are performed in the supervised learning way, which heavily relies on massive labeled training data. To address these issues, we propose a semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition method which has been rarely exploited before. We design a novel correlation-driven joint-bone fusion graph convolutional network (CD-JBF-GCN) as an encoder and use a pose prediction head as a decoder to achieve semi-supervised learning. Specifically, the CD-JBF-GC can explore the motion transmission between the joint stream and the bone stream, so that promoting both streams to learn more discriminative feature representations. The pose prediction based auto-encoder in the self-supervised training stage allows the network to learn motion representation from unlabeled data, which is essential for action recognition. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets, i.e. NTU-RGB+D and Kinetics-Skeleton, demonstrate that our model achieves the state-of-the-art performance for semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition and is also useful for fully-supervised methods.
summary: In recent years, graph convolutional networks (GCNs) play an increasingly critical role in skeleton-based human action recognition. However, most GCN-based methods still have two main limitations: 1) They only consider the motion information of the joints or process the joints and bones separately, which are unable to fully explore the latent functional correlation between joints and bones for action recognition. 2) Most of these works are performed in the supervised learning way, which heavily relies on massive labeled training data. To address these issues, we propose a semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition method which has been rarely exploited before. We design a novel correlation-driven joint-bone fusion graph convolutional network (CD-JBF-GCN) as an encoder and use a pose prediction head as a decoder to achieve semi-supervised learning. Specifically, the CD-JBF-GC can explore the motion transmission between the joint stream and the bone stream, so that promoting both streams to learn more discriminative feature representations. The pose prediction based auto-encoder in the self-supervised training stage allows the network to learn motion representation from unlabeled data, which is essential for action recognition. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets, i.e. NTU-RGB+D and Kinetics-Skeleton, demonstrate that our model achieves the state-of-the-art performance for semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition and is also useful for fully-supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图卷积网络（GCN）在基于骨架的人体动作识别中发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，大多数基于GCN的方法仍然存在两个主要局限性：1）它们只考虑关节的运动信息或分别处理关节和骨骼，无法充分探索关节和骨骼之间潜在的功能相关性以进行动作识别。 2）这些工作大部分都是以监督学习的方式进行的，严重依赖于海量标记的训练数据。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于半监督骨架的动作识别方法，该方法以前很少被利用。我们设计了一种新颖的相关驱动的关节骨融合图卷积网络（CD-JBF-GCN）作为编码器，并使用姿态预测头作为解码器来实现半监督学习。具体来说，CD-JBF-GC可以探索关节流和骨骼流之间的运动传输，从而促进这两个流学习更多有区别的特征表示。自监督训练阶段基于姿势预测的自动编码器允许网络从未标记的数据中学习运动表示，这对于动作识别至关重要。对两个流行数据集（即 NTU-RGB+D 和 Kinetics-Skeleton）的大量实验表明，我们的模型实现了半监督基于骨架的动作识别的最先进性能，并且对于全监督方法也很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督骨骼动作识别方法，通过联合骨骼融合图卷积网络（CD-JBF-GCN）解决现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法未能充分挖掘关节与骨骼间的潜在功能关联，且过度依赖大量标注数据，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 设计了基于相关性驱动的关节-骨骼融合图卷积网络（CD-JBF-GCN）作为编码器，并引入姿态预测头作为解码器，通过自监督学习利用未标注数据提升特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在NTU-RGB+D和Kinetics-Skeleton数据集上达到半监督骨骼动作识别的最先进水平，同时对全监督方法也具有提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合建模关节与骨骼信息并结合自监督学习，有效提升了半监督场景下骨骼动作识别的性能。
