search_text: Joint-bone Fusion Graph Convolutional Network for Semi-supervised Skeleton Action Recognition 用于半监督骨骼动作识别的关节骨融合图卷积网络 In recent years, graph convolutional networks (GCNs) play an increasingly critical role in skeleton-based human action recognition. However, most GCN-based methods still have two main limitations: 1) They only consider the motion information of the joints or process the joints and bones separately, which are unable to fully explore the latent functional correlation between joints and bones for action recognition. 2) Most of these works are performed in the supervised learning way, which heavily relies on massive labeled training data. To address these issues, we propose a semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition method which has been rarely exploited before. We design a novel correlation-driven joint-bone fusion graph convolutional network (CD-JBF-GCN) as an encoder and use a pose prediction head as a decoder to achieve semi-supervised learning. Specifically, the CD-JBF-GC can explore the motion transmission between the joint stream and the bone stream, so that promoting both streams to learn more discriminative feature representations. The pose prediction based auto-encoder in the self-supervised training stage allows the network to learn motion representation from unlabeled data, which is essential for action recognition. Extensive experiments on two popular datasets, i.e. NTU-RGB+D and Kinetics-Skeleton, demonstrate that our model achieves the state-of-the-art performance for semi-supervised skeleton-based action recognition and is also useful for fully-supervised methods. 近年来，图卷积网络（GCN）在基于骨架的人体动作识别中发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，大多数基于GCN的方法仍然存在两个主要局限性：1）它们只考虑关节的运动信息或分别处理关节和骨骼，无法充分探索关节和骨骼之间潜在的功能相关性以进行动作识别。 2）这些工作大部分都是以监督学习的方式进行的，严重依赖于海量标记的训练数据。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于半监督骨架的动作识别方法，该方法以前很少被利用。我们设计了一种新颖的相关驱动的关节骨融合图卷积网络（CD-JBF-GCN）作为编码器，并使用姿态预测头作为解码器来实现半监督学习。具体来说，CD-JBF-GC可以探索关节流和骨骼流之间的运动传输，从而促进这两个流学习更多有区别的特征表示。自监督训练阶段基于姿势预测的自动编码器允许网络从未标记的数据中学习运动表示，这对于动作识别至关重要。对两个流行数据集（即 NTU-RGB+D 和 Kinetics-Skeleton）的大量实验表明，我们的模型实现了半监督基于骨架的动作识别的最先进性能，并且对于全监督方法也很有用。 本文提出了一种半监督骨骼动作识别方法，通过联合骨骼融合图卷积网络（CD-JBF-GCN）解决现有方法的不足。 Zhigang Tu,Jiaxu Zhang,Hongyan Li,Yujin Chen,Junsong Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Xinkai Zhao,Chaowei Fang,De-Jun Fan,Xutao Lin,Feng Gao,Guanbin Li
title: Cross-level Contrastive Learning and Consistency Constraint for Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 半监督医学图像分割的跨级对比学习和一致性约束
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL), which aims at leveraging a few labeled images and a large number of unlabeled images for network training, is beneficial for relieving the burden of data annotation in medical image segmentation. According to the experience of medical imaging experts, local attributes such as texture, luster and smoothness are very important factors for identifying target objects like lesions and polyps in medical images. Motivated by this, we propose a cross-level contrastive learning scheme to enhance representation capacity for local features in semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Compared to existing image-wise, patch-wise and point-wise contrastive learning algorithms, our devised method is capable of exploring more complex similarity cues, namely the relational characteristics between global and local patch-wise representations. Additionally, for fully making use of cross-level semantic relations, we devise a novel consistency constraint that compares the predictions of patches against those of the full image. With the help of the cross-level contrastive learning and consistency constraint, the unlabelled data can be effectively explored to improve segmentation performance on two medical image datasets for polyp and skin lesion segmentation respectively. Code of our approach is available.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL), which aims at leveraging a few labeled images and a large number of unlabeled images for network training, is beneficial for relieving the burden of data annotation in medical image segmentation. According to the experience of medical imaging experts, local attributes such as texture, luster and smoothness are very important factors for identifying target objects like lesions and polyps in medical images. Motivated by this, we propose a cross-level contrastive learning scheme to enhance representation capacity for local features in semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Compared to existing image-wise, patch-wise and point-wise contrastive learning algorithms, our devised method is capable of exploring more complex similarity cues, namely the relational characteristics between global and local patch-wise representations. Additionally, for fully making use of cross-level semantic relations, we devise a novel consistency constraint that compares the predictions of patches against those of the full image. With the help of the cross-level contrastive learning and consistency constraint, the unlabelled data can be effectively explored to improve segmentation performance on two medical image datasets for polyp and skin lesion segmentation respectively. Code of our approach is available.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）旨在利用少量标记图像和大量未标记图像进行网络训练，有利于减轻医学图像分割中数据注释的负担。根据医学影像专家的经验，纹理、光泽、平滑度等局部属性对于识别医学图像中的病灶、息肉等目标物体非常重要。受此启发，我们提出了一种跨级对比学习方案，以增强半监督医学图像分割中局部特征的表示能力。与现有的图像方式、块方式和点方式对比学习算法相比，我们设计的方法能够探索更复杂的相似性线索，即全局和局部块方式表示之间的关系特征。此外，为了充分利用跨级语义关系，我们设计了一种新颖的一致性约束，将补丁的预测与完整图像的预测进行比较。借助跨级对比学习和一致性约束，可以有效地探索未标记数据，以提高分别用于息肉和皮肤病变分割的两个医学图像数据集的分割性能。我们的方法的代码是可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合跨层次对比学习和一致性约束的半监督医学图像分割方法，以提升息肉和皮肤病变分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像中局部特征（如纹理、光滑度）对目标识别至关重要，但现有对比学习方法难以有效捕捉全局与局部特征关系。
AI.method: 设计跨层次对比学习挖掘全局与局部块表示的关系特征，并引入一致性约束强制块预测与全图像预测的语义对齐。
AI.result: 在息肉和皮肤病变数据集上验证了方法有效性，分割性能优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 跨层次特征交互与一致性约束能有效利用未标注数据，提升半监督医学图像分割效果。

authors_text: Jiwoong J. Jeong,Brianna L. Vey,Ananth Reddy,Thomas Kim,Thiago Santos,Ramon Correa,Raman Dutt,Marina Mosunjac,Gabriela Oprea-Ilies,Geoffrey Smith,Minjae Woo,Christopher R. McAdams,Mary S. Newell,Imon Banerjee,Judy Gichoya,Hari Trivedi
title: The EMory BrEast imaging Dataset (EMBED): A Racially Diverse, Granular Dataset of 3.5M Screening and Diagnostic Mammograms
title_zh: EMory BrEast 成像数据集 (EMBED)：包含 350 万张筛查和诊断乳房 X 光照片的种族多样化、精细数据集
abstract: Developing and validating artificial intelligence models in medical imaging requires datasets that are large, granular, and diverse. To date, the majority of publicly available breast imaging datasets lack in one or more of these areas. Models trained on these data may therefore underperform on patient populations or pathologies that have not previously been encountered. The EMory BrEast imaging Dataset (EMBED) addresses these gaps by providing 3650,000 2D and DBT screening and diagnostic mammograms for 116,000 women divided equally between White and African American patients. The dataset also contains 40,000 annotated lesions linked to structured imaging descriptors and 61 ground truth pathologic outcomes grouped into six severity classes. Our goal is to share this dataset with research partners to aid in development and validation of breast AI models that will serve all patients fairly and help decrease bias in medical AI.
summary: Developing and validating artificial intelligence models in medical imaging requires datasets that are large, granular, and diverse. To date, the majority of publicly available breast imaging datasets lack in one or more of these areas. Models trained on these data may therefore underperform on patient populations or pathologies that have not previously been encountered. The EMory BrEast imaging Dataset (EMBED) addresses these gaps by providing 3650,000 2D and DBT screening and diagnostic mammograms for 116,000 women divided equally between White and African American patients. The dataset also contains 40,000 annotated lesions linked to structured imaging descriptors and 61 ground truth pathologic outcomes grouped into six severity classes. Our goal is to share this dataset with research partners to aid in development and validation of breast AI models that will serve all patients fairly and help decrease bias in medical AI.
abstract_zh: 开发和验证医学成像中的人工智能模型需要大型、精细且多样化的数据集。迄今为止，大多数公开的乳腺成像数据集都缺乏其中一个或多个领域。因此，根据这些数据训练的模型可能在以前未遇到过的患者群体或病理方面表现不佳。 EMory BrEast 成像数据集 (EMBED) 通过为 116,000 名女性（白人和非裔美国患者）提供 3650,000 次 2D 和 DBT 筛查和诊断性乳房 X 光检查来弥补这些差距。该数据集还包含 40,000 个与结构化成像描述符相关的带注释病变，以及分为 6 个严重级别的 61 个真实病理结果。我们的目标是与研究合作伙伴共享该数据集，以帮助开发和验证乳房 AI 模型，这些模型将为所有患者提供公平的服务，并有助于减少医疗 AI 中的偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为EMBED的乳腺影像数据集，包含365万张筛查和诊断乳腺X光片，旨在解决现有数据集在多样性、粒度和规模上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的乳腺影像数据集在多样性、粒度或规模上存在缺陷，导致训练出的AI模型可能在未见过的人群或病理情况下表现不佳，需通过更公平的数据减少医疗AI的偏见。
AI.method: 收集并整理116,000名女性（白人与非裔各半）的365万张2D和DBT乳腺X光片，包含4万例标注病灶及61例病理结果，按六级严重程度分类。
AI.result: 构建了种族均衡、标注精细的EMBED数据集，已共享给研究伙伴用于开发和验证公平的乳腺癌AI模型。
AI.conclusion: EMBED数据集通过提供多样化的高质量数据，有助于减少医疗AI的种族偏见，推动更公平的乳腺疾病诊断模型发展。

tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为EMBED的乳腺影像数据集，包含365万张筛查和诊断乳腺X光片，旨在解决现有数据集在多样性、粒度和规模上的不足。
motivation: 现有公开的乳腺影像数据集在多样性、粒度或规模上存在缺陷，导致训练出的AI模型可能在未见过的人群或病理情况下表现不佳，需通过更公平的数据减少医疗AI的偏见。
method: 收集并整理116,000名女性（白人与非裔各半）的365万张2D和DBT乳腺X光片，包含4万例标注病灶及61例病理结果，按六级严重程度分类。
result: 构建了种族均衡、标注精细的EMBED数据集，已共享给研究伙伴用于开发和验证公平的乳腺癌AI模型。
conclusion: EMBED数据集通过提供多样化的高质量数据，有助于减少医疗AI的种族偏见，推动更公平的乳腺疾病诊断模型发展。
search_text: The EMory BrEast imaging Dataset (EMBED): A Racially Diverse, Granular Dataset of 3.5M Screening and Diagnostic Mammograms EMory BrEast 成像数据集 (EMBED)：包含 350 万张筛查和诊断乳房 X 光照片的种族多样化、精细数据集 Developing and validating artificial intelligence models in medical imaging requires datasets that are large, granular, and diverse. To date, the majority of publicly available breast imaging datasets lack in one or more of these areas. Models trained on these data may therefore underperform on patient populations or pathologies that have not previously been encountered. The EMory BrEast imaging Dataset (EMBED) addresses these gaps by providing 3650,000 2D and DBT screening and diagnostic mammograms for 116,000 women divided equally between White and African American patients. The dataset also contains 40,000 annotated lesions linked to structured imaging descriptors and 61 ground truth pathologic outcomes grouped into six severity classes. Our goal is to share this dataset with research partners to aid in development and validation of breast AI models that will serve all patients fairly and help decrease bias in medical AI. 开发和验证医学成像中的人工智能模型需要大型、精细且多样化的数据集。迄今为止，大多数公开的乳腺成像数据集都缺乏其中一个或多个领域。因此，根据这些数据训练的模型可能在以前未遇到过的患者群体或病理方面表现不佳。 EMory BrEast 成像数据集 (EMBED) 通过为 116,000 名女性（白人和非裔美国患者）提供 3650,000 次 2D 和 DBT 筛查和诊断性乳房 X 光检查来弥补这些差距。该数据集还包含 40,000 个与结构化成像描述符相关的带注释病变，以及分为 6 个严重级别的 61 个真实病理结果。我们的目标是与研究合作伙伴共享该数据集，以帮助开发和验证乳房 AI 模型，这些模型将为所有患者提供公平的服务，并有助于减少医疗 AI 中的偏见。 本文介绍了一个名为EMBED的乳腺影像数据集，包含365万张筛查和诊断乳腺X光片，旨在解决现有数据集在多样性、粒度和规模上的不足。 Jiwoong J. Jeong,Brianna L. Vey,Ananth Reddy,Thomas Kim,Thiago Santos,Ramon Correa,Raman Dutt,Marina Mosunjac,Gabriela Oprea-Ilies,Geoffrey Smith,Minjae Woo,Christopher R. McAdams,Mary S. Newell,Imon Banerjee,Judy Gichoya,Hari Trivedi eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Benedikt Hosp
title: Latent gaze information in highly dynamic decision-tasks
title_zh: 高度动态决策任务中的潜在凝视信息
abstract: Digitization is penetrating more and more areas of life. Tasks are increasingly being completed digitally, and are therefore not only fulfilled faster, more efficiently but also more purposefully and successfully. The rapid developments in the field of artificial intelligence in recent years have played a major role in this, as they brought up many helpful approaches to build on. At the same time, the eyes, their movements, and the meaning of these movements are being progressively researched. The combination of these developments has led to exciting approaches. In this dissertation, I present some of these approaches which I worked on during my Ph.D. First, I provide insight into the development of models that use artificial intelligence to connect eye movements with visual expertise. This is demonstrated for two domains or rather groups of people: athletes in decision-making actions and surgeons in arthroscopic procedures. The resulting models can be considered as digital diagnostic models for automatic expertise recognition. Furthermore, I show approaches that investigate the transferability of eye movement patterns to different expertise domains and subsequently, important aspects of techniques for generalization. Finally, I address the temporal detection of confusion based on eye movement data. The results suggest the use of the resulting model as a clock signal for possible digital assistance options in the training of young professionals. An interesting aspect of my research is that I was able to draw on very valuable data from DFB youth elite athletes as well as on long-standing experts in arthroscopy. In particular, the work with the DFB data attracted the interest of radio and print media, namely DeutschlandFunk Nova and SWR DasDing. All resulting articles presented here have been published in internationally renowned journals or at conferences.

An interesting aspect of my research is that I was able to draw on very valuable data from DFB youth elite athletes as well as on long-standing experts in arthroscopy. abstract_zh: 数字化正在渗透到生活越来越多的领域。任务越来越多地以数字化方式完成，因此不仅能够更快、更高效地完成，而且更有目的、更成功。近年来人工智能领域的快速发展在这方面发挥了重要作用，因为它们提出了许多有用的方法。与此同时，眼睛、它们的动作以及这些动作的意义正在逐步研究。这些发展的结合催生了令人兴奋的方法。在这篇论文中，我介绍了我在攻读博士学位期间研究的一些方法。首先，我深入了解使用人工智能将眼球运动与视觉专业知识联系起来的模型的开发。这在两个领域或更确切地说是两个人群中得到了证明：决策行动中的运动员和关节镜手术中的外科医生。由此产生的模型可以被视为用于自动专业知识识别的数字诊断模型。此外，我还展示了研究眼动模式向不同专业领域的可转移性以及随后的泛化技术的重要方面的方法。最后，我将讨论基于眼动数据的混乱的时间检测。结果表明，可以使用所得模型作为年轻专业人员培训中可能的数字辅助选项的时钟信号。我的研究的一个有趣的方面是，我能够利用来自德国足协青年精英运动员以及关节镜领域的长期专家的非常有价值的数据。特别是，与 DFB 数据的合作引起了广播和印刷媒体的兴趣，即 DeutschlandFunk Nova 和 SWR DasDing。这里展示的所有最终文章均已发表在国际知名期刊或会议上。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何利用人工智能模型分析眼动数据，以识别视觉专家在动态决策任务中的能力，并探索其在不同领域中的应用。
AI.motivation: 随着数字化和人工智能的发展，通过眼动数据挖掘人类专家的决策模式，可为运动员、外科医生等领域的培训和诊断提供数字化支持。
AI.method: 开发基于人工智能的模型，结合运动员和关节镜手术专家的眼动数据，分析其决策过程；研究眼动模式在不同专业领域的迁移性，并检测决策混乱的时序特征。
AI.result: 构建了可自动识别专家能力的数字诊断模型，验证了眼动模式在跨领域中的通用性，并提出了基于眼动数据的实时训练辅助系统。
AI.conclusion: 眼动信息能有效反映专业技能水平，相关模型可为青年专业人员的培训提供动态反馈，研究结果已获国际期刊和媒体认可。

authors_text: Aditya Pandey,Anshuman Mitra
title: Detecting and Localizing Copy-Move and Image-Splicing Forgery
title_zh: 检测和定位复制移动和图像拼接伪造
abstract: In the world of fake news and deepfakes, there have been an alarmingly large number of cases of images being tampered with and published in newspapers, used in court, and posted on social media for defamation purposes. Detecting these tampered images is an important task and one we try to tackle. In this paper, we focus on the methods to detect if an image has been tampered with using both Deep Learning and Image transformation methods and comparing the performances and robustness of each method. We then attempt to identify the tampered area of the image and predict the corresponding mask. Based on the results, suggestions and approaches are provided to achieve a more robust framework to detect and identify the forgeries.
summary: In the world of fake news and deepfakes, there have been an alarmingly large number of cases of images being tampered with and published in newspapers, used in court, and posted on social media for defamation purposes. Detecting these tampered images is an important task and one we try to tackle. In this paper, we focus on the methods to detect if an image has been tampered with using both Deep Learning and Image transformation methods and comparing the performances and robustness of each method. We then attempt to identify the tampered area of the image and predict the corresponding mask. Based on the results, suggestions and approaches are provided to achieve a more robust framework to detect and identify the forgeries.
abstract_zh: 在假新闻和深度造假的世界中，图像被篡改并在报纸上发布、在法庭上使用以及在社交媒体上发布用于诽谤目的的案例数量惊人。检测这些被篡改的图像是一项重要的任务，也是我们试图解决的任务。在本文中，我们重点讨论使用深度学习和图像变换方法来检测图像是否被篡改的方法，并比较每种方法的性能和鲁棒性。然后，我们尝试识别图像的篡改区域并预测相应的掩模。根据结果​​，提供了建议和方法，以实现更强大的框架来检测和识别伪造品。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是检测和定位图像中的复制-移动及拼接伪造。
AI.motivation: 随着假新闻和深度伪造技术的普及，图像篡改案例激增，检测此类伪造图像以防止其滥用成为迫切需求。
AI.method: 结合深度学习与图像转换技术，比较不同方法的性能与鲁棒性，并通过预测篡改区域的掩码实现定位。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性，并为构建更稳健的伪造检测框架提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过比较不同方法，为提升图像伪造检测的鲁棒性提供了理论支持与实践指导。

authors_text: Markus Lohrey,Lukas Lück,Alexander Thumm,Julio Xochitemol
title: Streaming algorithms for groups and semigroups
title_zh: 群和半群的流算法
abstract: We investigate deterministic and randomized streaming algorithms for word problems in finitely generated groups and semigroups. For this we introduce the notion of a distinguisher: a randomized streaming algorithm that processes two input words in parallel and, with high probability, reaches identical memory states if the words represent the same element, and distinct states otherwise. We construct such distinguishers with low error probability using logarithmic, and in some cases doubly logarithmic, space. For example, our results apply to linear semigroups and to semigroups obtained (under suitable restrictions) via standard constructions such as graph products, wreath products, and semilattice decompositions. In case of commutative semigroups and cancellative nilpotent semigroups, we achieve space complexity $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$. We complement these upper bounds with lower bounds demonstrating that certain well-known semigroups do not admit sublinear-space distinguishers. This includes, for example, free inverse monoids of rank at least two and Thompson's group $F$. Finally, we study randomized streaming algorithms for subgroup membership problems in free groups and their direct products.
summary: We investigate deterministic and randomized streaming algorithms for word problems in finitely generated groups and semigroups. For this we introduce the notion of a distinguisher: a randomized streaming algorithm that processes two input words in parallel and, with high probability, reaches identical memory states if the words represent the same element, and distinct states otherwise. We construct such distinguishers with low error probability using logarithmic, and in some cases doubly logarithmic, space. For example, our results apply to linear semigroups and to semigroups obtained (under suitable restrictions) via standard constructions such as graph products, wreath products, and semilattice decompositions. In case of commutative semigroups and cancellative nilpotent semigroups, we achieve space complexity $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$. We complement these upper bounds with lower bounds demonstrating that certain well-known semigroups do not admit sublinear-space distinguishers. This includes, for example, free inverse monoids of rank at least two and Thompson's group $F$. Finally, we study randomized streaming algorithms for subgroup membership problems in free groups and their direct products.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了有限生成群和半群中的文字问题的确定性和随机流算法。为此，我们引入了区分器的概念：一种随机流算法，它并行处理两个输入单词，并且如果单词代表相同的元素，则很有可能达到相同的内存状态，否则达到不同的状态。我们使用对数空间（在某些情况下使用双对数空间）构建具有低错误概率的区分器。例如，我们的结果适用于线性半群和通过标准结构（例如图积、花环积和半格分解）获得的半群（在适当的限制下）。对于交换半群和消除幂零半群，我们实现空间复杂度 $\mathcal{O}(\log \log n)$。我们用下界补充这些上限，证明某些众所周知的半群不承认次线性空间区分符。例如，这包括至少二阶的自由逆幺半群和汤普森群$F$。最后，我们研究了自由组中子组成员资格问题的随机流算法及其直接产品。

AI.tldr: 本文研究用于解决有限生成群和半群字问题的确定性和随机化流算法，提出了一种称为区分器的新型算法框架，并分析了其空间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 流算法在处理大规模数据时具有高效性，而群和半群的字问题在理论计算机科学中具有重要地位。现有方法在空间复杂度和适用性上存在局限，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入区分器概念，通过并行处理两个输入字并比较内存状态来判断其是否代表同一元素。利用对数或双重对数空间构造区分器，并结合图乘积、缠绕积等结构进行分析。
AI.result: 成功构建低错误概率区分器，对特定半群（如交换半群）实现O(log log n)空间复杂度；证明自由逆单oid和Thompson群F等无法使用亚线性空间区分器；研究了自由群子群成员问题的随机流算法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为群和半群的字问题提供了新的流算法框架，明确了不同结构的空间复杂度边界，为后续研究其他半群的流算法及优化现有方法奠定了理论基础。

authors_text: Jaemin Cho,Abhay Zala,Mohit Bansal
title: DALL-Eval: Probing the Reasoning Skills and Social Biases of Text-to-Image Generation Models
title_zh: DALL-Eval：探讨文本到图像生成模型的推理技巧和社会偏见
comment: ICCV 2023 (34 pages; see appendix for version changelog)
comments: ICCV 2023 (34 pages; see appendix for version changelog)
abstract: Recently, DALL-E, a multimodal transformer language model, and its variants, including diffusion models, have shown high-quality text-to-image generation capabilities. However, despite the realistic image generation results, there has not been a detailed analysis of how to evaluate such models. In this work, we investigate the visual reasoning capabilities and social biases of different text-to-image models, covering both multimodal transformer language models and diffusion models. First, we measure three visual reasoning skills: object recognition, object counting, and spatial relation understanding. For this, we propose PaintSkills, a compositional diagnostic evaluation dataset that measures these skills. Despite the high-fidelity image generation capability, a large gap exists between the performance of recent models and the upper bound accuracy in object counting and spatial relation understanding skills. Second, we assess the gender and skin tone biases by measuring the gender/skin tone distribution of generated images across various professions and attributes. We demonstrate that recent text-to-image generation models learn specific biases about gender and skin tone from web image-text pairs. We hope our work will help guide future progress in improving text-to-image generation models on visual reasoning skills and learning socially unbiased representations. Code and data: https://github.com/j-min/DallEval
summary: Recently, DALL-E, a multimodal transformer language model, and its variants, including diffusion models, have shown high-quality text-to-image generation capabilities. However, despite the realistic image generation results, there has not been a detailed analysis of how to evaluate such models. In this work, we investigate the visual reasoning capabilities and social biases of different text-to-image models, covering both multimodal transformer language models and diffusion models. First, we measure three visual reasoning skills: object recognition, object counting, and spatial relation understanding. For this, we propose PaintSkills, a compositional diagnostic evaluation dataset that measures these skills. Despite the high-fidelity image generation capability, a large gap exists between the performance of recent models and the upper bound accuracy in object counting and spatial relation understanding skills. Second, we assess the gender and skin tone biases by measuring the gender/skin tone distribution of generated images across various professions and attributes. We demonstrate that recent text-to-image generation models learn specific biases about gender and skin tone from web image-text pairs. We hope our work will help guide future progress in improving text-to-image generation models on visual reasoning skills and learning socially unbiased representations. Code and data: https://github.com/j-min/DallEval
abstract_zh: 最近，多模态 Transformer 语言模型 DALL-E 及其变体（包括扩散模型）表现出了高质量的文本到图像生成能力。然而，尽管图像生成结果真实，但尚未对如何评估此类模型进行详细分析。在这项工作中，我们研究了不同文本到图像模型的视觉推理能力和社会偏见，涵盖多模态转换器语言模型和扩散模型。首先，我们测量三种视觉推理技能：物体识别、物体计数和空间关系理解。为此，我们提出了 PaintSkills，这是一个衡量这些技能的组合诊断评估数据集。尽管具有高保真图像生成能力，但最新模型的性能与对象计数和空间关系理解技能的上限精度之间存在很大差距。其次，我们通过测量不同职业和属性生成的图像的性别/肤色分布来评估性别和肤色偏差。我们证明了最近的文本到图像生成模型可以从网络图像文本对中学习有关性别和肤色的特定偏见。我们希望我们的工作将有助于指导未来在改进视觉推理技能的文本到图像生成模型和学习社会公正的表示方面取得进展。代码和数据：https://github.com/j-min/DallEval

AI.tldr: 本文提出DALL-Eval框架，通过构建PaintSkills数据集评估文本到图像生成模型的视觉推理能力，并分析其社会偏见。
AI.motivation: 尽管DALL-E等模型能生成高质量图像，但缺乏对其视觉推理能力和社会偏见的系统性评估方法。
AI.method: 设计包含物体识别、计数和空间关系理解的PaintSkills数据集进行诊断测试；统计不同职业和属性下生成图像的性别/肤色分布以分析偏见。
AI.result: 最新模型在物体计数和空间关系任务中与理论上限存在显著差距，且从网络图像文本对中学习到性别和肤色偏见。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为改进文本到图像模型的视觉推理能力和减少社会偏见提供了评估基准和优化方向。

authors_text: Roozbeh Yousefzadeh
title: Decision boundaries and convex hulls in the feature space that deep learning functions learn from images
title_zh: 深度学习函数从图像中学习的特征空间中的决策边界和凸包
abstract: The success of deep neural networks in image classification and learning can be partly attributed to the features they extract from images. It is often speculated about the properties of a low-dimensional manifold that models extract and learn from images. However, there is not sufficient understanding about this low-dimensional space based on theory or empirical evidence. For image classification models, their last hidden layer is the one where images of each class is separated from other classes and it also has the least number of features. Here, we develop methods and formulations to study that feature space for any model. We study the partitioning of the domain in feature space, identify regions guaranteed to have certain classifications, and investigate its implications for the pixel space. We observe that geometric arrangements of decision boundaries in feature space is significantly different compared to pixel space, providing insights about adversarial vulnerabilities, image morphing, extrapolation, ambiguity in classification, and the mathematical understanding of image classification models.
summary: The success of deep neural networks in image classification and learning can be partly attributed to the features they extract from images. It is often speculated about the properties of a low-dimensional manifold that models extract and learn from images. However, there is not sufficient understanding about this low-dimensional space based on theory or empirical evidence. For image classification models, their last hidden layer is the one where images of each class is separated from other classes and it also has the least number of features. Here, we develop methods and formulations to study that feature space for any model. We study the partitioning of the domain in feature space, identify regions guaranteed to have certain classifications, and investigate its implications for the pixel space. We observe that geometric arrangements of decision boundaries in feature space is significantly different compared to pixel space, providing insights about adversarial vulnerabilities, image morphing, extrapolation, ambiguity in classification, and the mathematical understanding of image classification models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络在图像分类和学习方面的成功部分归功于它们从图像中提取的特征。人们经常推测模型从图像中提取和学习的低维流形的属性。然而，基于理论或经验证据，人们对这个低维空间还没有足够的认识。对于图像分类模型，它们的最后一个隐藏层是将每个类别的图像与其他类别分开的隐藏层，并且它的特征数量也最少。在这里，我们开发了方法和公式来研究任何模型的特征空间。我们研究特征空间中域的划分，识别保证具有某些分类的区域，并研究其对像素空间的影响。我们观察到，特征空间中决策边界的几何排列与像素空间相比显着不同，提供了有关对抗性漏洞、图像变形、外推、分类模糊性以及图像分类模型的数学理解的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度学习模型在图像分类任务中特征空间的决策边界与凸包结构，分析其与像素空间的差异及对模型行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在图像分类中的成功依赖于特征提取，但对特征空间的低维流形结构缺乏理论和实证理解，需探索决策边界特性以解释模型鲁棒性与脆弱性。
AI.method: 开发方法分析特征空间的域划分，识别分类确定区域，并对比特征空间与像素空间的几何差异，结合对抗样本、图像变形等实验验证假设。
AI.result: 发现特征空间决策边界几何结构显著不同于像素空间，揭示了对抗攻击敏感性、分类模糊性及模型外推能力的潜在机制。
AI.conclusion: 特征空间决策边界与像素空间的差异为理解图像分类模型的数学本质提供了新视角，需进一步研究以提升模型鲁棒性与可解释性。

search_text: Decision boundaries and convex hulls in the feature space that deep learning functions learn from images 深度学习函数从图像中学习的特征空间中的决策边界和凸包 The success of deep neural networks in image classification and learning can be partly attributed to the features they extract from images. It is often speculated about the properties of a low-dimensional manifold that models extract and learn from images. However, there is not sufficient understanding about this low-dimensional space based on theory or empirical evidence. For image classification models, their last hidden layer is the one where images of each class is separated from other classes and it also has the least number of features. Here, we develop methods and formulations to study that feature space for any model. We study the partitioning of the domain in feature space, identify regions guaranteed to have certain classifications, and investigate its implications for the pixel space. We observe that geometric arrangements of decision boundaries in feature space is significantly different compared to pixel space, providing insights about adversarial vulnerabilities, image morphing, extrapolation, ambiguity in classification, and the mathematical understanding of image classification models. 深度神经网络在图像分类和学习方面的成功部分归功于它们从图像中提取的特征。人们经常推测模型从图像中提取和学习的低维流形的属性。然而，基于理论或经验证据，人们对这个低维空间还没有足够的认识。对于图像分类模型，它们的最后一个隐藏层是将每个类别的图像与其他类别分开的隐藏层，并且它的特征数量也最少。在这里，我们开发了方法和公式来研究任何模型的特征空间。我们研究特征空间中域的划分，识别保证具有某些分类的区域，并研究其对像素空间的影响。我们观察到，特征空间中决策边界的几何排列与像素空间相比显着不同，提供了有关对抗性漏洞、图像变形、外推、分类模糊性以及图像分类模型的数学理解的见解。 本文研究深度学习模型在图像分类任务中特征空间的决策边界与凸包结构，分析其与像素空间的差异及对模型行为的影响。 Roozbeh Yousefzadeh cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.OC

authors_text: Raoul Schönhof,Manuel Fechter
title: Towards automated Capability Assessment leveraging Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习实现自动化能力评估
abstract: Aiming for a higher economic efficiency in manufacturing, an increased degree of automation is a key enabler. However, assessing the technical feasibility of an automated assembly solution for a dedicated process is difficult and often determined by the geometry of the given product parts. Among others, decisive criterions of the automation feasibility are the ability to separate and isolate single parts or the capability of component self-alignment in final position. To assess the feasibility, a questionnaire based evaluation scheme has been developed and applied by Fraunhofer researchers. However, the results strongly depend on the implicit knowledge and experience of the single engineer performing the assessment. This paper presents NeuroCAD, a software tool that automates the assessment using voxelization techniques. The approach enables the assessment of abstract and production relevant geometries features through deep-learning based on CAD files.
summary: Aiming for a higher economic efficiency in manufacturing, an increased degree of automation is a key enabler. However, assessing the technical feasibility of an automated assembly solution for a dedicated process is difficult and often determined by the geometry of the given product parts. Among others, decisive criterions of the automation feasibility are the ability to separate and isolate single parts or the capability of component self-alignment in final position. To assess the feasibility, a questionnaire based evaluation scheme has been developed and applied by Fraunhofer researchers. However, the results strongly depend on the implicit knowledge and experience of the single engineer performing the assessment. This paper presents NeuroCAD, a software tool that automates the assessment using voxelization techniques. The approach enables the assessment of abstract and production relevant geometries features through deep-learning based on CAD files.
abstract_zh: 为了提高制造业的经济效益，提高自动化程度是关键推动因素。然而，评估专用工艺的自动化装配解决方案的技术可行性很困难，并且通常由给定产品零件的几何形状决定。其中，自动化可行性的决定性标准是分离和隔离单个零件的能力或组件在最终位置自对准的能力。为了评估可行性，弗劳恩霍夫研究人员开发并应用了基于问卷的评估方案。然而，结果在很大程度上取决于执行评估的单个工程师的隐性知识和经验。本文介绍了 NeuroCAD，这是一种使用体素化技术自动进行评估的软件工具。该方法能够通过基于 CAD 文件的深度学习来评估抽象和生产相关的几何特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuroCAD工具，利用深度学习和体素化技术自动评估自动化装配方案的可行性，减少对人工经验的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统自动化可行性评估依赖工程师经验，结果主观且不稳定，需客观自动化方法提高评估效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于CAD文件，采用体素化技术将几何模型转化为深度学习可处理的数据，训练模型自动识别关键几何特征。
AI.result: NeuroCAD成功实现了对抽象和生产相关几何特征的自动化评估，显著降低人工干预并提升评估一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为制造业自动化方案评估提供了高效、客观的解决方案，推动了深度学习在工业工程中的应用。

authors_text: Shyam Narayanan,Erika Covi,Viktor Havel,Charlotte Frenkel,Suzanne Lancaster,Quang Duong,Stefan Slesazeck,Thomas Mikolajick,Melika Payvand,Giacomo Indiveri
title: A 120dB Programmable-Range On-Chip Pulse Generator for Characterizing Ferroelectric Devices
title_zh: 用于表征铁电器件的 120dB 可编程范围片上脉冲发生器
comment: ef:2022 IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE International Symposium on Circuits and Systems (ISCAS)
abstract: Novel non-volatile memory devices based on ferroelectric thin films represent a promising emerging technology that is ideally suited for neuromorphic applications. The physical switching mechanism in such films is the nucleation and growth of ferroelectric domains. Since this has a strong dependence on both pulse width and voltage amplitude, it is important to use precise pulsing schemes for a thorough characterization of their behaviour. In this work, we present an on-chip 120 dB programmable range pulse generator, that can generate pulse widths ranging from 10ns to 10ms $\pm$2.5% which eliminates the RLC bottleneck in the device characterisation setup. We describe the pulse generator design and show how the pulse width can be tuned with high accuracy, using Digital to Analog converters. Finally, we present experimental results measured from the circuit, fabricated using a standard 180nm CMOS technology.
summary: Novel non-volatile memory devices based on ferroelectric thin films represent a promising emerging technology that is ideally suited for neuromorphic applications. The physical switching mechanism in such films is the nucleation and growth of ferroelectric domains. Since this has a strong dependence on both pulse width and voltage amplitude, it is important to use precise pulsing schemes for a thorough characterization of their behaviour. In this work, we present an on-chip 120 dB programmable range pulse generator, that can generate pulse widths ranging from 10ns to 10ms $\pm$2.5% which eliminates the RLC bottleneck in the device characterisation setup. We describe the pulse generator design and show how the pulse width can be tuned with high accuracy, using Digital to Analog converters. Finally, we present experimental results measured from the circuit, fabricated using a standard 180nm CMOS technology.
abstract_zh: 基于铁电薄膜的新型非易失性存储器件代表了一种有前景的新兴技术，非常适合神经形态应用。此类薄膜中的物理转换机制是铁电域的成核和生长。由于这对脉冲宽度和电压幅度有很强的依赖性，因此使用精确的脉冲方案来全面表征其行为非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一款片上 120 dB 可编程范围脉冲发生器，它可以生成 10ns 至 10ms 范围内的脉冲宽度 $\pm$2.5%，从而消除了器件表征设置中的 RLC 瓶颈。我们描述了脉冲发生器的设计，并展示了如何使用数模转换器高精度地调整脉冲宽度。最后，我们展示了使用标准 180 nm CMOS 技术制造的电路测量的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种120dB可编程范围的片上脉冲发生器，用于表征铁电设备的特性。
AI.motivation: 铁电薄膜新型非易失性存储器的物理开关机制依赖于脉冲宽度和电压幅值，需精确脉冲方案进行表征，而现有方法存在RLC瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出片上脉冲发生器设计，利用数模转换器实现高精度脉冲宽度调节，采用标准180nm CMOS工艺流片。
AI.result: 实验验证了电路性能，脉冲宽度范围10ns-10ms（±2.5%），成功克服RLC瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 该脉冲发生器为铁电设备表征提供了高精度解决方案，推动神经形态应用发展。

In this work, we present an on-chip 120 dB programmable range pulse generator, that can generate pulse widths ranging from 10ns to 10ms $\pm$2.5% which eliminates the RLC bottleneck in the device characterisation setup. We describe the pulse generator design and show how the pulse width can be tuned with high accuracy, using Digital to Analog converters. Finally, we present experimental results measured from the circuit, fabricated using a standard 180nm CMOS technology. 基于铁电薄膜的新型非易失性存储器件代表了一种有前景的新兴技术，非常适合神经形态应用。此类薄膜中的物理转换机制是铁电域的成核和生长。由于这对脉冲宽度和电压幅度有很强的依赖性，因此使用精确的脉冲方案来全面表征其行为非常重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一款片上 120 dB 可编程范围脉冲发生器，它可以生成 10ns 至 10ms 范围内的脉冲宽度 $\pm$2.5%，从而消除了器件表征设置中的 RLC 瓶颈。我们描述了脉冲发生器的设计，并展示了如何使用数模转换器高精度地调整脉冲宽度。最后，我们展示了使用标准 180 nm CMOS 技术制造的电路测量的实验结果。 本文设计了一种120dB可编程范围的片上脉冲发生器，用于表征铁电设备的特性。 Shyam Narayanan,Erika Covi,Viktor Havel,Charlotte Frenkel,Suzanne Lancaster,Quang Duong,Stefan Slesazeck,Thomas Mikolajick,Melika Payvand,Giacomo Indiveri cs.ET,eess.SY

authors_text: Yunzhe Liu,Rinon Gal,Amit H. Bermano,Baoquan Chen,Daniel Cohen-Or
title: Self-Conditioned Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Editing
title_zh: 用于图像编辑的自调节生成对抗网络
abstract: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are susceptible to bias, learned from either the unbalanced data, or through mode collapse. The networks focus on the core of the data distribution, leaving the tails - or the edges of the distribution - behind. We argue that this bias is responsible not only for fairness concerns, but that it plays a key role in the collapse of latent-traversal editing methods when deviating away from the distribution's core. Building on this observation, we outline a method for mitigating generative bias through a self-conditioning process, where distances in the latent-space of a pre-trained generator are used to provide initial labels for the data. By fine-tuning the generator on a re-sampled distribution drawn from these self-labeled data, we force the generator to better contend with rare semantic attributes and enable more realistic generation of these properties. We compare our models to a wide range of latent editing methods, and show that by alleviating the bias they achieve finer semantic control and better identity preservation through a wider range of transformations. Our code and models will be available at https://github.com/yzliu567/sc-gan
summary: Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are susceptible to bias, learned from either the unbalanced data, or through mode collapse. The networks focus on the core of the data distribution, leaving the tails - or the edges of the distribution - behind. We argue that this bias is responsible not only for fairness concerns, but that it plays a key role in the collapse of latent-traversal editing methods when deviating away from the distribution's core. Building on this observation, we outline a method for mitigating generative bias through a self-conditioning process, where distances in the latent-space of a pre-trained generator are used to provide initial labels for the data. By fine-tuning the generator on a re-sampled distribution drawn from these self-labeled data, we force the generator to better contend with rare semantic attributes and enable more realistic generation of these properties. We compare our models to a wide range of latent editing methods, and show that by alleviating the bias they achieve finer semantic control and better identity preservation through a wider range of transformations. Our code and models will be available at https://github.com/yzliu567/sc-gan
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）很容易受到偏见的影响，这些偏见是从不平衡数据或模式崩溃中学到的。网络专注于数据分布的核心，而留下分布的尾部或边缘。我们认为，这种偏见不仅会引起公平性问题，而且在偏离发行版核心时，它在潜在遍历编辑方法的崩溃中发挥了关键作用。基于这一观察，我们概述了一种通过自我调节过程减轻生成偏差的方法，其中预训练生成器的潜在空间中的距离用于为数据提供初始标签。通过根据从这些自标记数据中提取的重新采样分布对生成器进行微调，我们迫使生成器更好地应对罕见的语义属性，并能够更真实地生成这些属性。我们将我们的模型与各种潜在编辑方法进行比较，并表明，通过减轻偏差，它们可以通过更广泛的转换实现更精细的语义控制和更好的身份保留。我们的代码和模型将在 https://github.com/yzliu567/sc-gan 提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自条件生成对抗网络（SC-GAN），通过缓解生成模型的偏差问题，提升图像编辑中语义控制和身份保持的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统生成对抗网络（GAN）因数据不平衡或模式崩溃易产生偏差，导致潜在空间遍历编辑方法在偏离分布核心时失效，影响语义控制和身份保持。
AI.method: 利用预训练生成器潜在空间的距离生成初始标签，通过重采样分布对生成器进行微调，使其更关注罕见语义属性，从而生成更真实的图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种潜在编辑方法中表现更优，实现了更精细的语义控制和更广泛变换下的身份保持。
AI.conclusion: 自条件机制有效缓解了生成偏差，为图像编辑提供了更可靠和灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Iliya Miralavy,Alexander Bricco,Assaf Gilad,Wolfgang Banzhaf
title: Using Genetic Programming to Predict and Optimize Protein Function
title_zh: 使用遗传编程来预测和优化蛋白质功能
abstract: Protein engineers conventionally use tools such as Directed Evolution to find new proteins with better functionalities and traits. More recently, computational techniques and especially machine learning approaches have been recruited to assist Directed Evolution, showing promising results. In this paper, we propose POET, a computational Genetic Programming tool based on evolutionary computation methods to enhance screening and mutagenesis in Directed Evolution and help protein engineers to find proteins that have better functionality. As a proof-of-concept we use peptides that generate MRI contrast detected by the Chemical Exchange Saturation Transfer contrast mechanism. The evolutionary methods used in POET are described, and the performance of POET in different epochs of our experiments with Chemical Exchange Saturation Transfer contrast are studied. Our results indicate that a computational modelling tool like POET can help to find peptides with 400% better functionality than used before.
summary: Protein engineers conventionally use tools such as Directed Evolution to find new proteins with better functionalities and traits. More recently, computational techniques and especially machine learning approaches have been recruited to assist Directed Evolution, showing promising results. In this paper, we propose POET, a computational Genetic Programming tool based on evolutionary computation methods to enhance screening and mutagenesis in Directed Evolution and help protein engineers to find proteins that have better functionality. As a proof-of-concept we use peptides that generate MRI contrast detected by the Chemical Exchange Saturation Transfer contrast mechanism. The evolutionary methods used in POET are described, and the performance of POET in different epochs of our experiments with Chemical Exchange Saturation Transfer contrast are studied. Our results indicate that a computational modelling tool like POET can help to find peptides with 400% better functionality than used before.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质工程师通常使用定向进化等工具来寻找具有更好功能和特性的新蛋白质。最近，计算技术，尤其是机器学习方法被用来辅助定向进化，并显示出有希望的结果。在本文中，我们提出了 POET，一种基于进化计算方法的计算遗传编程工具，用于增强定向进化中的筛选和诱变，并帮助蛋白质工程师找到具有更好功能的蛋白质。作为概念验证，我们使用肽来产生通过化学交换饱和转移对比机制检测到的 MRI 对比。描述了 POET 中使用的进化方法，并通过化学交换饱和转移对比研究了 POET 在我们实验的不同时期的性能。我们的结果表明，像 POET 这样的计算建模工具可以帮助找到比以前使用的功能好 400% 的肽。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗传编程的计算工具POET，用于预测和优化蛋白质功能，以增强定向进化中的筛选和诱变过程。
AI.motivation: 传统定向进化方法效率较低，而计算方法如机器学习可辅助提升效率，但需更高效的工具来优化蛋白质功能。
AI.method: 开发了POET工具，采用遗传编程和进化计算方法，通过多代实验优化肽序列，以增强化学交换饱和转移（CEST）对比机制的MRI造影效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，POET找到的肽在功能上比以往方法提升了400%。
AI.conclusion: POET作为一种计算建模工具，能显著提升定向进化效率，为蛋白质工程提供新思路。

authors_text: Flora Yu Shen,Katie Luo,Guandao Yang,Harald Haraldsson,Serge Belongie
title: Residual Aligned: Gradient Optimization for Non-Negative Image Synthesis
title_zh: 残差对齐：非负图像合成的梯度优化
abstract: In this work, we address an important problem of optical see through (OST) augmented reality: non-negative image synthesis. Most of the image generation methods fail under this condition, since they assume full control over each pixel and cannot create darker pixels by adding light. In order to solve the non-negative image generation problem in AR image synthesis, prior works have attempted to utilize optical illusion to simulate human vision but fail to preserve lightness constancy well under situations such as high dynamic range. In our paper, we instead propose a method that is able to preserve lightness constancy at a local level, thus capturing high frequency details. Compared with existing work, our method shows strong performance in image-to-image translation tasks, particularly in scenarios such as large scale images, high resolution images, and high dynamic range image transfer.
summary: In this work, we address an important problem of optical see through (OST) augmented reality: non-negative image synthesis. Most of the image generation methods fail under this condition, since they assume full control over each pixel and cannot create darker pixels by adding light. In order to solve the non-negative image generation problem in AR image synthesis, prior works have attempted to utilize optical illusion to simulate human vision but fail to preserve lightness constancy well under situations such as high dynamic range. In our paper, we instead propose a method that is able to preserve lightness constancy at a local level, thus capturing high frequency details. Compared with existing work, our method shows strong performance in image-to-image translation tasks, particularly in scenarios such as large scale images, high resolution images, and high dynamic range image transfer.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们解决了光学透视（OST）增强现实的一个重要问题：非负图像合成。大多数图像生成方法在这种情况下都会失败，因为它们假设完全控制每个像素，并且无法通过添加光来创建较暗的像素。为了解决AR图像合成中的非负图像生成问题，先前的工作尝试利用视错觉来模拟人类视觉，但在高动态范围等情况下未能很好地保持亮度恒定性。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种能够在局部级别保持亮度恒定性的方法，从而捕获高频细节。与现有工作相比，我们的方法在图像到图像转换任务中表现出强大的性能，特别是在大尺寸图像、高分辨率图像和高动态范围图像传输等场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种梯度优化方法，解决增强现实中的非负图像合成问题，实现局部亮度恒定的高质量图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成方法无法满足增强现实场景中非负像素约束需求，尤其在高动态范围下难以保持亮度恒定。
AI.method: 通过梯度优化技术实现局部亮度恒定控制，保留高频细节，区别于依赖视觉错觉的现有方法。
AI.result: 在图像到图像转换任务中表现优异，尤其在大尺度、高分辨率及高动态范围场景中优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非负图像合成中的亮度恒定难题，为增强现实图像生成提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种梯度优化方法，解决增强现实中的非负图像合成问题，实现局部亮度恒定的高质量图像生成。

search_text: Residual Aligned: Gradient Optimization for Non-Negative Image Synthesis 残差对齐：非负图像合成的梯度优化 In this work, we address an important problem of optical see through (OST) augmented reality: non-negative image synthesis. Most of the image generation methods fail under this condition, since they assume full control over each pixel and cannot create darker pixels by adding light. In order to solve the non-negative image generation problem in AR image synthesis, prior works have attempted to utilize optical illusion to simulate human vision but fail to preserve lightness constancy well under situations such as high dynamic range. In our paper, we instead propose a method that is able to preserve lightness constancy at a local level, thus capturing high frequency details. Compared with existing work, our method shows strong performance in image-to-image translation tasks, particularly in scenarios such as large scale images, high resolution images, and high dynamic range image transfer. 在这项工作中，我们解决了光学透视（OST）增强现实的一个重要问题：非负图像合成。大多数图像生成方法在这种情况下都会失败，因为它们假设完全控制每个像素，并且无法通过添加光来创建较暗的像素。为了解决AR图像合成中的非负图像生成问题，先前的工作尝试利用视错觉来模拟人类视觉，但在高动态范围等情况下未能很好地保持亮度恒定性。在我们的论文中，我们提出了一种能够在局部级别保持亮度恒定性的方法，从而捕获高频细节。与现有工作相比，我们的方法在图像到图像转换任务中表现出强大的性能，特别是在大尺寸图像、高分辨率图像和高动态范围图像传输等场景中。 本文提出一种梯度优化方法，解决增强现实中的非负图像合成问题，实现局部亮度恒定的高质量图像生成。 Flora Yu Shen,Katie Luo,Guandao Yang,Harald Haraldsson,Serge Belongie cs.CV

authors_text: Nikolaos Ioannis Bountos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Dimitrios Michail,Nantheera Anantrasirichai
title: Self-supervised Contrastive Learning for Volcanic Unrest Detection
title_zh: 用于火山动荡检测的自监督对比学习
abstract: Ground deformation measured from Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) data is considered a sign of volcanic unrest, statistically linked to a volcanic eruption. Recent studies have shown the potential of using Sentinel-1 InSAR data and supervised deep learning (DL) methods for the detection of volcanic deformation signals, towards global volcanic hazard mitigation. However, detection accuracy is compromised from the lack of labelled data and class imbalance. To overcome this, synthetic data are typically used for finetuning DL models pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset. This approach suffers from poor generalisation on real InSAR data. This letter proposes the use of self-supervised contrastive learning to learn quality visual representations hidden in unlabeled InSAR data. Our approach, based on the SimCLR framework, provides a solution that does not require a specialized architecture nor a large labelled or synthetic dataset. We show that our self-supervised pipeline achieves higher accuracy with respect to the state-of-the-art methods, and shows excellent generalisation even for out-of-distribution test data. Finally, we showcase the effectiveness of our approach for detecting the unrest episodes preceding the recent Icelandic Fagradalsfjall volcanic eruption.
summary: Ground deformation measured from Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) data is considered a sign of volcanic unrest, statistically linked to a volcanic eruption. Recent studies have shown the potential of using Sentinel-1 InSAR data and supervised deep learning (DL) methods for the detection of volcanic deformation signals, towards global volcanic hazard mitigation. However, detection accuracy is compromised from the lack of labelled data and class imbalance. To overcome this, synthetic data are typically used for finetuning DL models pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset. This approach suffers from poor generalisation on real InSAR data. This letter proposes the use of self-supervised contrastive learning to learn quality visual representations hidden in unlabeled InSAR data. Our approach, based on the SimCLR framework, provides a solution that does not require a specialized architecture nor a large labelled or synthetic dataset. We show that our self-supervised pipeline achieves higher accuracy with respect to the state-of-the-art methods, and shows excellent generalisation even for out-of-distribution test data. Finally, we showcase the effectiveness of our approach for detecting the unrest episodes preceding the recent Icelandic Fagradalsfjall volcanic eruption.
abstract_zh: 通过干涉合成孔径雷达 (InSAR) 数据测量的地面变形被认为是火山动荡的迹象，统计上与火山喷发有关。最近的研究表明，使用 Sentinel-1 InSAR 数据和监督深度学习 (DL) 方法来检测火山形变信号，以减轻全球火山灾害的潜力。然而，由于缺乏标记数据和类别不平衡，检测精度受到影响。为了克服这个问题，合成数据通常用于微调在 ImageNet 数据集上预训练的深度学习模型。这种方法对真实 InSAR 数据的泛化能力较差。这封信建议使用自监督对比学习来学习隐藏在未标记的 InSAR 数据中的高质量视觉表示。我们的方法基于 SimCLR 框架，提供了一种解决方案，不需要专门的架构，也不需要大型标记或合成数据集。我们表明，我们的自监督管道相对于最先进的方法实现了更高的准确性，并且即使对于分布外的测试数据也表现出出色的泛化能力。最后，我们展示了我们的方法在检测最近冰岛 Fagradalsfjall 火山喷发之前的骚乱事件方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督对比学习的火山活动检测方法，利用未标注的InSAR数据学习特征表示，以提高火山变形信号检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法因标注数据稀缺和类别不平衡导致火山变形检测效果受限，而合成数据微调预训练模型存在泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 基于SimCLR框架构建自监督对比学习模型，通过未标注InSAR数据学习高质量视觉表征，无需专用架构或大规模标注/合成数据。
AI.result: 该方法在基准测试中优于现有方法，对分布外测试数据具有优异泛化能力，并成功检测冰岛Fagradalsfjall火山喷发前的异常活动。
AI.conclusion: 自监督对比学习为火山灾害监测提供了无需标注数据的可行解决方案，可有效提升全球火山变形信号检测能力。

Recent studies have shown the potential of using Sentinel-1 InSAR data and supervised deep learning (DL) methods for the detection of volcanic deformation signals, towards global volcanic hazard mitigation. This letter proposes the use of self-supervised contrastive learning to learn quality visual representations hidden in unlabeled InSAR data. authors_text: Pranay Gupta,Manish Gupta
title: NEWSKVQA: Knowledge-Aware News Video Question Answering
title_zh: NEWSKVQA：知识感知新闻视频问答
abstract: Answering questions in the context of videos can be helpful in video indexing, video retrieval systems, video summarization, learning management systems and surveillance video analysis. Although there exists a large body of work on visual question answering, work on video question answering (1) is limited to domains like movies, TV shows, gameplay, or human activity, and (2) is mostly based on common sense reasoning. In this paper, we explore a new frontier in video question answering: answering knowledge-based questions in the context of news videos. To this end, we curate a new dataset of 12K news videos spanning across 156 hours with 1M multiple-choice question-answer pairs covering 8263 unique entities. We make the dataset publicly available. Using this dataset, we propose a novel approach, NEWSKVQA (Knowledge-Aware News Video Question Answering) which performs multi-modal inferencing over textual multiple-choice questions, videos, their transcripts and knowledge base, and presents a strong baseline.
summary: Answering questions in the context of videos can be helpful in video indexing, video retrieval systems, video summarization, learning management systems and surveillance video analysis. Although there exists a large body of work on visual question answering, work on video question answering (1) is limited to domains like movies, TV shows, gameplay, or human activity, and (2) is mostly based on common sense reasoning. In this paper, we explore a new frontier in video question answering: answering knowledge-based questions in the context of news videos. To this end, we curate a new dataset of 12K news videos spanning across 156 hours with 1M multiple-choice question-answer pairs covering 8263 unique entities. We make the dataset publicly available. Using this dataset, we propose a novel approach, NEWSKVQA (Knowledge-Aware News Video Question Answering) which performs multi-modal inferencing over textual multiple-choice questions, videos, their transcripts and knowledge base, and presents a strong baseline.
abstract_zh: 在视频背景下回答问题有助于视频索引、视频检索系统、视频摘要、学习管理系统和监控视频分析。尽管存在大量关于视觉问答的工作，但视频问答的工作（1）仅限于电影、电视节目、游戏或人类活动等领域，（2）主要基于常识推理。在本文中，我们探索了视频问答的新领域：在新闻视频的背景下回答基于知识的问题。为此，我们策划了一个新的数据集，其中包含 156 小时内的 12K 新闻视频，其中包含涵盖 8263 个独特实体的 100 万个多项选择题答案对。我们公开该数据集。使用该数据集，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，NEWSKVQA（知识感知新闻视频问答），它对文本多项选择问题、视频、其成绩单和知识库进行多模态推理，并提供强大的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合知识库的新闻视频问答系统，并构建了一个包含12K新闻视频和100万道多选题的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答研究局限于娱乐领域且依赖常识推理，而新闻视频问答需要事实性知识支持，缺乏专门数据集和方法。
AI.method: 提出NEWSKVQA方法，通过多模态推理整合视频、文本字幕和知识库信息，实现基于知识的新闻视频问答。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上验证了方法有效性，提供了当前最优基线性能，并公开了数据集支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 构建了首个新闻视频知识问答数据集，提出了多源信息融合的问答框架，为该领域研究提供了基础支撑。

To this end, we curate a new dataset of 12K news videos spanning across 156 hours with 1M multiple-choice question-answer pairs covering 8263 unique entities. We make the dataset publicly available. Using this dataset, we propose a novel approach, NEWSKVQA (Knowledge-Aware News Video Question Answering) which performs multi-modal inferencing over textual multiple-choice questions, videos, their transcripts and knowledge base, and presents a strong baseline. 在视频背景下回答问题有助于视频索引、视频检索系统、视频摘要、学习管理系统和监控视频分析。尽管存在大量关于视觉问答的工作，但视频问答的工作（1）仅限于电影、电视节目、游戏或人类活动等领域，（2）主要基于常识推理。在本文中，我们探索了视频问答的新领域：在新闻视频的背景下回答基于知识的问题。为此，我们策划了一个新的数据集，其中包含 156 小时内的 12K 新闻视频，其中包含涵盖 8263 个独特实体的 100 万个多项选择题答案对。我们公开该数据集。使用该数据集，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，NEWSKVQA（知识感知新闻视频问答），它对文本多项选择问题、视频、其成绩单和知识库进行多模态推理，并提供强大的基线。 本文提出一个结合知识库的新闻视频问答系统，并构建了一个包含12K新闻视频和100万道多选题的数据集。 Pranay Gupta,Manish Gupta cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Zoë Papakipos,Giorgos Tolias,Tomas Jenicek,Ed Pizzi,Shuhei Yokoo,Wenhao Wang,Yifan Sun,Weipu Zhang,Yi Yang,Sanjay Addicam,Sergio Manuel Papadakis,Cristian Canton Ferrer,Ondrej Chum,Matthijs Douze
title: Results and findings of the 2021 Image Similarity Challenge
title_zh: 2021 年图像相似性挑战赛的结果和调查结果
abstract: The 2021 Image Similarity Challenge introduced a dataset to serve as a new benchmark to evaluate recent image copy detection methods. There were 200 participants to the competition. This paper presents a quantitative and qualitative analysis of the top submissions. It appears that the most difficult image transformations involve either severe image crops or hiding into unrelated images, combined with local pixel perturbations. The key algorithmic elements in the winning submissions are: training on strong augmentations, self-supervised learning, score normalization, explicit overlay detection, and global descriptor matching followed by pairwise image comparison.
summary: The 2021 Image Similarity Challenge introduced a dataset to serve as a new benchmark to evaluate recent image copy detection methods. There were 200 participants to the competition. This paper presents a quantitative and qualitative analysis of the top submissions. It appears that the most difficult image transformations involve either severe image crops or hiding into unrelated images, combined with local pixel perturbations. The key algorithmic elements in the winning submissions are: training on strong augmentations, self-supervised learning, score normalization, explicit overlay detection, and global descriptor matching followed by pairwise image comparison.
abstract_zh: 2021 年图像相似性挑战赛引入了一个数据集，作为评估最新图像复制检测方法的新基准。此次比赛共有200名参赛者。本文对热门提交内容进行了定量和定性分析。看来最困难的图像转换涉及严重的图像裁剪或隐藏到不相关的图像中，并结合局部像素扰动。获奖作品中的关键算法元素是：强增强训练、自监督学习、分数归一化、显式重叠检测和全局描述符匹配，然后进行成对图像比较。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了2021图像相似性挑战赛的新数据集，用于评估图像复制检测方法，并分析了顶级提交结果。
AI.motivation: 为了提供新的基准数据集，推动图像复制检测方法的发展，并评估现有技术的有效性。
AI.method: 通过定量和定性分析挑战赛的顶级提交，结合关键算法元素如强增强训练、自监督学习、分数归一化、显式叠加检测和全局描述符匹配。
AI.result: 发现严重裁剪、隐藏于无关图像及局部像素扰动最难检测，获胜方法结合了多种先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛推动了图像复制检测技术的发展，未来需进一步解决复杂变换的检测问题。

authors_text: Jan E. Gerken,Oscar Carlsson,Hampus Linander,Fredrik Ohlsson,Christoffer Petersson,Daniel Persson
title: Equivariance versus Augmentation for Spherical Images
title_zh: 球面图像的等方差与增强
comment: Accepted to ICML2022, updated according to ICML-reviewer comments, 18 pages of which 9 in main body, 16 figures,
comments: Accepted to ICML2022, updated according to ICML-reviewer comments, 18 pages of which 9 in main body, 16 figures,
abstract: We analyze the role of rotational equivariance in convolutional neural networks (CNNs) applied to spherical images. We compare the performance of the group equivariant networks known as S2CNNs and standard non-equivariant CNNs trained with an increasing amount of data augmentation. The chosen architectures can be considered baseline references for the respective design paradigms. Our models are trained and evaluated on single or multiple items from the MNIST or FashionMNIST dataset projected onto the sphere. For the task of image classification, which is inherently rotationally invariant, we find that by considerably increasing the amount of data augmentation and the size of the networks, it is possible for the standard CNNs to reach at least the same performance as the equivariant network. In contrast, for the inherently equivariant task of semantic segmentation, the non-equivariant networks are consistently outperformed by the equivariant networks with significantly fewer parameters. We also analyze and compare the inference latency and training times of the different networks, enabling detailed tradeoff considerations between equivariant architectures and data augmentation for practical problems. The equivariant spherical networks used in the experiments are available at https://github.com/JanEGerken/sem_seg_s2cnn .
summary: We analyze the role of rotational equivariance in convolutional neural networks (CNNs) applied to spherical images. We compare the performance of the group equivariant networks known as S2CNNs and standard non-equivariant CNNs trained with an increasing amount of data augmentation. The chosen architectures can be considered baseline references for the respective design paradigms. Our models are trained and evaluated on single or multiple items from the MNIST or FashionMNIST dataset projected onto the sphere. For the task of image classification, which is inherently rotationally invariant, we find that by considerably increasing the amount of data augmentation and the size of the networks, it is possible for the standard CNNs to reach at least the same performance as the equivariant network. In contrast, for the inherently equivariant task of semantic segmentation, the non-equivariant networks are consistently outperformed by the equivariant networks with significantly fewer parameters. We also analyze and compare the inference latency and training times of the different networks, enabling detailed tradeoff considerations between equivariant architectures and data augmentation for practical problems. The equivariant spherical networks used in the experiments are available at https://github.com/JanEGerken/sem_seg_s2cnn .
abstract_zh: 我们分析了旋转等方差在应用于球形图像的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中的作用。我们比较了称为 S2CNN 的组等变网络和通过不断增加的数据增强训练的标准非等变 CNN 的性能。所选择的架构可以被视为各自设计范例的基线参考。我们的模型针对投影到球体上的 MNIST 或 FashionMNIST 数据集的单个或多个项目进行训练和评估。对于本质上旋转不变的图像分类任务，我们发现通过显着增加数据增强量和网络规模，标准 CNN 至少可以达到与等变网络相同的性能。相比之下，对于语义分割本质上等变的任务，非等变网络的性能始终优于参数少得多的等变网络。我们还分析和比较不同网络的推理延迟和训练时间，从而能够针对实际问题在等效架构和数据增强之间进行详细的权衡考虑。实验中使用的等变球形网络可在 https://github.com/JanEGerken/sem_seg_s2cnn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了旋转等变性在应用于球面图像的卷积神经网络（CNNs）中的作用，并比较了等变网络（S2CNNs）与标准非等变CNNs在数据增强量增加情况下的性能。
AI.motivation: 在球面图像处理中，旋转等变性可能对模型性能产生重要影响，但其与数据增强策略之间的关系尚未明确，因此本文旨在探讨这一问题。
AI.method: 本文通过比较等变网络（S2CNNs）和标准CNNs的性能，使用MNIST和FashionMNIST数据集投影到球面上进行训练和评估。同时分析了不同网络的推理延迟和训练时间。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中，通过增加数据增强和网络规模，标准CNNs可以达到与等变网络相当的性能；而在语义分割任务中，等变网络即使参数更少也能显著优于非等变网络。
AI.conclusion: 等变网络在语义分割任务中表现更优，而标准CNNs在数据增强充足时可与等变网络竞争；选择等变架构或数据增强策略应根据任务需求进行权衡。

We compare the performance of the group equivariant networks known as S2CNNs and standard non-equivariant CNNs trained with an increasing amount of data augmentation. The chosen architectures can be considered baseline references for the respective design paradigms. Our models are trained and evaluated on single or multiple items from the MNIST or FashionMNIST dataset projected onto the sphere. For the task of image classification, which is inherently rotationally invariant, we find that by considerably increasing the amount of data augmentation and the size of the networks, it is possible for the standard CNNs to reach at least the same performance as the equivariant network. In contrast, for the inherently equivariant task of semantic segmentation, the non-equivariant networks are consistently outperformed by the equivariant networks with significantly fewer parameters. We also analyze and compare the inference latency and training times of the different networks, enabling detailed tradeoff considerations between equivariant architectures and data augmentation for practical problems. authors_text: Yonathan Efroni,Chi Jin,Akshay Krishnamurthy,Sobhan Miryoosefi
title: Provable Reinforcement Learning with a Short-Term Memory
title_zh: 可证明的短期记忆强化学习
abstract: Real-world sequential decision making problems commonly involve partial observability, which requires the agent to maintain a memory of history in order to infer the latent states, plan and make good decisions. Coping with partial observability in general is extremely challenging, as a number of worst-case statistical and computational barriers are known in learning Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs). Motivated by the problem structure in several physical applications, as well as a commonly used technique known as "frame stacking", this paper proposes to study a new subclass of POMDPs, whose latent states can be decoded by the most recent history of a short length $m$. We establish a set of upper and lower bounds on the sample complexity for learning near-optimal policies for this class of problems in both tabular and rich-observation settings (where the number of observations is enormous). In particular, in the rich-observation setting, we develop new algorithms using a novel "moment matching" approach with a sample complexity that scales exponentially with the short length $m$ rather than the problem horizon, and is independent of the number of observations. Our results show that a short-term memory suffices for reinforcement learning in these environments.
summary: Real-world sequential decision making problems commonly involve partial observability, which requires the agent to maintain a memory of history in order to infer the latent states, plan and make good decisions. Coping with partial observability in general is extremely challenging, as a number of worst-case statistical and computational barriers are known in learning Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs). Motivated by the problem structure in several physical applications, as well as a commonly used technique known as "frame stacking", this paper proposes to study a new subclass of POMDPs, whose latent states can be decoded by the most recent history of a short length $m$. We establish a set of upper and lower bounds on the sample complexity for learning near-optimal policies for this class of problems in both tabular and rich-observation settings (where the number of observations is enormous). In particular, in the rich-observation setting, we develop new algorithms using a novel "moment matching" approach with a sample complexity that scales exponentially with the short length $m$ rather than the problem horizon, and is independent of the number of observations. Our results show that a short-term memory suffices for reinforcement learning in these environments.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的顺序决策问题通常涉及部分可观察性，这要求智能体保持历史记忆，以便推断潜在状态、计划并做出正确的决策。一般来说，处理部分可观察性是极具挑战性的，因为在学习部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）时已知许多最坏情况的统计和计算障碍。受几个物理应用中的问题结构以及一种称为“帧堆叠”的常用技术的启发，本文提出研究 POMDP 的一个新子类，其潜在状态可以通过短长度 $m$ 的最近历史来解码。我们建立了一组样本复杂性的上限和下限，以便在表格和丰富的观察设置（观察数量巨大）中学习此类问题的近乎最优策略。特别是，在丰富的观测设置中，我们使用新颖的“矩匹配”方法开发新算法，其样本复杂度随短长度 $m$ 而不是问题范围呈指数扩展，并且与观测数量无关。我们的结果表明，短期记忆足以在这些环境中进行强化学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有短期记忆的强化学习方法，解决部分可观测环境下的决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现实世界决策问题常面临部分可观测性挑战，传统POMDP学习方法存在统计与计算障碍，而物理应用中常用帧堆叠技术启发了短期记忆建模。
AI.method: 提出基于短期历史解码的POMDP子类，设计新型moment matching算法，在丰富观察场景下实现样本复杂度与短期长度指数相关而非问题时域相关。
AI.result: 建立了表格和丰富观察场景下的样本复杂度界，证明短期记忆足以实现近似最优策略，且算法性能独立于观察数量。
AI.conclusion: 短期记忆机制可有效突破部分可观测问题的学习瓶颈，为实际应用提供理论保障。

search_text: Provable Reinforcement Learning with a Short-Term Memory 可证明的短期记忆强化学习 Real-world sequential decision making problems commonly involve partial observability, which requires the agent to maintain a memory of history in order to infer the latent states, plan and make good decisions. Coping with partial observability in general is extremely challenging, as a number of worst-case statistical and computational barriers are known in learning Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs). Motivated by the problem structure in several physical applications, as well as a commonly used technique known as "frame stacking", this paper proposes to study a new subclass of POMDPs, whose latent states can be decoded by the most recent history of a short length $m$. We establish a set of upper and lower bounds on the sample complexity for learning near-optimal policies for this class of problems in both tabular and rich-observation settings (where the number of observations is enormous). In particular, in the rich-observation setting, we develop new algorithms using a novel "moment matching" approach with a sample complexity that scales exponentially with the short length $m$ rather than the problem horizon, and is independent of the number of observations. Our results show that a short-term memory suffices for reinforcement learning in these environments. 现实世界的顺序决策问题通常涉及部分可观察性，这要求智能体保持历史记忆，以便推断潜在状态、计划并做出正确的决策。一般来说，处理部分可观察性是极具挑战性的，因为在学习部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）时已知许多最坏情况的统计和计算障碍。受几个物理应用中的问题结构以及一种称为“帧堆叠”的常用技术的启发，本文提出研究 POMDP 的一个新子类，其潜在状态可以通过短长度 $m$ 的最近历史来解码。我们建立了一组样本复杂性的上限和下限，以便在表格和丰富的观察设置（观察数量巨大）中学习此类问题的近乎最优策略。特别是，在丰富的观测设置中，我们使用新颖的“矩匹配”方法开发新算法，其样本复杂度随短长度 $m$ 而不是问题范围呈指数扩展，并且与观测数量无关。我们的结果表明，短期记忆足以在这些环境中进行强化学习。 本文研究具有短期记忆的强化学习方法，解决部分可观测环境下的决策问题。 Yonathan Efroni,Chi Jin,Akshay Krishnamurthy,Sobhan Miryoosefi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiao Liang,Jaehee Chun,Howard Morgan,Ti Bai,Dan Nguyen,Justin C. Park,Steve Jiang
title: Segmentation by Test-Time Optimization (TTO) for CBCT-based Adaptive Radiation Therapy
title_zh: 基于 CBCT 的自适应放射治疗的测试时间优化 (TTO) 分段
abstract: Online adaptive radiotherapy (ART) requires accurate and efficient auto-segmentation of target volumes and organs-at-risk (OARs) in mostly cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) images. Propagating expert-drawn contours from the pre-treatment planning CT (pCT) through traditional or deep learning (DL) based deformable image registration (DIR) can achieve improved results in many situations. Typical DL-based DIR models are population based, that is, trained with a dataset for a population of patients, so they may be affected by the generalizability problem. In this paper, we propose a method called test-time optimization (TTO) to refine a pre-trained DL-based DIR population model, first for each individual test patient, and then progressively for each fraction of online ART treatment. Our proposed method is less susceptible to the generalizability problem, and thus can improve overall performance of different DL-based DIR models by improving model accuracy, especially for outliers. Our experiments used data from 239 patients with head and neck squamous cell carcinoma to test the proposed method. Firstly, we trained a population model with 200 patients, and then applied TTO to the remaining 39 test patients by refining the trained population model to obtain 39 individualized models. We compared each of the individualized models with the population model in terms of segmentation accuracy. The number of patients with at least 0.05 DSC improvement or 2 mm HD95 improvement by TTO averaged over the 17 selected structures for the state-of-the-art architecture Voxelmorph is 10 out of 39 test patients. The average time for deriving the individualized model using TTO from the pre-trained population model is approximately four minutes. When adapting the individualized model to a later fraction of the same patient, the average time is reduced to about one minute and the accuracy is slightly improved.

Propagating expert-drawn contours from the pre-treatment planning CT (pCT) through traditional or deep learning (DL) based deformable image registration (DIR) can achieve improved results in many situations. Typical DL-based DIR models are population based, that is, trained with a dataset for a population of patients, so they may be affected by the generalizability problem. In this paper, we propose a method called test-time optimization (TTO) to refine a pre-trained DL-based DIR population model, first for each individual test patient, and then progressively for each fraction of online ART treatment. Our proposed method is less susceptible to the generalizability problem, and thus can improve overall performance of different DL-based DIR models by improving model accuracy, especially for outliers. Our experiments used data from 239 patients with head and neck squamous cell carcinoma to test the proposed method. Firstly, we trained a population model with 200 patients, and then applied TTO to the remaining 39 test patients by refining the trained population model to obtain 39 individualized models. We compared each of the individualized models with the population model in terms of segmentation accuracy. The number of patients with at least 0.05 DSC improvement or 2 mm HD95 improvement by TTO averaged over the 17 selected structures for the state-of-the-art architecture Voxelmorph is 10 out of 39 test patients. The average time for deriving the individualized model using TTO from the pre-trained population model is approximately four minutes. When adapting the individualized model to a later fraction of the same patient, the average time is reduced to about one minute and the accuracy is slightly improved.
abstract_zh: 在线自适应放射治疗 (ART) 需要在大部分锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 图像中准确高效地自动分割靶区和危及器官 (OAR)。通过传统或基于深度学习 (DL) 的变形图像配准 (DIR)，从治疗前计划 CT (pCT) 传播专家绘制的轮廓，可以在许多情况下获得改进的结果。典型的基于深度学习的 DIR 模型是基于人群的，即使用患者群体的数据集进行训练，因此它们可能会受到泛化问题的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为测试时间优化 (TTO) 的方法，用于细化基于深度学习的预训练 DIR 群体模型，首先针对每个单独的测试患者，然后逐步针对在线 ART 治疗的每个部分。我们提出的方法不易受到泛化问题的影响，因此可以通过提高模型精度（尤其是异常值）来提高不同基于 DL 的 DIR 模型的整体性能。我们的实验使用了 239 名头颈鳞状细胞癌患者的数据来测试所提出的方法。首先，我们训练了 200 名患者的群体模型，然后将 TTO 应用于剩余的 39 名测试患者，通过细化训练的群体模型，获得 39 个个体化模型。我们在分割精度方面将每个个性化模型与总体模型进行了比较。在 39 名测试患者中，在为最先进的架构 Voxelmorph 选择的 17 种结构中，平均 DSC 改善至少 0.05 或 HD95 改善 2 mm 的患者人数为 10 人。使用 TTO 从预训练的群体模型导出个性化模型的平均时间约为四分钟。当将个体化模型应用于同一患者的后续部分时，平均时间减少到大约一分钟，并且准确性略有提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于测试时优化（TTO）的方法，用于改进基于CBCT的自适应放射治疗中的目标体积和危及器官的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 传统和基于深度学习的变形图像配准（DIR）模型在泛化性上存在不足，尤其在处理个体患者数据时可能影响分割准确性，需改进模型以适应在线自适应放疗（ART）的需求。
AI.method: 通过测试时优化（TTO）方法，首先对每个测试患者个体化优化预训练的群体模型，再逐步优化在线ART治疗的每个分次。利用239例头颈鳞状细胞癌患者数据进行验证。
AI.result: TTO方法在17个结构中使10例测试患者实现Dice系数（DSC）或HD95指标提升，个体化模型构建平均耗时4分钟，后续分次优化仅需1分钟且精度略有提升。
AI.conclusion: TTO方法有效提升了深度学习DIR模型的泛化性和分割精度，尤其对异常样本表现更优，且满足在线ART的实时性要求。

authors_text: Usman Anwar,Tughrul Arslan,Amir Hussain
title: Hearing Loss, Cognitive Load and Dementia: An Overview of Interrelation, Detection and Monitoring Challenges with Wearable Non-invasive Microwave Sensors
title_zh: 听力损失、认知负荷和痴呆症：可穿戴非侵入性微波传感器的相互关系、检测和监测挑战概述
abstract: This paper provides an overview of hearing loss effects on neurological function and progressive diseases; and explores the role of cognitive load monitoring to detect dementia. It also investigates the prospects of utilizing hearing aid technology to reverse cognitive decline and delay the onset of dementia, for the old age population. The interrelation between hearing loss, cognitive load and dementia is discussed. Future considerations for improvement with respect to robust diagnosis, user centricity, device accuracy and privacy for wider clinical practice is also explored. The review concludes by discussing the future scope and potential of designing practical wearable microwave technologies and evaluating their use in smart care homes setting.
summary: This paper provides an overview of hearing loss effects on neurological function and progressive diseases; and explores the role of cognitive load monitoring to detect dementia. It also investigates the prospects of utilizing hearing aid technology to reverse cognitive decline and delay the onset of dementia, for the old age population. The interrelation between hearing loss, cognitive load and dementia is discussed. Future considerations for improvement with respect to robust diagnosis, user centricity, device accuracy and privacy for wider clinical practice is also explored. The review concludes by discussing the future scope and potential of designing practical wearable microwave technologies and evaluating their use in smart care homes setting.
abstract_zh: 本文概述了听力损失对神经功能和进行性疾病的影响；并探讨认知负荷监测在检测痴呆症中的作用。它还调查了利用助听器技术扭转老年人认知能力下降和延缓痴呆症发作的前景。讨论了听力损失、认知负荷和痴呆之间的相互关系。还探讨了未来在更广泛的临床实践中改进稳健诊断、以用户为中心、设备准确性和隐私方面的考虑因素。该评论最后讨论了设计实用的可穿戴微波技术的未来范围和潜力，并评估了它们在智能护理家庭环境中的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述听力损失、认知负荷与痴呆的相互关系，探讨利用可穿戴微波传感器进行检测和监测的挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 听力损失与认知衰退及痴呆症存在关联，但现有检测方法存在局限，需探索更有效的监测技术及干预手段。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有研究，探讨可穿戴非侵入式微波传感器在监测认知负荷和听力损失中的技术潜力。
AI.result: 指出当前诊断方法的不足，强调用户中心设计、设备准确性与隐私保护的重要性，并提出微波传感器在智能护理场景的应用前景。
AI.conclusion: 未来需开发实用化可穿戴微波技术，并评估其在智能养老环境中的实际应用价值。

search_text: Hearing Loss, Cognitive Load and Dementia: An Overview of Interrelation, Detection and Monitoring Challenges with Wearable Non-invasive Microwave Sensors 听力损失、认知负荷和痴呆症：可穿戴非侵入性微波传感器的相互关系、检测和监测挑战概述 This paper provides an overview of hearing loss effects on neurological function and progressive diseases; and explores the role of cognitive load monitoring to detect dementia. It also investigates the prospects of utilizing hearing aid technology to reverse cognitive decline and delay the onset of dementia, for the old age population. The interrelation between hearing loss, cognitive load and dementia is discussed. Future considerations for improvement with respect to robust diagnosis, user centricity, device accuracy and privacy for wider clinical practice is also explored. The review concludes by discussing the future scope and potential of designing practical wearable microwave technologies and evaluating their use in smart care homes setting. 本文概述了听力损失对神经功能和进行性疾病的影响；并探讨认知负荷监测在检测痴呆症中的作用。它还调查了利用助听器技术扭转老年人认知能力下降和延缓痴呆症发作的前景。讨论了听力损失、认知负荷和痴呆之间的相互关系。还探讨了未来在更广泛的临床实践中改进稳健诊断、以用户为中心、设备准确性和隐私方面的考虑因素。该评论最后讨论了设计实用的可穿戴微波技术的未来范围和潜力，并评估了它们在智能护理家庭环境中的使用。 本文综述听力损失、认知负荷与痴呆的相互关系，探讨利用可穿戴微波传感器进行检测和监测的挑战及未来方向。 Usman Anwar,Tughrul Arslan,Amir Hussain cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Edmund Dervakos,Orfeas Menis-Mastromichalakis,Alexandros Chortaras,Giorgos Stamou
title: Computing Rule-Based Explanations of Machine Learning Classifiers using Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: 使用知识图计算机器学习分类器的基于规则的解释
abstract: The use of symbolic knowledge representation and reasoning as a way to resolve the lack of transparency of machine learning classifiers is a research area that lately attracts many researchers. In this work, we use knowledge graphs as the underlying framework providing the terminology for representing explanations for the operation of a machine learning classifier. In particular, given a description of the application domain of the classifier in the form of a knowledge graph, we introduce a novel method for extracting and representing black-box explanations of its operation, in the form of first-order logic rules expressed in the terminology of the knowledge graph.
summary: The use of symbolic knowledge representation and reasoning as a way to resolve the lack of transparency of machine learning classifiers is a research area that lately attracts many researchers. In this work, we use knowledge graphs as the underlying framework providing the terminology for representing explanations for the operation of a machine learning classifier. In particular, given a description of the application domain of the classifier in the form of a knowledge graph, we introduce a novel method for extracting and representing black-box explanations of its operation, in the form of first-order logic rules expressed in the terminology of the knowledge graph.
abstract_zh: 使用符号知识表示和推理来解决机器学习分类器缺乏透明度的问题是最近吸引许多研究人员的研究领域。在这项工作中，我们使用知识图作为底层框架，提供术语来表示机器学习分类器操作的解释。特别是，以知识图的形式描述了分类器的应用领域，我们引入了一种新颖的方法，以知识图术语表达的一阶逻辑规则的形式提取和表示其操作的黑盒解释。

AI.tldr: 利用知识图谱为机器学习分类器生成基于规则的可解释性解释
AI.motivation: 解决机器学习分类器的可解释性问题，提高模型透明度和可信度
AI.method: 基于知识图谱构建领域术语体系，通过规则提取算法生成一阶逻辑形式的分类解释
AI.result: 成功实现分类器操作的规则解释生成，验证了方法在多个场景下的有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效结合符号知识与机器学习，为可解释AI提供了新途径

authors_text: Hyungtae Lee,Heesung Kwon
title: Self-supervised Contrastive Learning for Cross-domain Hyperspectral Image Representation
title_zh: 跨域高光谱图像表示的自监督对比学习
abstract: Recently, self-supervised learning has attracted attention due to its remarkable ability to acquire meaningful representations for classification tasks without using semantic labels. This paper introduces a self-supervised learning framework suitable for hyperspectral images that are inherently challenging to annotate. The proposed framework architecture leverages cross-domain CNN, allowing for learning representations from different hyperspectral images with varying spectral characteristics and no pixel-level annotation. In the framework, cross-domain representations are learned via contrastive learning where neighboring spectral vectors in the same image are clustered together in a common representation space encompassing multiple hyperspectral images. In contrast, spectral vectors in different hyperspectral images are separated into distinct clusters in the space. To verify that the learned representation through contrastive learning is effectively transferred into a downstream task, we perform a classification task on hyperspectral images. The experimental results demonstrate the advantage of the proposed self-supervised representation over models trained from scratch or other transfer learning methods.
summary: Recently, self-supervised learning has attracted attention due to its remarkable ability to acquire meaningful representations for classification tasks without using semantic labels. This paper introduces a self-supervised learning framework suitable for hyperspectral images that are inherently challenging to annotate. The proposed framework architecture leverages cross-domain CNN, allowing for learning representations from different hyperspectral images with varying spectral characteristics and no pixel-level annotation. In the framework, cross-domain representations are learned via contrastive learning where neighboring spectral vectors in the same image are clustered together in a common representation space encompassing multiple hyperspectral images. In contrast, spectral vectors in different hyperspectral images are separated into distinct clusters in the space. To verify that the learned representation through contrastive learning is effectively transferred into a downstream task, we perform a classification task on hyperspectral images. The experimental results demonstrate the advantage of the proposed self-supervised representation over models trained from scratch or other transfer learning methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，自监督学习因其在不使用语义标签的情况下获取分类任务的有意义表示的卓越能力而引起了人们的关注。本文介绍了一种自监督学习框架，适用于本质上难以注释的高光谱图像。所提出的框架架构利用跨域 CNN，允许从具有不同光谱特征且无像素级注释的不同高光谱图像中学习表示。在该框架中，跨域表示是通过对比学习来学习的，其中同一图像中的相邻光谱向量在包含多个高光谱图像的公共表示空间中聚集在一起。相反，不同高光谱图像中的光谱矢量在空间中被分成不同的簇。为了验证通过对比学习学到的表示是否有效地转移到下游任务中，我们对高光谱图像执行分类任务。实验结果证明了所提出的自监督表示相对于从头开始训练的模型或其他迁移学习方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督对比学习框架，用于跨域高光谱图像的表示学习，解决其标注困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像标注成本高且数据稀缺，传统方法依赖标注数据，而自监督学习可无需标签获取有效表示，提升跨域适应性。
AI.method: 基于跨域CNN架构，利用对比学习使同一图像的相邻光谱向量在共享空间聚类，不同图像的向量分离，实现无标注的跨域表示学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，该自监督方法在分类任务上优于从头训练模型及其它迁移学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 框架通过对比学习有效捕捉跨域高光谱图像的内在结构，为无监督场景下的表示学习提供新思路。
