authors_text: Xiaotong Li,Yongxing Dai,Yixiao Ge,Jun Liu,Ying Shan,Ling-Yu Duan
title: Uncertainty Modeling for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 分布外泛化的不确定性建模
abstract: Though remarkable progress has been achieved in various vision tasks, deep neural networks still suffer obvious performance degradation when tested in out-of-distribution scenarios. We argue that the feature statistics (mean and standard deviation), which carry the domain characteristics of the training data, can be properly manipulated to improve the generalization ability of deep learning models. Common methods often consider the feature statistics as deterministic values measured from the learned features and do not explicitly consider the uncertain statistics discrepancy caused by potential domain shifts during testing. In this paper, we improve the network generalization ability by modeling the uncertainty of domain shifts with synthesized feature statistics during training. Specifically, we hypothesize that the feature statistic, after considering the potential uncertainties, follows a multivariate Gaussian distribution. Hence, each feature statistic is no longer a deterministic value, but a probabilistic point with diverse distribution possibilities. With the uncertain feature statistics, the models can be trained to alleviate the domain perturbations and achieve better robustness against potential domain shifts. Our method can be readily integrated into networks without additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method consistently improves the network generalization ability on multiple vision tasks, including image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance retrieval. The code can be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/DSU.
summary: Though remarkable progress has been achieved in various vision tasks, deep neural networks still suffer obvious performance degradation when tested in out-of-distribution scenarios. We argue that the feature statistics (mean and standard deviation), which carry the domain characteristics of the training data, can be properly manipulated to improve the generalization ability of deep learning models. Common methods often consider the feature statistics as deterministic values measured from the learned features and do not explicitly consider the uncertain statistics discrepancy caused by potential domain shifts during testing. In this paper, we improve the network generalization ability by modeling the uncertainty of domain shifts with synthesized feature statistics during training. Specifically, we hypothesize that the feature statistic, after considering the potential uncertainties, follows a multivariate Gaussian distribution. Hence, each feature statistic is no longer a deterministic value, but a probabilistic point with diverse distribution possibilities. With the uncertain feature statistics, the models can be trained to alleviate the domain perturbations and achieve better robustness against potential domain shifts. Our method can be readily integrated into networks without additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method consistently improves the network generalization ability on multiple vision tasks, including image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance retrieval. The code can be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/DSU.
abstract_zh: 尽管在各种视觉任务中取得了显着的进展，但深度神经网络在分布外场景中测试时仍然遭受明显的性能下降。我们认为，可以适当地操纵承载训练数据领域特征的特征统计量（均值和标准差）来提高深度学习模型的泛化能力。常见的方法通常将特征统计量视为根据学习特征测量的确定性值，并且没有明确考虑测试期间由潜在域转移引起的不确定统计差异。在本文中，我们通过在训练过程中使用综合特征统计量对域转移的不确定性进行建模来提高网络泛化能力。具体来说，我们假设在考虑潜在的不确定性后，特征统计量遵循多元高斯分布。因此，每个特征统计量不再是确定性值，而是具有多种分布可能性的概率点。利用不确定的特征统计数据，可以训练模型来减轻域扰动并针对潜在的域变化实现更好的鲁棒性。我们的方法可以轻松集成到网络中，无需额外参数。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法持续提高了多个视觉任务上的网络泛化能力，包括图像分类、语义分割和实例检索。代码可以在 https://github.com/lixiaotong97/DSU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过建模领域偏移的不确定性来提升深度学习模型在分布外场景下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将特征统计量视为确定性值，未考虑测试时潜在领域偏移导致的统计不确定性，导致模型在分布外场景表现不佳。
AI.method: 假设特征统计量服从多元高斯分布，将其建模为概率点而非确定值，并在训练中合成不确定特征统计量以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和实例检索等任务中，该方法显著提升模型泛化能力，且无需额外参数。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模特征统计不确定性，该方法有效提升了模型对领域偏移的鲁棒性，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: Uncertainty Modeling for Out-of-Distribution Generalization 分布外泛化的不确定性建模 Though remarkable progress has been achieved in various vision tasks, deep neural networks still suffer obvious performance degradation when tested in out-of-distribution scenarios. We argue that the feature statistics (mean and standard deviation), which carry the domain characteristics of the training data, can be properly manipulated to improve the generalization ability of deep learning models. Common methods often consider the feature statistics as deterministic values measured from the learned features and do not explicitly consider the uncertain statistics discrepancy caused by potential domain shifts during testing. In this paper, we improve the network generalization ability by modeling the uncertainty of domain shifts with synthesized feature statistics during training. Specifically, we hypothesize that the feature statistic, after considering the potential uncertainties, follows a multivariate Gaussian distribution. Hence, each feature statistic is no longer a deterministic value, but a probabilistic point with diverse distribution possibilities. With the uncertain feature statistics, the models can be trained to alleviate the domain perturbations and achieve better robustness against potential domain shifts. Our method can be readily integrated into networks without additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method consistently improves the network generalization ability on multiple vision tasks, including image classification, semantic segmentation, and instance retrieval. The code can be available at https://github.com/lixiaotong97/DSU. 尽管在各种视觉任务中取得了显着的进展，但深度神经网络在分布外场景中测试时仍然遭受明显的性能下降。我们认为，可以适当地操纵承载训练数据领域特征的特征统计量（均值和标准差）来提高深度学习模型的泛化能力。常见的方法通常将特征统计量视为根据学习特征测量的确定性值，并且没有明确考虑测试期间由潜在域转移引起的不确定统计差异。在本文中，我们通过在训练过程中使用综合特征统计量对域转移的不确定性进行建模来提高网络泛化能力。具体来说，我们假设在考虑潜在的不确定性后，特征统计量遵循多元高斯分布。因此，每个特征统计量不再是确定性值，而是具有多种分布可能性的概率点。利用不确定的特征统计数据，可以训练模型来减轻域扰动并针对潜在的域变化实现更好的鲁棒性。我们的方法可以轻松集成到网络中，无需额外参数。大量实验表明，我们提出的方法持续提高了多个视觉任务上的网络泛化能力，包括图像分类、语义分割和实例检索。代码可以在 https://github.com/lixiaotong97/DSU 获取。 本文提出通过建模领域偏移的不确定性来提升深度学习模型在分布外场景下的泛化能力。 Xiaotong Li,Yongxing Dai,Yixiao Ge,Jun Liu,Ying Shan,Ling-Yu Duan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nader Zare,Ashkan Keshavarzi,Seyed Ehsan Beheshtian,Hadi Mowla,Aryan Akbarpour,Hossein Jafari,Keyvan Arab Baraghi,Mohammad Amin Zarifi,Reza Javidan
title: Cyrus 2D Simulation Team Description Paper 2016
title_zh: Cyrus 2D 仿真团队描述论文 2016
abstract: This description includes some explanation about algorithms and also algorithms that are being implemented by Cyrus team members. The objectives of this description are to express a brief explanation about shoot, block, mark and defensive decision will be given. It also explained about the parts that has been implemented. The base code that Cyrus used is agent 3.11.
summary: This description includes some explanation about algorithms and also algorithms that are being implemented by Cyrus team members. The objectives of this description are to express a brief explanation about shoot, block, mark and defensive decision will be given. It also explained about the parts that has been implemented. The base code that Cyrus used is agent 3.11.
abstract_zh: 此描述包括有关算法以及 Cyrus 团队成员正在实现的算法的一些解释。本描述的目的是对投篮、盖帽、盯防和防守决策进行简要说明。它还解释了已实施的部分。 Cyrus 使用的基本代码是 Agent 3.11。

AI.tldr: Cyrus团队在2016年2D模拟比赛中描述其算法实现与策略设计，涵盖射击、防守等核心决策模块。
AI.motivation: 为在机器人足球模拟竞赛中提升团队协作与战术执行效率，明确算法设计思路与实现进展。
AI.method: 基于Agent 3.11框架开发，实现包括射击、阻挡、标记及防守决策的算法模块，并整合至模拟系统中。
AI.result: 完成关键战术决策算法的编码与验证，形成可运行的团队策略框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过模块化设计实现了基础战术功能，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性与动态环境适应性。

authors_text: Iuliia Nigmatulina,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Amrutha Prasad,Seyyed Saeed Sarfjoo,Petr Motlicek
title: A two-step approach to leverage contextual data: speech recognition in air-traffic communications
title_zh: 利用上下文数据的两步方法：空中交通通信中的语音识别
comment: 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.12156
comments: 20XX IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.12156
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), as the assistance of speech communication between pilots and air-traffic controllers, can significantly reduce the complexity of the task and increase the reliability of transmitted information. ASR application can lead to a lower number of incidents caused by misunderstanding and improve air traffic management (ATM) efficiency. Evidently, high accuracy predictions, especially, of key information, i.e., callsigns and commands, are required to minimize the risk of errors. We prove that combining the benefits of ASR and Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to make use of surveillance data (i.e. additional modality) helps to considerably improve the recognition of callsigns (named entity). In this paper, we investigate a two-step callsign boosting approach: (1) at the 1 step (ASR), weights of probable callsign n-grams are reduced in G.fst and/or in the decoding FST (lattices), (2) at the 2 step (NLP), callsigns extracted from the improved recognition outputs with Named Entity Recognition (NER) are correlated with the surveillance data to select the most suitable one. Boosting callsign n-grams with the combination of ASR and NLP methods eventually leads up to 53.7% of an absolute, or 60.4% of a relative, improvement in callsign recognition.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), as the assistance of speech communication between pilots and air-traffic controllers, can significantly reduce the complexity of the task and increase the reliability of transmitted information. ASR application can lead to a lower number of incidents caused by misunderstanding and improve air traffic management (ATM) efficiency. Evidently, high accuracy predictions, especially, of key information, i.e., callsigns and commands, are required to minimize the risk of errors. We prove that combining the benefits of ASR and Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to make use of surveillance data (i.e. additional modality) helps to considerably improve the recognition of callsigns (named entity). In this paper, we investigate a two-step callsign boosting approach: (1) at the 1 step (ASR), weights of probable callsign n-grams are reduced in G.fst and/or in the decoding FST (lattices), (2) at the 2 step (NLP), callsigns extracted from the improved recognition outputs with Named Entity Recognition (NER) are correlated with the surveillance data to select the most suitable one. Boosting callsign n-grams with the combination of ASR and NLP methods eventually leads up to 53.7% of an absolute, or 60.4% of a relative, improvement in callsign recognition.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）作为飞行员和空中交通管制员之间语音通信的辅助，可以显着降低任务的复杂性并提高传输信息的可靠性。 ASR应用可以减少因误解引起的事故数量并提高空中交通管理（ATM）效率。显然，需要高精度预测，特别是关键信息（即呼号和命令）的预测，以最大限度地减少错误风险。我们证明，结合 ASR 和自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法的优点来利用监视数据（即附加模态）有助于显着提高对呼号（命名实体）的识别。在本文中，我们研究了一种两步呼号增强方法：（1）在第 1 步（ASR），可能的呼号 n-gram 的权重在 G.fst 和/或解码 FST（格）中减少，（2）在第 2 步（NLP），从使用命名实体识别（NER）改进的识别输出中提取的呼号与监视数据相关，以选择最合适的呼号。通过结合 ASR 和 NLP 方法来增强呼号 n 元语法，最终使呼号识别的绝对改善达到 53.7%，相对改善达到 60.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两步方法，结合语音识别（ASR）与自然语言处理（NLP）技术，通过利用监控数据提升空中交通通信中呼号识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 空中交通通信中，呼号和指令的识别错误可能导致严重事故，需提高关键信息识别准确率以增强通信可靠性与管理效率。
AI.method: 两步法：1）在ASR阶段通过调整G.fst或解码FST中的呼号n-gram权重优化识别；2）利用NLP中的命名实体识别（NER）结合监控数据筛选最优呼号。
AI.result: 呼号识别准确率绝对值提升53.7%，相对提升60.4%。
AI.conclusion: 融合ASR与NLP方法可显著提升关键信息识别性能，为安全高效的空中交通管理提供技术支撑。

ai_content.result: 呼号识别准确率绝对值提升53.7%，相对提升60.4%。
ai_content.conclusion: 融合ASR与NLP方法可显著提升关键信息识别性能，为安全高效的空中交通管理提供技术支撑。

We prove that combining the benefits of ASR and Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to make use of surveillance data (i.e. additional modality) helps to considerably improve the recognition of callsigns (named entity). In this paper, we investigate a two-step callsign boosting approach: (1) at the 1 step (ASR), weights of probable callsign n-grams are reduced in G.fst and/or in the decoding FST (lattices), (2) at the 2 step (NLP), callsigns extracted from the improved recognition outputs with Named Entity Recognition (NER) are correlated with the surveillance data to select the most suitable one. Boosting callsign n-grams with the combination of ASR and NLP methods eventually leads up to 53.7% of an absolute, or 60.4% of a relative, improvement in callsign recognition. 自动语音识别（ASR）作为飞行员和空中交通管制员之间语音通信的辅助，可以显着降低任务的复杂性并提高传输信息的可靠性。 ASR应用可以减少因误解引起的事故数量并提高空中交通管理（ATM）效率。显然，需要高精度预测，特别是关键信息（即呼号和命令）的预测，以最大限度地减少错误风险。我们证明，结合 ASR 和自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法的优点来利用监视数据（即附加模态）有助于显着提高对呼号（命名实体）的识别。在本文中，我们研究了一种两步呼号增强方法：（1）在第 1 步（ASR），可能的呼号 n-gram 的权重在 G.fst 和/或解码 FST（格）中减少，（2）在第 2 步（NLP），从使用命名实体识别（NER）改进的识别输出中提取的呼号与监视数据相关，以选择最合适的呼号。通过结合 ASR 和 NLP 方法来增强呼号 n 元语法，最终使呼号识别的绝对改善达到 53.7%，相对改善达到 60.4%。 本文提出一种两步方法，结合语音识别（ASR）与自然语言处理（NLP）技术，通过利用监控数据提升空中交通通信中呼号识别的准确性。 Iuliia Nigmatulina,Juan Zuluaga-Gomez,Amrutha Prasad,Seyyed Saeed Sarfjoo,Petr Motlicek cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Robin Kips,Panagiotis-Alexandros Bokaris,Matthieu Perrot,Pietro Gori,Isabelle Bloch
title: Hair Color Digitization through Imaging and Deep Inverse Graphics
title_zh: 通过成像和深度逆图形实现头发颜色数字化
abstract: Hair appearance is a complex phenomenon due to hair geometry and how the light bounces on different hair fibers. For this reason, reproducing a specific hair color in a rendering environment is a challenging task that requires manual work and expert knowledge in computer graphics to tune the result visually. While current hair capture methods focus on hair shape estimation many applications could benefit from an automated method for capturing the appearance of a physical hair sample, from augmented/virtual reality to hair dying development. Building on recent advances in inverse graphics and material capture using deep neural networks, we introduce a novel method for hair color digitization. Our proposed pipeline allows capturing the color appearance of a physical hair sample and renders synthetic images of hair with a similar appearance, simulating different hair styles and/or lighting environments. Since rendering realistic hair images requires path-tracing rendering, the conventional inverse graphics approach based on differentiable rendering is untractable. Our method is based on the combination of a controlled imaging device, a path-tracing renderer, and an inverse graphics model based on self-supervised machine learning, which does not require to use differentiable rendering to be trained. We illustrate the performance of our hair digitization method on both real and synthetic images and show that our approach can accurately capture and render hair color.
summary: Hair appearance is a complex phenomenon due to hair geometry and how the light bounces on different hair fibers. For this reason, reproducing a specific hair color in a rendering environment is a challenging task that requires manual work and expert knowledge in computer graphics to tune the result visually. Our proposed pipeline allows capturing the color appearance of a physical hair sample and renders synthetic images of hair with a similar appearance, simulating different hair styles and/or lighting environments. Since rendering realistic hair images requires path-tracing rendering, the conventional inverse graphics approach based on differentiable rendering is untractable. Our method is based on the combination of a controlled imaging device, a path-tracing renderer, and an inverse graphics model based on self-supervised machine learning, which does not require to use differentiable rendering to be trained. We illustrate the performance of our hair digitization method on both real and synthetic images and show that our approach can accurately capture and render hair color.
abstract_zh: 由于头发的几何形状以及光线在不同头发纤维上的反射方式，头发外观是一种复杂的现象。因此，在渲染环境中再现特定的头发颜色是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要手动工作和计算机图形学方面的专业知识来视觉上调整结果。虽然当前的头发捕获方法侧重于头发形状估计，但许多应用可以受益于捕获物理头发样本外观的自动化方法，从增强/虚拟现实到染发开发。基于使用深度神经网络的逆向图形和材料捕获的最新进展，我们引入了一种用于头发颜色数字化的新颖方法。我们提出的管道允许捕获物理头发样本的颜色外观，并渲染具有相似外观的头发合成图像，模拟不同的发型和/或照明环境。由于渲染真实的头发图像需要路径跟踪渲染，因此基于可微渲染的传统逆向图形方法难以处理。我们的方法基于受控成像设备、路径跟踪渲染器和基于自监督机器学习的逆向图形模型的组合，不需要使用可微渲染进行训练。我们说明了头发数字化方法在真实图像和合成图像上的性能，并表明我们的方法可以准确捕获和渲染头发颜色。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过成像和深度逆向图形技术自动捕捉物理头发样本颜色外观并生成合成图像的方法。
AI.motivation: 当前头发捕捉方法主要关注形状估计，而颜色外观的自动化捕捉在虚拟现实、染发开发等领域存在需求，传统方法依赖人工和专家知识，效率低下。
AI.method: 结合受控成像设备、路径追踪渲染器和基于自监督机器学习的逆向图形模型，无需可微渲染即可实现头发颜色数字化。
AI.result: 在真实和合成图像上验证了方法的有效性，能够准确捕捉并渲染头发颜色。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为头发颜色数字化提供了自动化解决方案，可应用于虚拟现实、影视制作等需要逼真头发渲染的领域。

authors_text: Christian Reiser
title: Predicting and Visualizing Daily Mood of People Using Tracking Data of Consumer Devices and Services
title_zh: 使用消费设备和服务的跟踪数据预测和可视化人们的日常情绪
abstract: Users can easily export personal data from devices (e.g., weather station and fitness tracker) and services (e.g., screentime tracker and commits on GitHub) they use but struggle to gain valuable insights. To tackle this problem, we present the self-tracking meta app called InsightMe, which aims to show users how data relate to their wellbeing, health, and performance. This paper focuses on mood, which is closely associated with wellbeing. With data collected by one person, we show how a person's sleep, exercise, nutrition, weather, air quality, screentime, and work correlate to the average mood the person experiences during the day. Furthermore, the app predicts the mood via multiple linear regression and a neural network, achieving an explained variance of 0.55 and 0.50, respectively. We strive for explainability and transparency by showing the users p-values of the correlations, drawing prediction intervals. In addition, we conducted a small A-B test on illustrating how the original data influence predictions. The source code and app are available online.
summary: Users can easily export personal data from devices (e.g., weather station and fitness tracker) and services (e.g., screentime tracker and commits on GitHub) they use but struggle to gain valuable insights. To tackle this problem, we present the self-tracking meta app called InsightMe, which aims to show users how data relate to their wellbeing, health, and performance. This paper focuses on mood, which is closely associated with wellbeing. With data collected by one person, we show how a person's sleep, exercise, nutrition, weather, air quality, screentime, and work correlate to the average mood the person experiences during the day. Furthermore, the app predicts the mood via multiple linear regression and a neural network, achieving an explained variance of 0.55 and 0.50, respectively. We strive for explainability and transparency by showing the users p-values of the correlations, drawing prediction intervals. In addition, we conducted a small A-B test on illustrating how the original data influence predictions. The source code and app are available online.
abstract_zh: 用户可以轻松地从他们使用的设备（例如气象站和健身追踪器）和服务（例如屏幕时间跟踪器和 GitHub 上的提交）导出个人数据，但很难获得有价值的见解。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了名为 InsightMe 的自我跟踪元应用程序，旨在向用户展示数据与他们的福祉、健康和表现之间的关系。本文重点关注与幸福感密切相关的情绪。通过一个人收集的数据，我们可以显示一个人的睡眠、锻炼、营养、天气、空气质量、屏幕时间和工作与该人白天经历的平均情绪之间的关系。此外，该应用程序通过多元线性回归和神经网络预测情绪，分别实现 0.55 和 0.50 的解释方差。我们通过向用户显示相关性的 p 值、绘制预测区间来努力实现可解释性和透明度。此外，我们还进行了一个小型 A-B 测试来说明原始数据如何影响预测。源代码和应用程​​序可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款名为InsightMe的自追踪元应用，通过整合用户设备和服务数据（如睡眠、运动、天气等）预测并可视化个人每日情绪状态。
AI.motivation: 用户虽能导出个人设备和服务数据，但难以从中获得有价值的洞察，尤其缺乏对情绪与健康、工作表现之间关系的清晰理解。
AI.method: 基于单一用户数据，采用多元线性回归和神经网络模型预测情绪，通过p值、预测区间保证可解释性，并通过A-B测试验证数据对预测的影响。
AI.result: 线性回归和神经网络模型分别达到0.55和0.50的解释方差，A-B测试验证了数据影响的可视化效果，源代码和应用已开源。
AI.conclusion: InsightMe有效揭示了多维度数据与情绪的关联，通过透明预测和可视化帮助用户理解影响其幸福感的关键因素。

authors_text: Guhong Nie,Lirui Xiao,Menglong Zhu,Dongliang Chu,Yue Shen,Peng Li,Kang Yang,Li Du,Bo Chen
title: Binary Neural Networks as a general-propose compute paradigm for on-device computer vision
title_zh: 二元神经网络作为设备上计算机视觉的通用计算范例
abstract: For binary neural networks (BNNs) to become the mainstream on-device computer vision algorithm, they must achieve a superior speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff than 8-bit quantization and establish a similar degree of general applicability in vision tasks. To this end, we propose a BNN framework comprising 1) a minimalistic inference scheme for hardware-friendliness, 2) an over-parameterized training scheme for high accuracy, and 3) a simple procedure to adapt to different vision tasks. The resultant framework overtakes 8-bit quantization in the speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff for classification, detection, segmentation, super-resolution and matching: our BNNs not only retain the accuracy levels of their 8-bit baselines but also showcase 1.3-2.4$\times$ faster FPS on mobile CPUs. Similar conclusions can be drawn for prototypical systolic-array-based AI accelerators, where our BNNs promise 2.8-7$\times$ fewer execution cycles than 8-bit and 2.1-2.7$\times$ fewer cycles than alternative BNN designs. These results suggest that the time for large-scale BNN adoption could be upon us.
summary: For binary neural networks (BNNs) to become the mainstream on-device computer vision algorithm, they must achieve a superior speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff than 8-bit quantization and establish a similar degree of general applicability in vision tasks. To this end, we propose a BNN framework comprising 1) a minimalistic inference scheme for hardware-friendliness, 2) an over-parameterized training scheme for high accuracy, and 3) a simple procedure to adapt to different vision tasks. The resultant framework overtakes 8-bit quantization in the speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff for classification, detection, segmentation, super-resolution and matching: our BNNs not only retain the accuracy levels of their 8-bit baselines but also showcase 1.3-2.4$\times$ faster FPS on mobile CPUs. Similar conclusions can be drawn for prototypical systolic-array-based AI accelerators, where our BNNs promise 2.8-7$\times$ fewer execution cycles than 8-bit and 2.1-2.7$\times$ fewer cycles than alternative BNN designs. These results suggest that the time for large-scale BNN adoption could be upon us.
abstract_zh: 为了使二元神经网络 (BNN) 成为主流的设备端计算机视觉算法，它们必须实现比 8 位量化更好的速度与精度权衡，并在视觉任务中建立类似程度的普遍适用性。为此，我们提出了一个 BNN 框架，包括 1）硬件友好的简约推理方案，2）用于高精度的过参数化训练方案，3）适应不同视觉任务的简单程序。由此产生的框架在分类、检测、分割、超分辨率和匹配的速度与精度权衡中超越了 8 位量化：我们的 BNN 不仅保留了 8 位基线的精度水平，而且还在移动 CPU 上展示了 1.3-2.4$\times$ 的更快 FPS。对于基于脉动阵列的原型 AI 加速器也可以得出类似的结论，其中我们的 BNN 承诺比 8 位减少 2.8-7$\times$ 执行周期，比其他 BNN 设计减少 2.1-2.7$\times$ 周期。这些结果表明，大规模采用 BNN 的时机可能已经到来。

AI.motivation: 二值神经网络需克服速度与准确率的权衡问题，并需像8位量化一样适用于多种视觉任务，才能成为设备端主流算法。
AI.method: 提出包含三部分的BNN框架：1）硬件友好的极简推理方案；2）提升准确率的过参数化训练方案；3）适配不同视觉任务的简单迁移方法。
AI.result: 在分类、检测等任务中，BNN在移动CPU上比8位量化快1.3-2.4倍，保持相同准确率；在AI加速器上比8位量化少2.8-7倍计算周期，优于其他BNN设计。
AI.conclusion: BNN在速度与准确率上全面超越8位量化，表明其大规模设备端应用的时代可能已经到来。

authors_text: Jacob König,Mark Jenkins,Mike Mannion,Peter Barrie,Gordon Morison
title: What's Cracking? A Review and Analysis of Deep Learning Methods for Structural Crack Segmentation, Detection and Quantification
title_zh: 什么是开裂？结构裂纹分割、检测和量化的深度学习方法回顾与分析
abstract: Surface cracks are a very common indicator of potential structural faults. Their early detection and monitoring is an important factor in structural health monitoring. Left untreated, they can grow in size over time and require expensive repairs or maintenance. With recent advances in computer vision and deep learning algorithms, the automatic detection and segmentation of cracks for this monitoring process have become a major topic of interest. This review aims to give researchers an overview of the published work within the field of crack analysis algorithms that make use of deep learning. It outlines the various tasks that are solved through applying computer vision algorithms to surface cracks in a structural health monitoring setting and also provides in-depth reviews of recent fully, semi and unsupervised approaches that perform crack classification, detection, segmentation and quantification. Additionally, this review also highlights popular datasets used for cracks and the metrics that are used to evaluate the performance of those algorithms. Finally, potential research gaps are outlined and further research directions are provided.
summary: Surface cracks are a very common indicator of potential structural faults. Their early detection and monitoring is an important factor in structural health monitoring. Left untreated, they can grow in size over time and require expensive repairs or maintenance. With recent advances in computer vision and deep learning algorithms, the automatic detection and segmentation of cracks for this monitoring process have become a major topic of interest. This review aims to give researchers an overview of the published work within the field of crack analysis algorithms that make use of deep learning. It outlines the various tasks that are solved through applying computer vision algorithms to surface cracks in a structural health monitoring setting and also provides in-depth reviews of recent fully, semi and unsupervised approaches that perform crack classification, detection, segmentation and quantification. Additionally, this review also highlights popular datasets used for cracks and the metrics that are used to evaluate the performance of those algorithms. Finally, potential research gaps are outlined and further research directions are provided.
abstract_zh: 表面裂纹是潜在结构故障的一个非常常见的指标。它们的早期发现和监测是结构健康监测的重要因素。如果不进行处理，它们会随着时间的推移而变大，并且需要昂贵的维修或维护。随着计算机视觉和深度学习算法的最新进展，该监测过程中裂缝的自动检测和分割已成为人们感兴趣的主要话题。本综述旨在让研究人员概述利用深度学习的裂纹分析算法领域已发表的工作。它概述了通过将计算机视觉算法应用于结构健康监测设置中的表面裂缝来解决的各种任务，并深入回顾了最近执行裂缝分类、检测、分割和量化的完全、半和无监督方法。此外，这篇评论还重点介绍了用于破解的流行数据集以及用于评估这些算法性能的指标。最后，概述了潜在的研究差距并提供了进一步的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在结构裂缝分割、检测与量化中的应用方法。
AI.motivation: 结构表面裂缝是潜在故障的重要指标，早期检测可避免昂贵维修。深度学习技术为自动裂缝分析提供了新方法，需系统梳理现有研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析裂缝分析任务，比较全监督、半监督与无监督方法，总结常用数据集与评估指标。
AI.result: 归纳了裂缝分类、检测、分割及量化任务的技术路线，指出数据集和评价指标的差异，并提出当前研究的不足。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升裂缝分析效率，但存在数据依赖性强、泛化能力不足等问题，未来需加强跨场景算法研究。

authors_text: Hamid Dadkhahi,Jesus Rios,Karthikeyan Shanmugam,Payel Das
title: Fourier Representations for Black-Box Optimization over Categorical Variables
title_zh: 分类变量黑盒优化的傅立叶表示
abstract: Optimization of real-world black-box functions defined over purely categorical variables is an active area of research. In particular, optimization and design of biological sequences with specific functional or structural properties have a profound impact in medicine, materials science, and biotechnology. Standalone search algorithms, such as simulated annealing (SA) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS), are typically used for such optimization problems. In order to improve the performance and sample efficiency of such algorithms, we propose to use existing methods in conjunction with a surrogate model for the black-box evaluations over purely categorical variables. To this end, we present two different representations, a group-theoretic Fourier expansion and an abridged one-hot encoded Boolean Fourier expansion. To learn such representations, we consider two different settings to update our surrogate model. First, we utilize an adversarial online regression setting where Fourier characters of each representation are considered as experts and their respective coefficients are updated via an exponential weight update rule each time the black box is evaluated. Second, we consider a Bayesian setting where queries are selected via Thompson sampling and the posterior is updated via a sparse Bayesian regression model (over our proposed representation) with a regularized horseshoe prior. Numerical experiments over synthetic benchmarks as well as real-world RNA sequence optimization and design problems demonstrate the representational power of the proposed methods, which achieve competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art counterparts, while improving the computation cost and/or sample efficiency, substantially.
summary: Optimization of real-world black-box functions defined over purely categorical variables is an active area of research. In particular, optimization and design of biological sequences with specific functional or structural properties have a profound impact in medicine, materials science, and biotechnology. Standalone search algorithms, such as simulated annealing (SA) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS), are typically used for such optimization problems. In order to improve the performance and sample efficiency of such algorithms, we propose to use existing methods in conjunction with a surrogate model for the black-box evaluations over purely categorical variables. To this end, we present two different representations, a group-theoretic Fourier expansion and an abridged one-hot encoded Boolean Fourier expansion. To learn such representations, we consider two different settings to update our surrogate model. First, we utilize an adversarial online regression setting where Fourier characters of each representation are considered as experts and their respective coefficients are updated via an exponential weight update rule each time the black box is evaluated. Second, we consider a Bayesian setting where queries are selected via Thompson sampling and the posterior is updated via a sparse Bayesian regression model (over our proposed representation) with a regularized horseshoe prior. Numerical experiments over synthetic benchmarks as well as real-world RNA sequence optimization and design problems demonstrate the representational power of the proposed methods, which achieve competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art counterparts, while improving the computation cost and/or sample efficiency, substantially.
abstract_zh: 在纯分类变量上定义的现实世界黑盒函数的优化是一个活跃的研究领域。特别是具有特定功能或结构特性的生物序列的优化和设计对医学、材料科学和生物技术具有深远的影响。独立搜索算法，例如模拟退火 (SA) 和蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS)，通常用于此类优化问题。为了提高此类算法的性能和样本效率，我们建议将现有方法与代理模型结合使用，对纯分类变量进行黑盒评估。为此，我们提出了两种不同的表示，即群论傅里叶展开和简化的单热编码布尔傅里叶展开。为了学习这种表示，我们考虑两种不同的设置来更新我们的代理模型。首先，我们利用对抗性在线回归设置，其中每个表示的傅立叶字符被视为专家，并且每次评估黑盒时，它们各自的系数都通过指数权重更新规则进行更新。其次，我们考虑贝叶斯设置，其中通过汤普森采样选择查询，并通过稀疏贝叶斯回归模型（在我们提出的表示上）和正则化马蹄先验更新后验。针对合成基准的数值实验以及现实世界的 RNA 序列优化和设计问题证明了所提出的方法的代表性能力，与最先进的同行相比，该方法实现了有竞争力或优越的性能，同时大大提高了计算成本和/或样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用傅里叶表示方法改进纯分类变量上的黑盒优化算法，通过构建代理模型提升搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟退火和蒙特卡洛树搜索等算法在处理生物序列等分类变量优化问题时，存在样本效率低、计算成本高的问题。
AI.method: 提出两种傅里叶展开表示（群论傅里叶和简化布尔傅里叶），结合对抗在线回归（专家权重更新）和贝叶斯稀疏回归（汤普森抽样+正则化 horseshoe 先验）两种设置更新代理模型。
AI.result: 在合成基准和RNA序列设计任务中，方法在保持竞争力的同时显著提升计算效率和样本利用率。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶表示能有效捕捉分类变量的结构特征，所提方法在黑盒优化中具有优于现有技术的效率和性能优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用傅里叶表示方法改进纯分类变量上的黑盒优化算法，通过构建代理模型提升搜索效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有模拟退火和蒙特卡洛树搜索等算法在处理生物序列等分类变量优化问题时，存在样本效率低、计算成本高的问题。
ai_content.method: 提出两种傅里叶展开表示（群论傅里叶和简化布尔傅里叶），结合对抗在线回归（专家权重更新）和贝叶斯稀疏回归（汤普森抽样+正则化 horseshoe 先验）两种设置更新代理模型。
ai_content.result: 在合成基准和RNA序列设计任务中，方法在保持竞争力的同时显著提升计算效率和样本利用率。
ai_content.conclusion: 傅里叶表示能有效捕捉分类变量的结构特征，所提方法在黑盒优化中具有优于现有技术的效率和性能优势。

search_text: Fourier Representations for Black-Box Optimization over Categorical Variables 分类变量黑盒优化的傅立叶表示 Optimization of real-world black-box functions defined over purely categorical variables is an active area of research. In particular, optimization and design of biological sequences with specific functional or structural properties have a profound impact in medicine, materials science, and biotechnology. Standalone search algorithms, such as simulated annealing (SA) and Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS), are typically used for such optimization problems. In order to improve the performance and sample efficiency of such algorithms, we propose to use existing methods in conjunction with a surrogate model for the black-box evaluations over purely categorical variables. To this end, we present two different representations, a group-theoretic Fourier expansion and an abridged one-hot encoded Boolean Fourier expansion. To learn such representations, we consider two different settings to update our surrogate model. First, we utilize an adversarial online regression setting where Fourier characters of each representation are considered as experts and their respective coefficients are updated via an exponential weight update rule each time the black box is evaluated. Second, we consider a Bayesian setting where queries are selected via Thompson sampling and the posterior is updated via a sparse Bayesian regression model (over our proposed representation) with a regularized horseshoe prior. Numerical experiments over synthetic benchmarks as well as real-world RNA sequence optimization and design problems demonstrate the representational power of the proposed methods, which achieve competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art counterparts, while improving the computation cost and/or sample efficiency, substantially. 在纯分类变量上定义的现实世界黑盒函数的优化是一个活跃的研究领域。特别是具有特定功能或结构特性的生物序列的优化和设计对医学、材料科学和生物技术具有深远的影响。独立搜索算法，例如模拟退火 (SA) 和蒙特卡罗树搜索 (MCTS)，通常用于此类优化问题。为了提高此类算法的性能和样本效率，我们建议将现有方法与代理模型结合使用，对纯分类变量进行黑盒评估。为此，我们提出了两种不同的表示，即群论傅里叶展开和简化的单热编码布尔傅里叶展开。为了学习这种表示，我们考虑两种不同的设置来更新我们的代理模型。首先，我们利用对抗性在线回归设置，其中每个表示的傅立叶字符被视为专家，并且每次评估黑盒时，它们各自的系数都通过指数权重更新规则进行更新。其次，我们考虑贝叶斯设置，其中通过汤普森采样选择查询，并通过稀疏贝叶斯回归模型（在我们提出的表示上）和正则化马蹄先验更新后验。针对合成基准的数值实验以及现实世界的 RNA 序列优化和设计问题证明了所提出的方法的代表性能力，与最先进的同行相比，该方法实现了有竞争力或优越的性能，同时大大提高了计算成本和/或样本效率。 本文提出利用傅里叶表示方法改进纯分类变量上的黑盒优化算法，通过构建代理模型提升搜索效率。 Hamid Dadkhahi,Jesus Rios,Karthikeyan Shanmugam,Payel Das cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lutz Oettershagen,Petra Mutzel,Nils M. Kriege
title: Temporal Walk Centrality: Ranking Nodes in Evolving Networks
title_zh: 时间行走中心性：对演化网络中的节点进行排名
comment: Accepted at the ACM Web Conference (WWW) 2022
comments: Accepted at the ACM Web Conference (WWW) 2022
abstract: We propose the Temporal Walk Centrality, which quantifies the importance of a node by measuring its ability to obtain and distribute information in a temporal network. In contrast to the widely-used betweenness centrality, we assume that information does not necessarily spread on shortest paths but on temporal random walks that satisfy the time constraints of the network. We show that temporal walk centrality can identify nodes playing central roles in dissemination processes that might not be detected by related betweenness concepts and other common static and temporal centrality measures. We propose exact and approximation algorithms with different running times depending on the properties of the temporal network and parameters of our new centrality measure. A technical contribution is a general approach to lift existing algebraic methods for counting walks in static networks to temporal networks. Our experiments on real-world temporal networks show the efficiency and accuracy of our algorithms. Finally, we demonstrate that the rankings by temporal walk centrality often differ significantly from those of other state-of-the-art temporal centralities.
summary: We propose the Temporal Walk Centrality, which quantifies the importance of a node by measuring its ability to obtain and distribute information in a temporal network. In contrast to the widely-used betweenness centrality, we assume that information does not necessarily spread on shortest paths but on temporal random walks that satisfy the time constraints of the network. We show that temporal walk centrality can identify nodes playing central roles in dissemination processes that might not be detected by related betweenness concepts and other common static and temporal centrality measures. We propose exact and approximation algorithms with different running times depending on the properties of the temporal network and parameters of our new centrality measure. A technical contribution is a general approach to lift existing algebraic methods for counting walks in static networks to temporal networks. Our experiments on real-world temporal networks show the efficiency and accuracy of our algorithms. Finally, we demonstrate that the rankings by temporal walk centrality often differ significantly from those of other state-of-the-art temporal centralities.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了时间行走中心性（Temporal Walk Centrality），它通过测量节点在时间网络中获取和分发信息的能力来量化节点的重要性。与广泛使用的介数中心性相反，我们假设信息不一定在最短路径上传播，而是在满足网络时间约束的时间随机游走上传播。我们表明，时间行走中心性可以识别在传播过程中发挥核心作用的节点，而这些节点可能无法通过相关介数概念和其他常见的静态和时间中心性度量来检测到。根据时间网络的属性和新中心性度量的参数，我们提出了具有不同运行时间的精确算法和近似算法。技术贡献是一种通用方法，可将静态网络中用于计数游走的现有代数方法提升到时间网络。我们在现实世界时间网络上的实验表明了我们算法的效率和准确性。最后，我们证明了时间行走中心性的排名通常与其他最先进的时间中心性的排名有很大不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为时间步态中心性的新方法，用于在动态网络中对节点进行排序，通过考虑时间约束下的随机游走来量化节点的重要性。
AI.motivation: 传统中心性度量（如介数中心性）假设信息沿最短路径传播，可能忽略动态网络中时间约束下信息传播的实际路径，导致重要节点未被准确识别。
AI.method: 提出精确和近似算法计算时间步态中心性，将静态网络的代数方法扩展到动态网络，并通过真实世界动态网络实验验证算法效率和准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，时间步态中心性排名与现有先进方法存在显著差异，能更准确识别动态网络中信息传播的关键节点。
AI.conclusion: 时间步态中心性为动态网络分析提供了新视角，有效补充了传统静态和动态中心性度量的不足。

authors_text: Zhiheng Liu,Kai Zhu,Yang Cao
title: Self-Paced Imbalance Rectification for Class Incremental Learning
title_zh: 自定进度不平衡纠正课堂增量学习
comment: There are some parts to be improved in the paper
comments: There are some parts to be improved in the paper
abstract: Exemplar-based class-incremental learning is to recognize new classes while not forgetting old ones, whose samples can only be saved in limited memory. The ratio fluctuation of new samples to old exemplars, which is caused by the variation of memory capacity at different environments, will bring challenges to stabilize the incremental optimization process. To address this problem, we propose a novel self-paced imbalance rectification scheme, which dynamically maintains the incremental balance during the representation learning phase. Specifically, our proposed scheme consists of a frequency compensation strategy that adjusts the logits margin between old and new classes with the corresponding number ratio to strengthen the expression ability of the old classes, and an inheritance transfer strategy to reduce the representation confusion by estimating the similarity of different classes in the old embedding space. Furthermore, a chronological attenuation mechanism is proposed to mitigate the repetitive optimization of the older classes at multiple step-wise increments. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate stable incremental performance, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Exemplar-based class-incremental learning is to recognize new classes while not forgetting old ones, whose samples can only be saved in limited memory. The ratio fluctuation of new samples to old exemplars, which is caused by the variation of memory capacity at different environments, will bring challenges to stabilize the incremental optimization process. To address this problem, we propose a novel self-paced imbalance rectification scheme, which dynamically maintains the incremental balance during the representation learning phase. Specifically, our proposed scheme consists of a frequency compensation strategy that adjusts the logits margin between old and new classes with the corresponding number ratio to strengthen the expression ability of the old classes, and an inheritance transfer strategy to reduce the representation confusion by estimating the similarity of different classes in the old embedding space. Furthermore, a chronological attenuation mechanism is proposed to mitigate the repetitive optimization of the older classes at multiple step-wise increments. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate stable incremental performance, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 基于样本的类增量学习是在识别新类的同时不忘记旧类，而旧类的样本只能保存在有限的内存中。由于不同环境下内存容量的变化而导致新样本与旧样本的比例波动，这会给增量优化过程的稳定带来挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自定进度不平衡纠正方案，该方案在表示学习阶段动态保持增量平衡。具体来说，我们提出的方案包括频率补偿策略和继承转移策略，其中频率补偿策略根据相应的数量比例调整新旧类之间的logits余量以增强旧类的表达能力，而继承转移策略则通过估计旧嵌入空间中不同类的相似性来减少表示混乱。此外，提出了一种按时间顺序的衰减机制，以减轻旧类在多个逐步增量中的重复优化。对三个基准的广泛实验证明了稳定的增量性能，显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应不平衡校正方案，解决类别增量学习中因内存限制导致的新旧样本比例波动问题，以保持模型在新增类别时不忘旧类别。
AI.motivation: 内存容量变化导致新旧样本比例波动，影响增量优化稳定性，现有方法难以有效应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 提出频率补偿策略（调整新旧类logits间隔）、继承转移策略（通过旧嵌入空间相似性减少混淆）及时间衰减机制（缓解旧类重复优化），动态维持增量平衡。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实现稳定增量性能，显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有效缓解了类别增量学习中的样本比例不平衡问题，提升了模型持续学习能力。

search_text: Self-Paced Imbalance Rectification for Class Incremental Learning 自定进度不平衡纠正课堂增量学习 Exemplar-based class-incremental learning is to recognize new classes while not forgetting old ones, whose samples can only be saved in limited memory. The ratio fluctuation of new samples to old exemplars, which is caused by the variation of memory capacity at different environments, will bring challenges to stabilize the incremental optimization process. To address this problem, we propose a novel self-paced imbalance rectification scheme, which dynamically maintains the incremental balance during the representation learning phase. Specifically, our proposed scheme consists of a frequency compensation strategy that adjusts the logits margin between old and new classes with the corresponding number ratio to strengthen the expression ability of the old classes, and an inheritance transfer strategy to reduce the representation confusion by estimating the similarity of different classes in the old embedding space. Furthermore, a chronological attenuation mechanism is proposed to mitigate the repetitive optimization of the older classes at multiple step-wise increments. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate stable incremental performance, significantly outperforming the state-of-the-art methods. 基于样本的类增量学习是在识别新类的同时不忘记旧类，而旧类的样本只能保存在有限的内存中。由于不同环境下内存容量的变化而导致新样本与旧样本的比例波动，这会给增量优化过程的稳定带来挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的自定进度不平衡纠正方案，该方案在表示学习阶段动态保持增量平衡。具体来说，我们提出的方案包括频率补偿策略和继承转移策略，其中频率补偿策略根据相应的数量比例调整新旧类之间的logits余量以增强旧类的表达能力，而继承转移策略则通过估计旧嵌入空间中不同类的相似性来减少表示混乱。此外，提出了一种按时间顺序的衰减机制，以减轻旧类在多个逐步增量中的重复优化。对三个基准的广泛实验证明了稳定的增量性能，显着优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种自适应不平衡校正方案，解决类别增量学习中因内存限制导致的新旧样本比例波动问题，以保持模型在新增类别时不忘旧类别。 Zhiheng Liu,Kai Zhu,Yang Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Eduardo Benitez Sandoval,Ricardo Sosa,Massimiliano Cappuccio,Tomasz Bednarz
title: Human-Robot Creative Interactions (HRCI): Exploring Creativity in Artificial Agents Using a Story-Telling Game
title_zh: 人机创意交互 (HRCI)：使用讲故事的游戏探索人工智能体的创造力
comment: This paper is under review for the Frontiers in Robotics and AI journal since April 2021
comments: This paper is under review for the Frontiers in Robotics and AI journal since April 2021
abstract: Creativity in social robots requires further attention in the interdisciplinary field of Human-Robot Interaction (HRI). This paper investigates the hypothesised connection between the perceived creative agency and the animacy of social robots. The goal of this work is to assess the relevance of robot movements in the attribution of creativity to robots. The results of this work inform the design of future Human-Robot Creative Interactions (HRCI). The study uses a storytelling game based on visual imagery inspired by the game 'Story Cubes' to explore the perceived creative agency of social robots. This game is used to tell a classic story for children with an alternative ending. A 2x2 experiment was designed to compare two conditions: the robot telling the original version of the story and the robot plot-twisting the end of the story. A Robotis Mini humanoid robot was used for the experiment. As a novel contribution, we propose an adaptation of the Short Scale Creative Self scale (SSCS) to measure perceived creative agency in robots. We also use the Godspeed scale to explore different attributes of social robots in this setting. We did not obtain significant main effects of the robot movements or the story in the participants' scores. However, we identified significant main effects of the robot movements in features of animacy, likeability, and perceived safety. This initial work encourages further studies experimenting with different robot embodiment and movements to evaluate the perceived creative agency in robots and inform the design of future robots that participate in creative interactions.

abstract_zh: 社交机器人的创造力需要人机交互（HRI）跨学科领域的进一步关注。本文研究了感知的创造性机构与社交机器人的活力之间的假设联系。这项工作的目标是评估机器人运动在机器人创造力归因中的相关性。这项工作的结果为未来人机创意交互（HRCI）的设计提供了信息。该研究使用受“故事立方体”游戏启发的视觉图像讲故事游戏来探索社交机器人的感知创意机构。该游戏用于为孩子们讲述一个经典的故事，并有另一种结局。设计了一个 2x2 实验来比较两种情况：机器人讲述故事的原始版本和机器人情节扭曲故事的结局。实验使用了 Robotis Mini 人形机器人。作为一项新颖的贡献，我们提出了对短尺度创意自我量表（SSCS）的改编，以衡量机器人的感知创意能力。我们还使用 Godspeed 量表来探索社交机器人在此环境中的不同属性。我们没有获得机器人动作或故事对参与者分数的显着主效应。然而，我们发现机器人运动对活泼性、喜爱度和感知安全性等特征具有显着的主要影响。这项初步工作鼓励进一步研究尝试不同的机器人实施例和运动，以评估机器人中感知到的创造性机构，并为参与创造性交互的未来机器人的设计提供信息。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过讲故事游戏探讨社交机器人运动对其创造性代理感和拟人化感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 社交机器人的创造力在人机交互领域需进一步研究，需明确机器人运动如何影响其创造性和拟人化属性。
AI.method: 采用2x2实验设计，使用Robotis Mini机器人进行讲故事游戏，结合改编的SSCS量表和Godspeed量表评估参与者对机器人创造性和社交属性的感知。
AI.result: 未发现机器人运动和故事版本对创造性评分有显著影响，但发现机器人运动显著影响拟人化、可喜爱性和安全性感知。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究不同机器人形态和运动方式对创造性代理感的影响，以指导未来创造性人机交互设计。

authors_text: Nishad Gothoskar,Miguel Lázaro-Gredilla,Yasemin Bekiroglu,Abhishek Agarwal,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Vikash K. Mansinghka,Dileep George
title: DURableVS: Data-efficient Unsupervised Recalibrating Visual Servoing via online learning in a structured generative model
title_zh: DURableVS：通过结构化生成模型中的在线学习实现数据高效的无监督重新校准视觉伺服
abstract: Visual servoing enables robotic systems to perform accurate closed-loop control, which is required in many applications. However, existing methods either require precise calibration of the robot kinematic model and cameras or use neural architectures that require large amounts of data to train. In this work, we present a method for unsupervised learning of visual servoing that does not require any prior calibration and is extremely data-efficient. Our key insight is that visual servoing does not depend on identifying the veridical kinematic and camera parameters, but instead only on an accurate generative model of image feature observations from the joint positions of the robot. We demonstrate that with our model architecture and learning algorithm, we can consistently learn accurate models from less than 50 training samples (which amounts to less than 1 min of unsupervised data collection), and that such data-efficient learning is not possible with standard neural architectures. Further, we show that by using the generative model in the loop and learning online, we can enable a robotic system to recover from calibration errors and to detect and quickly adapt to possibly unexpected changes in the robot-camera system (e.g. bumped camera, new objects).
summary: Visual servoing enables robotic systems to perform accurate closed-loop control, which is required in many applications. However, existing methods either require precise calibration of the robot kinematic model and cameras or use neural architectures that require large amounts of data to train. In this work, we present a method for unsupervised learning of visual servoing that does not require any prior calibration and is extremely data-efficient. Our key insight is that visual servoing does not depend on identifying the veridical kinematic and camera parameters, but instead only on an accurate generative model of image feature observations from the joint positions of the robot. We demonstrate that with our model architecture and learning algorithm, we can consistently learn accurate models from less than 50 training samples (which amounts to less than 1 min of unsupervised data collection), and that such data-efficient learning is not possible with standard neural architectures. Further, we show that by using the generative model in the loop and learning online, we can enable a robotic system to recover from calibration errors and to detect and quickly adapt to possibly unexpected changes in the robot-camera system (e.g. bumped camera, new objects).
abstract_zh: 视觉伺服使机器人系统能够执行精确的闭环控制，这在许多应用中都是必需的。然而，现有方法要么需要对机器人运动学模型和相机进行精确校准，要么使用需要大量数据进行训练的神经架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种视觉伺服无监督学习方法，不需要任何事先校准，并且数据效率极高。我们的主要见解是，视觉伺服并不依赖于识别真实的运动学和相机参数，而仅依赖于机器人关节位置的图像特征观察的准确生成模型。我们证明，通过我们的模型架构和学习算法，我们可以从少于 50 个训练样本（相当于不到 1 分钟的无监督数据收集）中持续学习准确的模型，而这种数据高效的学习对于标准神经架构来说是不可能的。此外，我们表明，通过使用循环中的生成模型和在线学习，我们可以使机器人系统从校准错误中恢复，并检测并快速适应机器人相机系统中可能出现的意外变化（例如碰撞相机、新物体）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验校准且数据高效的无监督视觉伺服方法，通过结构化生成模型和在线学习实现机器人系统的自适应控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉伺服方法依赖精确的机器人动力学和相机校准，或需要大量数据训练，难以适应动态环境变化和校准误差。
AI.method: 构建结构化生成模型学习机器人关节位置与图像特征的映射关系，结合在线学习框架实现无监督训练与实时系统自校正。
AI.result: 在少于50个样本（1分钟数据）下实现准确模型学习，相较标准神经网络提升数据效率，并成功恢复校准误差及适应环境突变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了基于生成模型的视觉伺服在数据效率和环境适应性上的优势，为实际机器人应用提供可靠解决方案。

Our key insight is that visual servoing does not depend on identifying the veridical kinematic and camera parameters, but instead only on an accurate generative model of image feature observations from the joint positions of the robot. We demonstrate that with our model architecture and learning algorithm, we can consistently learn accurate models from less than 50 training samples (which amounts to less than 1 min of unsupervised data collection), and that such data-efficient learning is not possible with standard neural architectures. Further, we show that by using the generative model in the loop and learning online, we can enable a robotic system to recover from calibration errors and to detect and quickly adapt to possibly unexpected changes in the robot-camera system (e.g. bumped camera, new objects). 视觉伺服使机器人系统能够执行精确的闭环控制，这在许多应用中都是必需的。然而，现有方法要么需要对机器人运动学模型和相机进行精确校准，要么使用需要大量数据进行训练的神经架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种视觉伺服无监督学习方法，不需要任何事先校准，并且数据效率极高。我们的主要见解是，视觉伺服并不依赖于识别真实的运动学和相机参数，而仅依赖于机器人关节位置的图像特征观察的准确生成模型。我们证明，通过我们的模型架构和学习算法，我们可以从少于 50 个训练样本（相当于不到 1 分钟的无监督数据收集）中持续学习准确的模型，而这种数据高效的学习对于标准神经架构来说是不可能的。此外，我们表明，通过使用循环中的生成模型和在线学习，我们可以使机器人系统从校准错误中恢复，并检测并快速适应机器人相机系统中可能出现的意外变化（例如碰撞相机、新物体）。 本文提出一种无需先验校准且数据高效的无监督视觉伺服方法，通过结构化生成模型和在线学习实现机器人系统的自适应控制。 Nishad Gothoskar,Miguel Lázaro-Gredilla,Yasemin Bekiroglu,Abhishek Agarwal,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Vikash K. Mansinghka,Dileep George cs.RO

authors_text: Michael Karnes,Alper Yilmaz
title: Network Comparison Study of Deep Activation Feature Discriminability with Novel Objects
title_zh: 深度激活特征与新物体辨别能力的网络比较研究
abstract: Feature extraction has always been a critical component of the computer vision field. More recently, state-of-the-art computer visions algorithms have incorporated Deep Neural Networks (DNN) in feature extracting roles, creating Deep Convolutional Activation Features (DeCAF). The transferability of DNN knowledge domains has enabled the wide use of pretrained DNN feature extraction for applications with novel object classes, especially those with limited training data. This study analyzes the general discriminability of novel object visual appearances encoded into the DeCAF space of six of the leading visual recognition DNN architectures. The results of this study characterize the Mahalanobis distances and cosine similarities between DeCAF object manifolds across two visual object tracking benchmark data sets. The backgrounds surrounding each object are also included as an object classes in the manifold analysis, providing a wider range of novel classes. This study found that different network architectures led to different network feature focuses that must to be considered in the network selection process. These results are generated from the VOT2015 and UAV123 benchmark data sets; however, the proposed methods can be applied to efficiently compare estimated network performance characteristics for any labeled visual data set.
summary: Feature extraction has always been a critical component of the computer vision field. More recently, state-of-the-art computer visions algorithms have incorporated Deep Neural Networks (DNN) in feature extracting roles, creating Deep Convolutional Activation Features (DeCAF). The transferability of DNN knowledge domains has enabled the wide use of pretrained DNN feature extraction for applications with novel object classes, especially those with limited training data. This study analyzes the general discriminability of novel object visual appearances encoded into the DeCAF space of six of the leading visual recognition DNN architectures. The results of this study characterize the Mahalanobis distances and cosine similarities between DeCAF object manifolds across two visual object tracking benchmark data sets. The backgrounds surrounding each object are also included as an object classes in the manifold analysis, providing a wider range of novel classes. This study found that different network architectures led to different network feature focuses that must to be considered in the network selection process. These results are generated from the VOT2015 and UAV123 benchmark data sets; however, the proposed methods can be applied to efficiently compare estimated network performance characteristics for any labeled visual data set.
abstract_zh: 特征提取一直是计算机视觉领域的关键组成部分。最近，最先进的计算机视觉算法已将深度神经网络 (DNN) 纳入特征提取角色，创建深度卷积激活特征 (DeCAF)。 DNN 知识领域的可转移性使得预训练的 DNN 特征提取能够广泛用于具有新颖对象类的应用，尤其是那些训练数据有限的应用。本研究分析了编码到六种领先视觉识别 DNN 架构的 DeCAF 空间中的新物体视觉外观的一般可辨别性。本研究的结果描述了两个视觉对象跟踪基准数据集上 DeCAF 对象流形之间的马哈拉诺比斯距离和余弦相似度。每个对象周围的背景也作为对象类包含在流形分析中，从而提供了更广泛的新类。本研究发现，不同的网络架构导致不同的网络特征重点，在网络选择过程中必须考虑这些特征。这些结果是根据 VOT2015 和 UAV123 基准数据集生成的；然而，所提出的方法可以用于有效地比较任何标记的视觉数据集的估计网络性能特征。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析六种深度神经网络架构的DeCAF特征空间，比较其在新型物体识别中的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 传统特征提取方法在新型物体识别中效果有限，而预训练DNN的特征迁移能力较强，但不同网络架构的特征表现差异需系统评估。
AI.method: 使用VOT2015和UAV123数据集，计算六种DNN架构的DeCAF特征间马氏距离和余弦相似度，并将背景纳入分析范围。
AI.result: 不同网络架构的特征焦点差异显著，需根据任务需求选择合适模型，且方法可推广至其他标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 网络特征判别能力与架构设计密切相关，需结合具体应用场景进行模型选择，所提方法为性能评估提供有效工具。

authors_text: Shreepriya Gonzalez Jimenez,Danilo Gallo,Ricardo Sosa,Eduardo B. Sandoval,Tommasso Colombino,Antonietta Grasso
title: A Decision Support Design Framework for Selecting a Robotic Interface
title_zh: 用于选择机器人接口的决策支持设计框架
comment: To be submitted to a relevant Human-Robot Interaction conference
comments: To be submitted to a relevant Human-Robot Interaction conference
abstract: The design and development of robots involve the essential step of selecting and testing robotic interfaces. This interface selection requires careful consideration as the robot's physical embodiment influences and adds to the traditional interfaces' complexities. Our paper presents a decision support design framework for the a priori selection of robotic interface that was inductively formulated from our case study of designing a robot to collaborate with employees with cognitive disabilities. Our framework outlines the interface requirements according to User, Robot, Tasks and Environment and facilitates a structured comparison of interfaces against those requirements. The framework is assessed for its potential applicability and usefulness through a qualitative study with HRI experts. The framework is appreciated as a systematic tool that enables documentation and discussion, and identified issues inform the frameworks' iteration. The themes of ownership of this process in interdisciplinary teams and its role in iteratively designing interfaces are discussed.
summary: The design and development of robots involve the essential step of selecting and testing robotic interfaces. This interface selection requires careful consideration as the robot's physical embodiment influences and adds to the traditional interfaces' complexities. Our paper presents a decision support design framework for the a priori selection of robotic interface that was inductively formulated from our case study of designing a robot to collaborate with employees with cognitive disabilities. Our framework outlines the interface requirements according to User, Robot, Tasks and Environment and facilitates a structured comparison of interfaces against those requirements. The framework is assessed for its potential applicability and usefulness through a qualitative study with HRI experts. The framework is appreciated as a systematic tool that enables documentation and discussion, and identified issues inform the frameworks' iteration. The themes of ownership of this process in interdisciplinary teams and its role in iteratively designing interfaces are discussed.
abstract_zh: 机器人的设计和开发涉及选择和测试机器人接口的重要步骤。这种界面选择需要仔细考虑，因为机器人的物理实施例会影响并增加传统界面的复杂性。我们的论文提出了一个用于先验选择机器人界面的决策支持设计框架，该框架是根据我们设计机器人与有认知障碍的员工协作的案例研究归纳得出的。我们的框架根据用户、机器人、任务和环境概述了界面要求，并促进界面与这些要求的结构化比较。通过与 HRI 专家的定性研究，对该框架的潜在适用性和有用性进行了评估。该框架被认为是一种系统工具，可以进行文档记录和讨论，并且确定的问题可以为框架的迭代提供信息。讨论了跨学科团队中这一过程的所有权主题及其在迭代设计界面中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户、机器人、任务和环境需求的机器人接口选择决策支持框架，并通过案例研究和专家评估验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器人接口选择受物理形态影响复杂，传统方法缺乏系统性，尤其在为认知障碍者设计协作机器人时需更结构化的决策工具。
AI.method: 通过设计协作机器人案例归纳框架，依据用户-机器人-任务-环境四维度制定接口需求，并邀请HRI专家进行定性评估。
AI.result: 框架被认可为系统化工具，支持需求对比与迭代优化，专家反馈明确了跨学科团队协作和迭代设计的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效支持机器人接口选择，强调需求分析与跨学科协作在迭代设计中的核心地位。

authors_text: Li Liu,Qingle Huang,Sihao Lin,Hongwei Xie,Bing Wang,Xiaojun Chang,Xiaodan Liang
title: Exploring Inter-Channel Correlation for Diversity-preserved KnowledgeDistillation
title_zh: 探索多样性保留知识蒸馏的通道间相关性
abstract: Knowledge Distillation has shown very promising abil-ity in transferring learned representation from the largermodel (teacher) to the smaller one (student).Despitemany efforts, prior methods ignore the important role ofretaining inter-channel correlation of features, leading tothe lack of capturing intrinsic distribution of the featurespace and sufficient diversity properties of features in theteacher network.To solve the issue, we propose thenovel Inter-Channel Correlation for Knowledge Distillation(ICKD), with which the diversity and homology of the fea-ture space of the student network can align with that ofthe teacher network. The correlation between these twochannels is interpreted as diversity if they are irrelevantto each other, otherwise homology. Then the student isrequired to mimic the correlation within its own embed-ding space. In addition, we introduce the grid-level inter-channel correlation, making it capable of dense predictiontasks. Extensive experiments on two vision tasks, includ-ing ImageNet classification and Pascal VOC segmentation,demonstrate the superiority of our ICKD, which consis-tently outperforms many existing methods, advancing thestate-of-the-art in the fields of Knowledge Distillation. Toour knowledge, we are the first method based on knowl-edge distillation boosts ResNet18 beyond 72% Top-1 ac-curacy on ImageNet classification. Code is available at:https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/ICKD.

The correlation between these twochannels is interpreted as diversity if they are irrelevantto each other, otherwise homology. Then the student isrequired to mimic the correlation within its own embed-ding space. In addition, we introduce the grid-level inter-channel correlation, making it capable of dense predictiontasks. Toour knowledge, we are the first method based on knowl-edge distillation boosts ResNet18 beyond 72% Top-1 ac-curacy on ImageNet classification. Code is available at:https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/ICKD.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏在将学习到的表示从较大的模型（教师）转移到较小的模型（学生）方面表现出了非常有前途的能力。尽管做出了很多努力，现有的方法还是忽略了保留特征的通道间相关性的重要作用，导致缺乏捕获特征空间的内在分布和教师网络中特征的足够的多样性属性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了新颖的知识蒸馏的通道间相关性（ICKD），通过该方法可以将多样性和学生网络的特征空间的同源性可以与教师网络的特征空间的同源性一致。如果这两个通道彼此不相关，则它们之间的相关性被解释为多样性，否则被解释为同源性。然后要求学生在自己的嵌入空间内模仿相关性。此外，我们引入了网格级通道间相关性，使其能够执行密集的预测任务。对两个视觉任务（包括 ImageNet 分类和 Pascal VOC 分割）的大量实验证明了我们的 ICKD 的优越性，它始终优于许多现有方法，推动了知识蒸馏领域的最先进技术。根据我们的知识，我们是第一个基于知识蒸馏的方法，使 ResNet18 在 ImageNet 分类上的 Top-1 准确率超过 72%。代码位于：https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/ICKD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ICKD的知识蒸馏方法，通过保留教师网络特征通道间的相关性，提升学生网络的特征多样性与同质性对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法忽视了特征通道间相关性对特征空间分布和多样性的关键作用，导致学生网络难以充分学习教师网络的特性。
AI.method: 提出基于通道间相关性的ICKD方法，将无关通道间的相关性视为多样性，相关通道视为同质性，并要求学生网络在嵌入空间中模拟此类相关性，同时引入网格级相关性以支持密集预测任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和Pascal VOC分割任务中，ICKD显著优于现有方法，首次将ResNet18的ImageNet分类Top-1准确率提升至72%以上。
AI.conclusion: ICKD通过有效建模通道间相关性，实现了知识蒸馏中特征多样性与同质性的对齐，推动了该领域的最新进展。

search_text: Exploring Inter-Channel Correlation for Diversity-preserved KnowledgeDistillation 探索多样性保留知识蒸馏的通道间相关性 Knowledge Distillation has shown very promising abil-ity in transferring learned representation from the largermodel (teacher) to the smaller one (student).Despitemany efforts, prior methods ignore the important role ofretaining inter-channel correlation of features, leading tothe lack of capturing intrinsic distribution of the featurespace and sufficient diversity properties of features in theteacher network.To solve the issue, we propose thenovel Inter-Channel Correlation for Knowledge Distillation(ICKD), with which the diversity and homology of the fea-ture space of the student network can align with that ofthe teacher network. The correlation between these twochannels is interpreted as diversity if they are irrelevantto each other, otherwise homology. Then the student isrequired to mimic the correlation within its own embed-ding space. In addition, we introduce the grid-level inter-channel correlation, making it capable of dense predictiontasks. Extensive experiments on two vision tasks, includ-ing ImageNet classification and Pascal VOC segmentation,demonstrate the superiority of our ICKD, which consis-tently outperforms many existing methods, advancing thestate-of-the-art in the fields of Knowledge Distillation. Toour knowledge, we are the first method based on knowl-edge distillation boosts ResNet18 beyond 72% Top-1 ac-curacy on ImageNet classification. Code is available at:https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/ICKD. 知识蒸馏在将学习到的表示从较大的模型（教师）转移到较小的模型（学生）方面表现出了非常有前途的能力。尽管做出了很多努力，现有的方法还是忽略了保留特征的通道间相关性的重要作用，导致缺乏捕获特征空间的内在分布和教师网络中特征的足够的多样性属性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了新颖的知识蒸馏的通道间相关性（ICKD），通过该方法可以将多样性和学生网络的特征空间的同源性可以与教师网络的特征空间的同源性一致。如果这两个通道彼此不相关，则它们之间的相关性被解释为多样性，否则被解释为同源性。然后要求学生在自己的嵌入空间内模仿相关性。此外，我们引入了网格级通道间相关性，使其能够执行密集的预测任务。对两个视觉任务（包括 ImageNet 分类和 Pascal VOC 分割）的大量实验证明了我们的 ICKD 的优越性，它始终优于许多现有方法，推动了知识蒸馏领域的最先进技术。根据我们的知识，我们是第一个基于知识蒸馏的方法，使 ResNet18 在 ImageNet 分类上的 Top-1 准确率超过 72%。代码位于：https://github.com/ADLab-AutoDrive/ICKD。 本文提出了一种名为ICKD的知识蒸馏方法，通过保留教师网络特征通道间的相关性，提升学生网络的特征多样性与同质性对齐能力。 Li Liu,Qingle Huang,Sihao Lin,Hongwei Xie,Bing Wang,Xiaojun Chang,Xiaodan Liang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ran Yi,Yong-Jin Liu,Yu-Kun Lai,Paul L. Rosin
title: Quality Metric Guided Portrait Line Drawing Generation from Unpaired Training Data
title_zh: 根据不成对的训练数据生成质量指标引导的肖像线图
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, https://doi.org/10.1109/TPAMI.2022.3147570, code: https://github.com/yiranran/QMUPD
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, https://doi.org/10.1109/TPAMI.2022.3147570, code: https://github.com/yiranran/QMUPD
abstract: Face portrait line drawing is a unique style of art which is highly abstract and expressive. However, due to its high semantic constraints, many existing methods learn to generate portrait drawings using paired training data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. In this paper, we propose a novel method to automatically transform face photos to portrait drawings using unpaired training data with two new features; i.e., our method can (1) learn to generate high quality portrait drawings in multiple styles using a single network and (2) generate portrait drawings in a "new style" unseen in the training data. To achieve these benefits, we (1) propose a novel quality metric for portrait drawings which is learned from human perception, and (2) introduce a quality loss to guide the network toward generating better looking portrait drawings. We observe that existing unpaired translation methods such as CycleGAN tend to embed invisible reconstruction information indiscriminately in the whole drawings due to significant information imbalance between the photo and portrait drawing domains, which leads to important facial features missing. To address this problem, we propose a novel asymmetric cycle mapping that enforces the reconstruction information to be visible and only embedded in the selected facial regions. Along with localized discriminators for important facial regions, our method well preserves all important facial features in the generated drawings. Generator dissection further explains that our model learns to incorporate face semantic information during drawing generation. Extensive experiments including a user study show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face portrait line drawing is a unique style of art which is highly abstract and expressive. However, due to its high semantic constraints, many existing methods learn to generate portrait drawings using paired training data, which is costly and time-consuming to obtain. In this paper, we propose a novel method to automatically transform face photos to portrait drawings using unpaired training data with two new features; i.e., our method can (1) learn to generate high quality portrait drawings in multiple styles using a single network and (2) generate portrait drawings in a "new style" unseen in the training data. To achieve these benefits, we (1) propose a novel quality metric for portrait drawings which is learned from human perception, and (2) introduce a quality loss to guide the network toward generating better looking portrait drawings. We observe that existing unpaired translation methods such as CycleGAN tend to embed invisible reconstruction information indiscriminately in the whole drawings due to significant information imbalance between the photo and portrait drawing domains, which leads to important facial features missing. To address this problem, we propose a novel asymmetric cycle mapping that enforces the reconstruction information to be visible and only embedded in the selected facial regions. Along with localized discriminators for important facial regions, our method well preserves all important facial features in the generated drawings. Generator dissection further explains that our model learns to incorporate face semantic information during drawing generation. Extensive experiments including a user study show that our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 脸部肖像线描是一种具有高度抽象性和表现力的独特艺术风格。然而，由于其高语义约束，许多现有方法学习使用成对训练数据生成肖像画，获得成本高且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，使用具有两个新特征的不成对训练数据自动将面部照片转换为肖像画；也就是说，我们的方法可以（1）学习使用单个网络生成多种风格的高质量肖像画，以及（2）以训练数据中未见的“新风格”生成肖像画。为了实现这些好处，我们（1）提出了一种从人类感知中学习的肖像画的新颖质量度量，并且（2）引入质量损失来引导网络生成更好看的肖像画。我们观察到，由于照片和肖像绘制域之间的信息显着不平衡，现有的不成对翻译方法（例如 CycleGAN）往往会在整个绘图中不加区别地嵌入不可见的重建信息，从而导致重要的面部特征丢失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的非对称循环映射，它强制重建信息可见并且仅嵌入到选定的面部区域。除了重要面部区域的局部鉴别器之外，我们的方法很好地保留了生成的绘图中的所有重要面部特征。生成器剖析进一步解释了我们的模型学习在绘图生成过程中合并面部语义信息。包括用户研究在内的大量实验表明，我们的模型优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非配对训练数据生成高质量人像线稿的新方法，能够生成多种风格且包含训练数据中未见的新风格。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖成本高昂的配对数据，且难以生成新风格线稿，同时存在面部特征丢失问题。
AI.method: 提出感知质量度量与质量损失函数，结合非对称循环映射和局部判别器，通过生成器剖析验证语义信息整合机制。
AI.result: 用户研究表明该方法在生成质量与风格多样性上优于现有最先进方法，有效保留关键面部特征。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法解决了非配对数据生成中的信息不平衡问题，实现了高质量多风格人像线稿生成与新风格迁移。

authors_text: Nie Jiwei,Feng Joe-Mei,Xue Dingyu,Pan Feng,Liu Wei,Hu Jun,Cheng Shuai
title: A Novel Image Descriptor with Aggregated Semantic Skeleton Representation for Long-term Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: 一种具有聚合语义骨架表示的新颖图像描述符，用于长期视觉位置识别
abstract: In a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) system, a loop-closure can eliminate accumulated errors, which is accomplished by Visual Place Recognition (VPR), a task that retrieves the current scene from a set of pre-stored sequential images through matching specific scene-descriptors. In urban scenes, the appearance variation caused by seasons and illumination has brought great challenges to the robustness of scene descriptors. Semantic segmentation images can not only deliver the shape information of objects but also their categories and spatial relations that will not be affected by the appearance variation of the scene. Innovated by the Vector of Locally Aggregated Descriptor (VLAD), in this paper, we propose a novel image descriptor with aggregated semantic skeleton representation (SSR), dubbed SSR-VLAD, for the VPR under drastic appearance-variation of environments. The SSR-VLAD of one image aggregates the semantic skeleton features of each category and encodes the spatial-temporal distribution information of the image semantic information. We conduct a series of experiments on three public datasets of challenging urban scenes. Compared with four state-of-the-art VPR methods- CoHOG, NetVLAD, LOST-X, and Region-VLAD, VPR by matching SSR-VLAD outperforms those methods and maintains competitive real-time performance at the same time.
summary: In a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) system, a loop-closure can eliminate accumulated errors, which is accomplished by Visual Place Recognition (VPR), a task that retrieves the current scene from a set of pre-stored sequential images through matching specific scene-descriptors. In urban scenes, the appearance variation caused by seasons and illumination has brought great challenges to the robustness of scene descriptors. Semantic segmentation images can not only deliver the shape information of objects but also their categories and spatial relations that will not be affected by the appearance variation of the scene. Innovated by the Vector of Locally Aggregated Descriptor (VLAD), in this paper, we propose a novel image descriptor with aggregated semantic skeleton representation (SSR), dubbed SSR-VLAD, for the VPR under drastic appearance-variation of environments. The SSR-VLAD of one image aggregates the semantic skeleton features of each category and encodes the spatial-temporal distribution information of the image semantic information. We conduct a series of experiments on three public datasets of challenging urban scenes. Compared with four state-of-the-art VPR methods- CoHOG, NetVLAD, LOST-X, and Region-VLAD, VPR by matching SSR-VLAD outperforms those methods and maintains competitive real-time performance at the same time.
abstract_zh: 在同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统中，闭环可以消除累积的错误，这是通过视觉位置识别 (VPR) 完成的，该任务通过匹配特定的场景描述符从一组预存储的顺序图像中检索当前场景。在城市场景中，季节和光照引起的外观变化给场景描述符的鲁棒性带来了巨大的挑战。语义分割图像不仅可以传递物体的形状信息，还可以传递物体的类别和空间关系，而不受场景外观变化的影响。在本文中，通过局部聚合描述符向量（VLAD）的创新，我们提出了一种具有聚合语义骨架表示（SSR）的新型图像描述符，称为SSR-VLAD，用于环境剧烈外观变化下的VPR。一幅图像的SSR-VLAD聚合了各个类别的语义骨架特征，并对图像语义信息的时空分布信息进行编码。我们对三个具有挑战性的城市场景的公共数据集进行了一系列实验。与 CoHOG、NetVLAD、LOST-X 和 Region-VLAD 四种最先进的 VPR 方法相比，通过匹配 SSR-VLAD 的 VPR 优于这些方法，同时保持有竞争力的实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚合语义骨架表示的新图像描述符SSR-VLAD，用于解决长期视觉地点识别中环境外观变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉地点识别方法在季节变化和光照差异下鲁棒性不足，而语义分割图像能提供不受外观变化影响的物体类别与空间关系信息。
AI.method: 受VLAD启发，融合语义分割结果中的物体类别特征，聚合图像语义骨架特征并编码时空分布信息，构建SSR-VLAD描述符。
AI.result: 在三个城市场景数据集上实验表明，SSR-VLAD在识别准确率上优于CoHOG、NetVLAD等四种先进方法，且保持实时性能。
AI.conclusion: SSR-VLAD通过语义信息增强描述符鲁棒性，在长期视觉地点识别任务中展现出竞争力。

search_text: A Novel Image Descriptor with Aggregated Semantic Skeleton Representation for Long-term Visual Place Recognition 一种具有聚合语义骨架表示的新颖图像描述符，用于长期视觉位置识别 In a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) system, a loop-closure can eliminate accumulated errors, which is accomplished by Visual Place Recognition (VPR), a task that retrieves the current scene from a set of pre-stored sequential images through matching specific scene-descriptors. In urban scenes, the appearance variation caused by seasons and illumination has brought great challenges to the robustness of scene descriptors. Semantic segmentation images can not only deliver the shape information of objects but also their categories and spatial relations that will not be affected by the appearance variation of the scene. Innovated by the Vector of Locally Aggregated Descriptor (VLAD), in this paper, we propose a novel image descriptor with aggregated semantic skeleton representation (SSR), dubbed SSR-VLAD, for the VPR under drastic appearance-variation of environments. The SSR-VLAD of one image aggregates the semantic skeleton features of each category and encodes the spatial-temporal distribution information of the image semantic information. We conduct a series of experiments on three public datasets of challenging urban scenes. Compared with four state-of-the-art VPR methods- CoHOG, NetVLAD, LOST-X, and Region-VLAD, VPR by matching SSR-VLAD outperforms those methods and maintains competitive real-time performance at the same time. 在同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 系统中，闭环可以消除累积的错误，这是通过视觉位置识别 (VPR) 完成的，该任务通过匹配特定的场景描述符从一组预存储的顺序图像中检索当前场景。在城市场景中，季节和光照引起的外观变化给场景描述符的鲁棒性带来了巨大的挑战。语义分割图像不仅可以传递物体的形状信息，还可以传递物体的类别和空间关系，而不受场景外观变化的影响。在本文中，通过局部聚合描述符向量（VLAD）的创新，我们提出了一种具有聚合语义骨架表示（SSR）的新型图像描述符，称为SSR-VLAD，用于环境剧烈外观变化下的VPR。一幅图像的SSR-VLAD聚合了各个类别的语义骨架特征，并对图像语义信息的时空分布信息进行编码。我们对三个具有挑战性的城市场景的公共数据集进行了一系列实验。与 CoHOG、NetVLAD、LOST-X 和 Region-VLAD 四种最先进的 VPR 方法相比，通过匹配 SSR-VLAD 的 VPR 优于这些方法，同时保持有竞争力的实时性能。 本文提出一种基于聚合语义骨架表示的新图像描述符SSR-VLAD，用于解决长期视觉地点识别中环境外观变化带来的挑战。 Nie Jiwei,Feng Joe-Mei,Xue Dingyu,Pan Feng,Liu Wei,Hu Jun,Cheng Shuai cs.CV

authors_text: Yutong Xie,Dufan Wu,Bin Dong,Quanzheng Li
title: Trained Model in Supervised Deep Learning is a Conditional Risk Minimizer
title_zh: 监督深度学习中的训练模型是条件风险最小化器
abstract: We proved that a trained model in supervised deep learning minimizes the conditional risk for each input (Theorem 2.1). This property provided insights into the behavior of trained models and established a connection between supervised and unsupervised learning in some cases. In addition, when the labels are intractable but can be written as a conditional risk minimizer, we proved an equivalent form of the original supervised learning problem with accessible labels (Theorem 2.2). We demonstrated that many existing works, such as Noise2Score, Noise2Noise and score function estimation can be explained by our theorem. Moreover, we derived a property of classification problem with noisy labels using Theorem 2.1 and validated it using MNIST dataset. Furthermore, We proposed a method to estimate uncertainty in image super-resolution based on Theorem 2.2 and validated it using ImageNet dataset. Our code is available on github.
summary: We proved that a trained model in supervised deep learning minimizes the conditional risk for each input (Theorem 2.1). This property provided insights into the behavior of trained models and established a connection between supervised and unsupervised learning in some cases. In addition, when the labels are intractable but can be written as a conditional risk minimizer, we proved an equivalent form of the original supervised learning problem with accessible labels (Theorem 2.2). We demonstrated that many existing works, such as Noise2Score, Noise2Noise and score function estimation can be explained by our theorem. Moreover, we derived a property of classification problem with noisy labels using Theorem 2.1 and validated it using MNIST dataset. Furthermore, We proposed a method to estimate uncertainty in image super-resolution based on Theorem 2.2 and validated it using ImageNet dataset. Our code is available on github.
abstract_zh: 我们证明了监督深度学习中经过训练的模型可以最大限度地降低每个输入的条件风险（定理 2.1）。这一属性提供了对训练模型行为的洞察，并在某些情况下建立了监督学习和无监督学习之间的联系。此外，当标签难以处理但可以写为条件风险最小化器时，我们证明了具有可访问标签的原始监督学习问题的等效形式（定理 2.2）。我们证明了许多现有的工作，例如 Noise2Score、Noise2Noise 和得分函数估计都可以用我们的定理来解释。此外，我们使用定理 2.1 导出了带有噪声标签的分类问题的属性，并使用 MNIST 数据集对其进行了验证。此外，我们提出了一种基于定理2.2的估计图像超分辨率不确定性的方法，并使用ImageNet数据集对其进行了验证。我们的代码可以在 github 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文证明监督深度学习训练模型本质是条件风险最小化器，并基于此理论分析了多种方法并提出新应用。
AI.motivation: 揭示监督学习模型的行为本质，建立与无监督学习的联系，解决标签不可行场景下的学习问题。
AI.method: 通过理论证明（定理2.1/2.2）建立条件风险最小化框架，结合MNIST/ImageNet数据集验证理论并推导新方法。
AI.result: 解释Noise2Score等方法，验证噪声标签分类性质，提出图像超分辨率不确定性估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 理论揭示模型本质特性，为监督与无监督学习提供新视角，并在实际任务中验证了理论有效性。

authors_text: Felix Denzinger,Michael Wels,Oliver Taubmann,Mehmet A. Gülsün,Max Schöbinger,Florian André,Sebastian J. Buss,Johannes Görich,Michael Sühling,Andreas Maier,Katharina Breininger
title: CAD-RADS Scoring using Deep Learning and Task-Specific Centerline Labeling
title_zh: 使用深度学习和特定于任务的中心线标记进行 CAD-RADS 评分
abstract: With coronary artery disease (CAD) persisting to be one of the leading causes of death worldwide, interest in supporting physicians with algorithms to speed up and improve diagnosis is high. In clinical practice, the severeness of CAD is often assessed with a coronary CT angiography (CCTA) scan and manually graded with the CAD-Reporting and Data System (CAD-RADS) score. The clinical questions this score assesses are whether patients have CAD or not (rule-out) and whether they have severe CAD or not (hold-out). In this work, we reach new state-of-the-art performance for automatic CAD-RADS scoring. We propose using severity-based label encoding, test time augmentation (TTA) and model ensembling for a task-specific deep learning architecture. Furthermore, we introduce a novel task- and model-specific, heuristic coronary segment labeling, which subdivides coronary trees into consistent parts across patients. It is fast, robust, and easy to implement. We were able to raise the previously reported area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) from 0.914 to 0.942 in the rule-out and from 0.921 to 0.950 in the hold-out task respectively.
summary: With coronary artery disease (CAD) persisting to be one of the leading causes of death worldwide, interest in supporting physicians with algorithms to speed up and improve diagnosis is high. In clinical practice, the severeness of CAD is often assessed with a coronary CT angiography (CCTA) scan and manually graded with the CAD-Reporting and Data System (CAD-RADS) score. The clinical questions this score assesses are whether patients have CAD or not (rule-out) and whether they have severe CAD or not (hold-out). In this work, we reach new state-of-the-art performance for automatic CAD-RADS scoring. We propose using severity-based label encoding, test time augmentation (TTA) and model ensembling for a task-specific deep learning architecture. Furthermore, we introduce a novel task- and model-specific, heuristic coronary segment labeling, which subdivides coronary trees into consistent parts across patients. It is fast, robust, and easy to implement. We were able to raise the previously reported area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) from 0.914 to 0.942 in the rule-out and from 0.921 to 0.950 in the hold-out task respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于冠状动脉疾病 (CAD) 仍然是全球死亡的主要原因之一，因此人们对通过算法来支持医生加速和改进诊断的兴趣很高。在临床实践中，CAD 的严重程度通常通过冠状动脉 CT 血管造影 (CCTA) 扫描进行评估，并通过 CAD 报告和数据系统 (CAD-RADS) 评分进行手动分级。该评分评估的临床问题是患者是否患有 CAD（排除）以及患者是否患有严重 CAD（保留）。在这项工作中，我们实现了自动 CAD-RADS 评分的新的最先进性能。我们建议使用基于严重性的标签编码、测试时间增强（TTA）和模型集成来实现特定于任务的深度学习架构。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的特定于任务和模型的启发式冠状动脉节段标记，它将冠状动脉树细分为跨患者的一致部分。它快速、强大且易于实施。我们能够将先前报告的受试者工作特征曲线下面积 (AUC) 在排除任务中从 0.914 提高到 0.942，在保留任务中从 0.921 提高到 0.950。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习和任务特定中心线标注的自动CAD-RADS评分方法，以提高冠状动脉疾病诊断的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 冠状动脉疾病（CAD）是全球主要死亡原因之一，传统人工评估CAD-RADS评分耗时且主观性强，亟需自动化算法辅助诊断。
AI.method: 采用基于严重程度的标签编码、测试时增强（TTA）和模型集成方法，并提出一种任务和模型特定的启发式冠状动脉分段标注技术，将冠状动脉树划分为患者间一致的区域。
AI.result: 在排除任务中AUC从0.914提升至0.942，在保留任务中从0.921提升至0.950，均达到新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度学习框架结合新型标注方法显著提升了CAD-RADS自动评分性能，为临床诊断提供了高效可靠的工具。
